GERMANY: A RUH S A MUN - BUR
F DEN S F KIE - HEL
TURKEY: F BLA S A BUL - RUM

messages.message: My friend, the Lepanto is proceeding flawlessly! I built F TRI and A VIE to ensure I have the forces to support our push against Turkey and defend my north. My plan is to move F TRI - ALB and F GRE - AEG to put maximum pressure on Turkey. I assume you are moving F ION - EAS and F NAP - ION? Let's coordinate our strikes.

Excellent defense of Romania! Turkey is completely bogged down. I am preparing to move against Turkey this year to help relieve the pressure on you. I will keep Galicia empty (my new A VIE will hold or move to BUD). Let's crush the Sultan together.

Ah, it seems Russia was tipped off or guessed correctly about Romania. No matter, we can still break them. I built F TRI to defend against a potential Italian stab, but my armies are ready to help you. I can move A SER - RUM to cut support or attack. What are your plans for this Spring?
Greetings Germany! I will continue to respect our DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia. My new builds are strictly for dealing with the Balkans and Turkey. Best of luck with your campaigns this year!
Greetings England! Just checking in to maintain our good relations. I'm focused entirely on the Balkans right now. Best of luck in the west!
Greetings France! Just checking in to maintain our good relations. I'm focused entirely on the Balkans right now. Best of luck in the west!

Hello France! 1901 was a great success. I see the F BRE build - I assume that's heading to MAO or perhaps to help against Italy/Germany? I'd love to reaffirm our DMZ in the English Channel. I'm currently looking at putting pressure on Germany or Russia. Would you be interested in a joint campaign against Germany? We could coordinate around the Low Countries.

Hello Germany! 1901 went exactly as planned, thank you for the smooth cooperation. I noticed France built F BRE and A PAR, which looks a bit threatening to both of us. I'm very interested in a joint campaign against France if you are. We could use my position in Belgium and your armies to crack them open. What do you think?

Hello Russia! I'm glad our northern arrangement worked out perfectly. I see things are heating up for you in the south with Turkey. I plan to keep things peaceful in Scandinavia so you can focus your attention there. Let me know how things are going!

Hello Turkey! I see you're engaging with Russia in the south. I'm currently positioning my new fleets and might be able to start applying pressure on Russia in the north later this year or next. Let's keep coordinating!

Hello Italy! Just checking in on your plans for 1902. It looks like France might be heading your way with their fleets, or perhaps they are looking at me. Let me know if you'd like to coordinate anything!
Hello Austria! Hope things are going well. Looks like a busy board in the east. Let me know if there's anything I can do diplomatically to help your position.

Hello England, I'm thrilled our joint operation in Belgium succeeded perfectly! It's great to have a solid alliance in the West. I see you built two fleets in Edinburgh and London. Are you planning to push against Germany or head towards Scandinavia/Russia? I have my armies in Paris and Picardy ready to assist if we want to put pressure on Germany. Let me know your thoughts for this Spring so we can coordinate our moves.

Greetings Germany, I hope you're doing well. I'm very pleased that the West remains peaceful and that we've respected our DMZs. I plan to keep Burgundy empty again this year and focus my units elsewhere. I did notice England's double fleet build, which might be a concern for you or Russia. Let me know if you want to coordinate or if you have any thoughts on England's intentions.

Hello Italy, congratulations on securing Tunis! I'm glad to see our DMZs holding strong. I'll be keeping my units away from our borders again this year to maintain our peaceful relationship. Good luck with your eastern campaign! Let me know if you need any diplomatic support or if there's any way we can coordinate.

Greetings Russia, I see you're holding strong in the East despite the conflict. I wanted to check in and see how things are going on your end. I noticed England built two fleets, which might be heading towards Scandinavia. I'm maintaining my alliance with England for now, but I wanted to keep the lines of communication open with you. Let me know if you have any insights or plans you'd like to share.

Hi France, I noticed your support for England into Belgium. While I respect your diplomatic maneuvering, England's build of two fleets (now 4 total) is quite concerning. Usually, an England with that many fleets eventually turns on France once they run out of room. I'd love to keep our Burgundy DMZ intact and work together. What are your thoughts on England's builds?

Hi England, congrats on Belgium! I see you built two fleets. With France's support in Belgium, it seems you have a solid arrangement. I'm hoping we can continue our friendly relations. Are those fleets heading towards Scandinavia to deal with Russia? I'd be happy to support you against Russia or France, depending on your goals. Let me know how we can cooperate.

Hi Russia, congrats on a great 1901! As promised, I stayed out of Sweden. I am quite concerned about England and France working together in Belgium, especially with England building two new fleets. They might be eyeing Scandinavia next. Would you be open to an alliance to counter England? We could coordinate in the North.

Hi Italy, congrats on Tunis! I wanted to give you a heads up that France and England seem to be working closely together (France supported England into Belgium). With France secure in the North, they might look towards the Mediterranean soon. If you're considering moving against France, I would be happy to coordinate and put pressure on them from my side.

Hi Austria, congrats on your builds! I'm very happy with our continued DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia. I'm currently keeping an eye on a potential Anglo-French alliance in the West. How are things looking for you in the East? Let me know if you need any diplomatic support.

Hi Turkey, it looks like Russia had a very strong 1901. I'm dealing with a potential Anglo-French alliance in the West, but I'm keeping an eye on the East. Let me know if you need any coordination against Russia.

Greetings Austria! The Lepanto is proceeding perfectly. I am moving F ION - EAS and F NAP - ION this turn to prepare for the convoy. How are you planning to pressure Turkey? Perhaps F GRE - AEG or A SER - BUL? Let me know your thoughts.

Hello Russia, I see Turkey tried to force Romania last turn. I am executing the Lepanto and moving my fleets to EAS and ION this turn to pressure Turkey from the south and prepare a convoy. Let's crush them together! Keep up the pressure on Bulgaria and the Black Sea.

Hello Turkey, I hope things are going well. I'm a bit worried about France's growth, so I'm moving F NAP - TYS to secure my western flank. I'll be keeping F ION back as well and staying out of the East Med as promised. Best of luck against Russia!
Hello France, congratulations on a successful 1901. I intend to continue our DMZ in Piedmont, GoL, and TYS. I am heading east to deal with Turkey. Best of luck with your campaigns!
Hello Germany, I plan to continue our DMZ in Tyrolia and keep my units focused eastward. Best of luck in the west!

Friend, excellent work last year! Turkey is boxed in. For this Spring, I can support your A SER into BUL using F RUM. Alternatively, I can attack BLA to cut any support. I'm also moving my armies (UKR, WAR, MOS) south to overwhelm them. What are your orders for SER and GRE?

Great job on the Lepanto! Are you planning to move F ION to East Med or Aegean this Spring? Austria and I are pushing into Bulgaria and the Black Sea. If you can pressure Turkey's fleets, they will collapse quickly.

Greetings Germany! I'm keeping my word - my new armies in Warsaw and Moscow are heading south to fight Turkey. F SWE will hold. I hope we can continue our peaceful and profitable relationship in the north.
Greetings England! I'm keeping my word - F SWE will not interfere with your operations, and my new armies are heading south to fight Turkey. Best of luck in your western campaigns!

Turkey, we got off on the wrong foot. I am willing to call a truce if you withdraw F BLA to ANK and A BUL to CON. Otherwise, you will face the combined might of Russia, Austria, and Italy. The choice is yours.

Greetings my friend! The Spring phase is upon us. Russia is heavily defending Rumania, but together we can break them. If you support my attack on Rumania (A BUL - RUM) with your armies in Serbia and Budapest, we will have 4 strength against their maximum of 3. Alternatively, I can support your attack on Rumania if you prefer to take it. What are your thoughts? Also, I'll be moving F SMY to CON to get it into the fight against Russia. Let's crush them this year!

Hello Italy, congratulations on securing Tunis! I just wanted to touch base and reaffirm our Eastern Med DMZ. I'll be moving my new fleet in Smyrna to Constantinople to reinforce the Black Sea against Russia. The Eastern Med remains completely demilitarized on my end. Wishing you the best of luck this year!

Greetings England! Excellent work securing Norway and Belgium. Russia is completely distracted in the south, pouring all their units into defending Rumania and Sevastopol. This leaves St. Petersburg and Sweden very vulnerable to you. I'll keep the pressure on them down here so you can advance in the north!

Greetings Germany! Well played in 1901. Russia is entirely focused on the south right now, defending against a joint Austro-Turkish push. Their northern flank is exposed. If you're looking to expand towards Warsaw or Sweden, you won't find a better opportunity. Let me know your thoughts!

Excellent! F ION - EAS and F NAP - ION is the perfect move. I will order F GRE - AEG and F TRI - ALB to get my fleets into position. I will also order A SER - BUL to put immediate pressure on Turkey. Turkey thinks I am supporting them into Rumania, so they will likely order A BUL - RUM, leaving Bulgaria wide open for me to walk in or at least disrupt them. Let's spring the trap!

Hello friend! Turkey just messaged me asking for support into Rumania (A BUL - RUM). I am going to tell them I agree, which means they will definitely order A BUL - RUM. You should heavily defend RUM (using SEV and UKR). I will order A SER - BUL. Since they are attacking RUM, my attack on BUL will either slip in if they somehow vacate, or it will just bounce, but it ensures they are pressured. I am also moving F GRE - AEG to get behind them. Let's crush them!

My friend, this is a brilliant plan. I will order A SER S A BUL - RUM and A BUD S A BUL - RUM. With my 2 supports and your F BLA support, we will easily crush their defense. I am also going to order F GRE - ION to bounce Italy, as I suspect they might try to move F NAP - ION. My new F TRI will move to ALB to back up Greece. Let's break Russia this year!

Thanks Germany! The East is looking good. Turkey and Russia are at each other's throats, and I'm playing them off one another. I'll keep our DMZs solid. Let me know if the West gets too chaotic and you need any strategic input!
Thanks England! The East is definitely a powder keg right now, but I'm managing to stay out of the direct line of fire while Russia and Turkey clash. Keep me posted on how the West develops!

Hi Germany! Yes, my fleets are heading north to capitalize on Russia's distraction in the south. I'm a bit concerned about France's F BRE and A PAR builds though. I'd love to work together against France. If you can put pressure on Burgundy or keep them busy, I can hold Belgium and prepare to swing my fleets south once the north is secure. Let's keep our borders (BEL/HOL) peaceful. What are your thoughts on moving against France?

Hello France! I'm definitely interested in a joint campaign against Germany. With your new builds, we have a lot of power. To keep our trust strong, let's reaffirm the English Channel DMZ - where is F BRE heading? MAO? For Germany, I can use A BEL to pressure RUH or HOL. What are your exact move ideas for Spring?

Greetings Russia! Thank you for the reassurance. I'll be moving my fleets around the Norwegian Sea and Barents to secure my perimeter, but I wish you the best of luck against Turkey in the south. Let's keep the north peaceful.

Hello Turkey! You are absolutely right. Russia's focus on the south gives me a great opportunity. I am moving my fleets north this Spring to prepare an attack on St. Petersburg. Keep hitting them hard!

Hello England! Yes, 1901 was fantastic. I am absolutely on board with reaffirming our DMZ in the English Channel. My F BRE is indeed heading down to MAO to eventually make its way toward the Mediterranean, keeping our northern waters clear. I am very interested in a joint campaign against Germany. With your fleets and my armies, we can put immense pressure on them. How would you like to coordinate around the Low Countries this Spring? I can move A PAR to BUR to start applying pressure on Munich/Ruhr, while keeping A PIC ready to assist Belgium.

Hi Germany, thanks for reaching out. You make a very fair point about England's fleet builds—it is definitely something I am keeping a close eye on. For now, I had to play nice to secure my own borders, but I am wary of their long-term intentions. I am fully committed to keeping our Burgundy DMZ intact this year. Let's keep communicating as the year progresses; if England becomes too aggressive, we may need to work together to contain them. I will be moving my units south and west.

Hello Italy, thank you! I am very glad to hear that. I fully intend to continue our DMZs in Piedmont, the Gulf of Lyon, and the Tyrrhenian Sea. I'll be moving my units toward the west/north to stay out of your way. Best of luck with your campaign against Turkey! Let me know if you ever need me to exert some diplomatic pressure elsewhere.

Greetings Austria! Thank you for the check-in. I'm glad to hear you're making progress in the Balkans. The West is relatively peaceful for now, but tensions are brewing. Let me know if you need any diplomatic assistance from my end. Best of luck!
Hi Italy, sounds like a plan. I will keep Tyrolia clear as well. Best of luck with your eastern campaigns!
Hello Russia, thank you for the update. I am perfectly happy to keep the north peaceful and profitable. I have my hands full dealing with the western powers right now. Good luck in the south!

Greetings Turkey, thanks for the heads up! I am currently bogged down trying to navigate the Anglo-French dynamic in the west, but if an opportunity arises to grab Sweden or put pressure on Warsaw, I will definitely consider it. Good luck with your push against Russia!

Hi England, I am definitely interested in a joint campaign against France. With your fleets and my armies, we can make quick work of them. What are your thoughts on moves for this Spring? I can move A MUN to BUR to get things started. Where are your fleets heading?

Hi France, I completely agree. England's 4 fleets are a massive concern. I will absolutely keep Burgundy empty. Do you plan to move F BRE to the English Channel to block them? I think we need to be prepared for an English naval assault.

Thanks for the heads up, Germany! I've noticed the Anglo-French cooperation as well. For now, I am committed to a campaign in the East against Turkey, but I am keeping a very close eye on my western flank. If France starts shifting units south, I will absolutely take you up on that offer to coordinate against them.
Hello Russia! Yes, the plan is F ION - EAS and F NAP - ION this Spring. With you and Austria pressing from the north, Turkey won't be able to defend against my fleets in the south. Let's crush them!

Hello Turkey, thanks for the update! Germany actually just warned me about France and England working together, so I am definitely moving F NAP to TYS to guard my western flank. F ION will hold. The East Med DMZ remains secure. Good luck with Russia!

Hello England! Thanks for the warning. I'm currently focused on dealing with Turkey in the East, but I'm keeping a close eye on France. If they start moving fleets into the Mediterranean, I'd be very interested in coordinating with you to keep them in check.

Greetings France! Thank you for the heads up regarding England's fleet builds. I am indeed a bit concerned they might head towards Scandinavia, though England has assured me of peace. I would greatly appreciate any intelligence you can share if you see them moving North. Good luck with your own campaigns, and let's definitely keep in touch!

Hello again Germany. Apologies for my previous hasty message! You make a very good point about England. Building two fleets (EDI and LON) is definitely alarming, especially since I only have F SWE in the north. While my armies are tied up fighting Turkey, I am very open to coordinating against England if he moves aggressively. What are your plans for your fleets this Spring? If we work together, we can keep him contained.

Excellent news, Italy! A move to EAS will put immense pressure on Turkey. Austria and I are coordinating to hit Bulgaria and the Black Sea this Spring. With you coming from the south, the Sultan won't stand a chance. Let's keep the pressure up!

Thanks for the update, Germany. If England and France are teaming up, you might need to secure your eastern flank quickly or find a way to break their alliance. Russia is pouring everything into defending Rumania and Sevastopol against Austria and me. If you can slip into Warsaw or pressure Sweden, it would force Russia to split their forces, helping both of us. Let me know if you want to coordinate timing!

That sounds like a solid plan, Italy. France can definitely be a menace if left unchecked, so securing the Tyrrhenian Sea is a smart move. I confirm the East Med remains completely demilitarized on my end. I'm moving F SMY to CON to reinforce the Black Sea. Best of luck with your western campaign!

Russia, threats won't get us anywhere. I am well aware of the diplomatic landscape, and I know that Austria and Italy are not aligning with you. However, I am a pragmatist. If you are truly open to a truce, we need a mutually beneficial arrangement, not just me retreating and leaving myself vulnerable. What are you willing to offer in exchange for peace?

Austria, Russia just messaged me claiming that you and Italy are teaming up with them against me! I assume this is a desperate bluff on their part to sow discord between us. Let's stick to our plan and crush them. Let me know if you prefer to take RUM or support me into it this Spring.

My friend, Russia is absolutely terrified and grasping at straws! They know they are dead if we work together, so they are trying to drive a wedge between us. Don't listen to their lies. Let's stick to the plan: I will order A SER S A BUL - RUM and A BUD S A BUL - RUM. With your F BLA supporting, that's 4 strength. They can't hold it. I'm also moving F GRE - ION to bounce Italy, and F TRI - ALB. Let's crush Russia!

Thank you, France! I appreciate the good relations. The East is a bit of a mess with Russia and Turkey fighting, but I'm staying secure. How are things looking between you, England, and Germany? Any brewing conflicts I should be aware of? Let me know if I can ever return the favor of diplomatic support.

Hello France! A PAR to BUR is a great move to start our campaign. If you can also use A PIC to pressure RUH or support me if Germany gets aggressive, that would be perfect. I am moving my fleets north (F EDI to NWG, F LON to NTH, F NTH to SKA) to prepare for a campaign against Russia, as Turkey has them distracted. I will hold BEL to anchor our line against Germany. Let's keep the Channel clear and hit them hard!

Hi Germany! A MUN to BUR is a fantastic idea to pressure France. If you can also use A RUH to support that or attack PIC, it will keep them on their toes. I am moving my fleets north (F EDI to NWG, F LON to NTH, F NTH to SKA) to attack Russia, as Turkey is keeping them busy. I will hold BEL to secure our border. Let's crush France!

Hello Italy! Good to hear from you. France told me they are moving F BRE to MAO, so they are definitely heading south towards the Mediterranean. Keep your guard up! I am heading north to deal with Russia, but I will keep an eye on France's northern flank.

Hello England! F BRE is indeed heading to MAO, and I am fully committed to keeping the English Channel DMZ. For Germany, I plan to move A PAR to BUR to start applying pressure. If you want to move A BEL to RUH, I can support that move with A PIC. Alternatively, if you want to move A BEL to HOL, A PIC can hold or move to BEL to backfill. What are your exact orders for A BEL and your fleets? Let's coordinate closely.

Hi Germany, I completely understand your concern. I am strongly considering moving F BRE to the English Channel to keep them honest, but I want to be careful not to provoke a full-scale war if his fleets are actually heading toward Russia. I will absolutely keep Burgundy empty as agreed so we have a secure border. Let's watch his Spring moves closely—if he positions aggressively against either of us, we can ally against him in the Fall.

Greetings Russia! England has told me they intend to pressure Germany, but with fleets in Edinburgh and London, a move toward the Norwegian Sea or Skagerrak seems very possible. I will keep my eyes open and let you know if they reveal any specific plans against Scandinavia. Best of luck in the East, and let's stay in touch!

Thanks Italy. I'll keep you posted on France's movements in the West. If they commit heavily against England or me, the Mediterranean and Piedmont might be wide open for you. Good luck with your eastern campaigns!

Hi Russia, I completely agree. England's 4 fleets are a massive threat to both of us. I plan to move my fleets to HEL and hold DEN to create a defensive line. If you hold SWE, we can block him from the Baltic and Scandinavia. Let's stand strong together against the English naval threat.

Hi Turkey, I appreciate the strategic advice! Right now, England's 4 fleets are forcing me to play defensively in the West. I can't afford to open a second front against Russia just yet, but if England and France turn on each other, I might have the breathing room to look East. Best of luck with your campaign!

Hi England, I'm on board. I will move A MUN to BUR to put pressure on France and get our campaign started. To make this work, we need to squeeze them at sea too—are you moving F LON to ENG? Let me know your exact moves so we can coordinate our strikes effectively.

Hi France, I am keeping my word: Burgundy will remain empty this Spring. Given England's 4 fleets, I strongly recommend you move F BRE to ENG to block them. If you can bounce them in the Channel, that would secure your north. I'll be shifting my fleets to HEL to prepare my own defenses against a potential English naval assault.
Thanks Germany! I appreciate the secure border. Good luck with your campaigns this year!
The plan is set! F ION - EAS and F NAP - ION are locked in. Let's squeeze the Sultan from all sides. Good luck with your attacks!
Thanks Turkey! I appreciate the transparency. Good luck holding off Russia, I'll be busy fortifying the west.
Orders are locked in: F ION - EAS, F NAP - ION. Good luck with your moves to AEG, ALB, and BUL! Let's crush them.

Germany, glad we are on the same page. I will keep my units focused south and leave Sweden holding. Let me know if England starts causing trouble in Scandinavia or the North Sea, and we can coordinate a response. Best of luck in the west!

Italy, that sounds like a perfect plan. Austria is moving on Bulgaria and the Aegean, and I am bringing my armies down to overwhelm the Black Sea and Armenia. Turkey is completely surrounded. Let's finish this quickly!

Turkey, I appreciate your pragmatism. The truth is, I am growing concerned about Austria's rapid expansion and their control of the Balkans. If you are willing to move F BLA to CON or ANK, I will move my armies towards Galicia and we can coordinate against Austria. I can even support you into Serbia or Greece in the Fall if we establish trust now. Let me know if this interests you.

Austria, excellent intelligence! I will heavily defend RUM as you suggested. Your moves to BUL and AEG are perfect. I'm moving my new armies south to bring overwhelming force. I'm also feeding Turkey a fake story about wanting to ally against you to keep them off balance. Onward to victory!

Excellent news, England! With Russia's forces entirely tied up defending Rumania and Sevastopol against the combined Austro-Turkish assault, St. Petersburg should be ripe for the taking. I will ensure they cannot spare a single unit to send north. Best of luck with your naval campaign!

Understood, Germany. An Anglo-French alliance is definitely a major threat that needs your full attention. If you can spare even a single unit to feint towards Warsaw or Silesia, it would cause panic in Moscow and help us both. Regardless, I'll keep the pressure on Russia in the south. Good luck defending the Fatherland!

Thanks for the confirmation, Italy. Moving to TYS is a very wise precaution against a potential French naval threat. I am ordering F SMY - CON as planned, keeping the East Med completely clear. Best of luck securing your western waters!

My friend, I have some valuable intelligence. Italy has confirmed to me that they are moving F NAP to TYS to defend against a growing French threat, and they plan to simply hold F ION. If you move F GRE - ION, it will bounce their hold and might unnecessarily provoke them into a conflict while we are busy with Russia. Perhaps F GRE could hold or support? 

Regardless, I am locking in our plan: A BUL - RUM supported by your A SER and A BUD, with my F BLA also supporting. I will move F SMY - CON and A CON - BUL to reinforce the front. Let's crush them!

My friend, your deception is masterful! Turkey just told me you confided in them that you are moving NAP-TYS and holding ION. They bought it completely. I am locking in F GRE - AEG, F TRI - ALB, and A SER - BUL. Turkey is ordering A BUL - RUM and A CON - BUL, so my attack on BUL will perfectly disrupt their reinforcements while they fail to take Rumania. Let's sail to victory!

My friend, Turkey has completely taken the bait. They just confirmed their exact orders to me: A BUL - RUM, F BLA S A BUL - RUM, A CON - BUL, and F SMY - CON. Defend RUM with everything you have! I am locking in A SER - BUL and F GRE - AEG. Since they are vacating BUL, my attack will clash with their A CON - BUL, completely ruining their logistics and keeping them out of the Balkans. Give them hell!

Thank you for the warning about Italy! You are absolutely right, there is no need to provoke them if they are just holding and looking West. I will order F GRE to hold instead so we don't cause any unnecessary alarm. I am locking in A SER S A BUL - RUM and A BUD S A BUL - RUM. With your F BLA support, Russia's defenses will shatter. Let's break them this Spring!

Hello France! I think holding A BEL is the safest play for now while my fleets move north (F EDI - NWG, F LON - NTH, F NTH - SKA). If you move A PAR - BUR, that will be a great opening move against Germany. Perhaps A PIC could support A PAR - BUR or hold? I don't want to risk losing Belgium by moving to Ruhr just yet, as I want to make sure Germany doesn't try to sneak into it. Let's see how Germany reacts to your Burgundy move!

Hi Germany! I think moving F LON to ENG right now might spook France too early and cause them to defend instead of moving A PAR away. I am moving F LON to NTH, F EDI to NWG, and F NTH to SKA to prepare for Russia. Let's have you move A MUN to BUR to catch France off guard. I will hold A BEL to keep our border secure and act as a wall. Once France is engaged with you, I can swing my fleets south!

Hello Turkey! The plan is in motion. I am moving my fleets to the Barents Sea, Norwegian Sea, and Skagerrak to completely surround St. Petersburg and Sweden. Keep hitting them hard in the south so they can't build in the north!

Hello Russia! Just to keep you in the loop, I am shuffling my fleets around (NWG, SKA) to ensure Germany doesn't try anything sneaky in the North Sea. I'll be keeping my distance from St. Petersburg, so you can focus entirely on Turkey. Best of luck!

Hello Austria! The West is currently peaceful, but England's build of two new fleets (giving them 4 total) has Germany and me on high alert. England claims they are heading North to attack Russia, but we are watching closely. I'll keep you posted if the situation explodes. Best of luck in the Balkans!

Hello England! That sounds like a solid plan. I will order A PAR to BUR and use A PIC to support your hold in BEL. F BRE will head to MAO, keeping the Channel clear as agreed. Best of luck with your naval maneuvers up North! Let's squeeze Germany.

Hi Germany, I agree completely. England's 4 fleets are a massive red flag. I will take your advice and order F BRE to ENG to bounce any sneaky moves he might try. I will also honor our agreement and keep Burgundy empty this Spring. Let's coordinate closely in the Fall once we see where his fleets actually end up.
Thanks Italy! Wishing you the best of luck in the East. I'll keep you posted if I see France shifting units south.
Thanks Russia. I'll be positioning my fleets defensively (F KIE - HEL, F DEN Hold) to form a wall against England. If he moves into Scandinavia, we can coordinate to push him back in the Fall.
Thanks Turkey. I'll see if I can spare a unit to feint towards Silesia, but I have to be very careful not to overextend while England and France are allied. Give them hell in the south!
Hi England, just checking in on your fleet moves. Are you still heading north, or can you spare a fleet for ENG to help squeeze France? I'm moving A MUN - BUR as discussed.
Hi France, just confirming my orders are in to keep Burgundy empty and shift my fleets defensively. Hoping you're able to cover ENG!
Thanks Germany! I'll keep my eyes peeled. If France leaves themselves open, I might just have to take advantage later on. Good luck in the West!
Excellent! The trap is set. F ION - EAS and F NAP - ION are locked in. Turkey won't know what hit them. Good luck with your moves!
Perfect. F NAP - TYS and F ION H are locked in. Give Russia hell!
Orders are locked: F ION - EAS, F NAP - ION. Let's catch Turkey completely off guard. Good luck with AEG and BUL!

Thank you for the valuable intelligence, France! I will keep a close eye on Scandinavia. If England does move aggressively into the Norwegian Sea or Skagerrak, I may need to ask for your help in keeping him occupied. Best of luck with your own campaigns, and please keep me updated!

Germany, agreed. I will order F SWE to hold this Spring to maintain our defensive line. If England moves to SKA or NWG, we will be in a strong position to coordinate a response in the Fall. Let's stand strong together.

Excellent! With your fleets moving to EAS and ION, Turkey is doomed. Austria is moving to AEG and BUL, and I am bringing overwhelming force to the Black Sea and Armenia. The Sultan won't know what hit him. Good luck!

Austria, my friend! Just confirming our plans: I will heavily defend RUM and push my new armies south to prepare for a massive strike. Italy confirmed they are moving to EAS and ION this Spring. Turkey is completely surrounded. Good luck with SER-BUL and GRE-AEG!

Hello England, just checking in. I plan to hold F SWE this Spring and focus entirely on my war with Turkey in the south. I hope your new fleets are heading towards the Atlantic or the Channel! Let's continue to keep the north peaceful and profitable for both of us.

Understood, Germany. Defending your homeland is the top priority. I'll keep Russia fully occupied in the East so they can't bother you. Let me know if the situation in the West changes or if you need any diplomatic help!
Thanks Italy! I appreciate the transparency. F SMY is heading to CON, so the East Med is completely clear. Best of luck fortifying the West!

Russia, I am willing to take this risk if it means stopping Austria from dominating the Balkans. I will order F BLA - ANK and A BUL H this Spring. In return, I need to see you move A UKR - GAL and shift your forces away from my borders to prove your commitment. If you do this, we can coordinate against Serbia or Greece in the Fall. Let me know if we have a deal.

Austria, Russia is desperately trying to turn me against you. They offered to support me into Serbia or Greece if I retreat from the Black Sea! I'm telling them I agree and asking them to move A UKR - GAL to 'prove their commitment'. Hopefully, this tricks them into abandoning RUM's defense. I am 100% locked in on our plan: A BUL - RUM supported by your SER and BUD, and my BLA. F SMY - CON and A CON - BUL as well. Let's destroy them!

Perfect! I am locked in as well: F GRE - AEG, F TRI - ALB, and A SER - BUL. Turkey is completely oblivious and thinks I am supporting them into Rumania. The Lepanto is about to strike hard. Good luck with your fleet movements!

My friend, Turkey just boasted to me that they asked you to move A UKR - GAL to 'prove your commitment' to a fake alliance against me! I assume you are ignoring this and keeping Galicia empty as we agreed? I am fully locked in on A SER - BUL and F GRE - AEG. Turkey is ordering A BUL - RUM, so my attack on BUL will perfectly disrupt them. Hold the line in RUM!

Haha, that is absolutely brilliant! If they actually move UKR - GAL, they will be completely out of position to defend RUM, and we will walk right in. I am 100% locked in on our plan: A SER S A BUL - RUM, A BUD S A BUL - RUM, F GRE H, and F TRI - ALB. Let's shatter their defenses this Spring!
Hello Germany, just a quick message to confirm that my new A VIE will not be heading towards Bohemia or Tyrolia. Our DMZs remain rock solid. Best of luck with your Spring maneuvers!

Hello France! Excellent, the plan is set. I will hold A BEL and rely on your support from A PIC. I'm moving my fleets north to prepare for a campaign against Russia. Best of luck with your move to Burgundy! Let's see how Germany responds.

Hi Germany! I am still heading north to capitalize on Russia's distraction. I can't spare a fleet for ENG just yet without spooking France, but my hold in BEL will keep their A PIC tied down. Best of luck with A MUN - BUR! Once you have them engaged, I'll be in a great position to pivot.

Hello Russia! Good to hear. I am just shuffling my fleets around the North Sea and Norwegian Sea to ensure my home centers are secure from any western aggression. I have no intention of moving against Sweden or St. Petersburg. Best of luck in the south!

Hello England! That sounds perfect. I will order A PAR - BUR and A PIC will hold to support our lines. F BRE is heading to MAO as agreed. Best of luck with your northern expansion, let's catch Germany off guard!

Hi Germany, I am fully on board. I am ordering F BRE to ENG to secure the Channel and keep England in check. I will also keep Burgundy empty as promised (my armies are shifting towards Picardy to prepare for a push on Belgium). Let's coordinate our Fall moves once we see where his fleets land!

Hello Russia, I have critical intelligence: England has explicitly told me his orders are F EDI - NWG, F LON - NTH, and F NTH - SKA. He is making a massive push toward Scandinavia. To help you, I am breaking my DMZ with him and moving my fleet into the English Channel to threaten his home centers and force him to turn around. Prepare your defenses in the North!
Hello Italy, just confirming that my units are heading West and North. Our DMZs in Piedmont, GoL, and TYS remain fully intact. Best of luck with your eastern campaign!
Thanks Italy! I'll definitely keep you posted. If France moves F BRE to ENG and A PAR north as I suspect, his south will be completely exposed. Keep an eye on Marseilles and Piedmont!
Thanks Russia. I am moving F KIE to HEL and holding F DEN. If England moves to SKA, we will be ready to deal with him in the Fall. Good luck in the south!
Thanks Turkey! I appreciate the support. I'll do my best to hold the line here. Give Russia hell!
Hi England, just confirming our moves: I am ordering A MUN - BUR and A RUH S A MUN - BUR. I'm glad you're holding BEL and moving your fleets north. Let's catch France completely off guard!
Hi France, just confirming my orders are locked in: A MUN and A RUH are holding/shifting defensively, and F KIE is heading to HEL. BUR will remain empty. Good luck bouncing England in the Channel!
Thanks Germany! I appreciate the intel. Let's keep our DMZ in Tyrolia solid. Good luck with your moves this Spring!
The trap is fully set! F ION - EAS and F NAP - ION are locked in. Turkey still thinks I'm moving against France. Let's crush them this year. Good luck with your attacks!
Thanks Turkey! F NAP - TYS and F ION H are locked in. Give Russia hell in the Black Sea! Let me know how the northern front goes.

Everything is locked in on my end: F ION - EAS and F NAP - ION. Turkey just messaged me confirming they are moving F SMY - CON and leaving the East Med clear. They have no idea what's coming. Let's sail to victory!

Understood, Germany. I will hold F SWE and keep a close watch on the Norwegian Sea and Skagerrak. If England pushes into Scandinavia, we will coordinate our response in the Fall. Best of luck with your defensive line!
Perfect! With your fleets in EAS and ION, Turkey's naval defense will crumble. Austria and I are hitting them hard from the north. Let's sink the Sultan!

Turkey, we have a deal. I will order A UKR - GAL and A SEV - UKR this Spring to shift my forces westward against Austria. I trust you will follow through with F BLA - ANK and A BUL H. Let's turn the tables on Austria.

Austria, Turkey just messaged me claiming they will order F BLA - ANK and A BUL H, asking me to move A UKR - GAL in return! They are layering lies upon lies. I told them I agreed, just to keep them confident in their attack on RUM. I am locking in my heavy defense of RUM. Give them hell in Bulgaria!
Hello England, just confirming that F SWE will hold this Spring. I am fully committed to my southern campaign against Turkey. Wishing you the best in your endeavors!

Excellent news, England! Austria and I are launching a massive coordinated strike on Rumania this Spring that Russia cannot mathematically defend. With their forces crumbling in the south, St. Petersburg and Sweden will be yours for the taking. Best of luck with your naval maneuvers!

Understood, Germany. Just a heads up, England has informed me they are sending fleets to the Barents, Norwegian Sea, and Skagerrak to attack Russia. This might mean they are less focused on you than you think! Regardless, Austria and I are crushing Russia in Rumania this Spring. Good luck!
Excellent. F SMY - CON is locked in on my end. The East Med remains completely clear. Best of luck securing your western flank!

My friend, everything is locked in. A BUL - RUM supported by your A SER and A BUD, and my F BLA. I am also moving F SMY - CON and A CON - BUL. I have continued the ruse with Russia, promising to retreat F BLA to ANK. Hopefully, they fall for it and move A UKR - GAL, making our attack even more devastating. Let's crush them!

Russia, we have a deal. I am ordering F BLA - ANK and A BUL H this Spring. I expect to see A UKR - GAL and your forces shifting away from my borders. If you hold up your end, we will coordinate against Austria in the Fall. Good luck.

goals: Execute the Lepanto alliance with Italy to crush Turkey
Position fleets in AEG and ALB for Fall attacks
Maintain peaceful borders with Russia and Germany via DMZs
Disrupt Turkish movements in the Balkans
full_private_diary:
[S1901M] Agreed to a Lepanto alliance with Italy, including DMZs in Tyrolia, Venice, Trieste, and the Adriatic. Italy is moving NAP-ION, ROM-APU, and holding VEN. Agreed to a Galicia DMZ with Russia, who claims to be moving WAR-UKR. Agreed to DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia with Germany. Feigned an alliance with Turkey, who is moving CON-BUL and attempting to sneak F ANK-BLA by tricking Russia into a DMZ. Shared intel with France and England to build goodwill.
Intent: Execute the Austrian half of the Lepanto opening while maintaining the illusion of an Austro-Turkish alliance. Order F TRI - ALB, A BUD - SER, and A VIE - BUD. Honor all agreed DMZs (Galicia, Tyrolia, Bohemia, Venice, Trieste, Adriatic).

[S1901M] The Spring 1901 phase went perfectly according to plan. Italy executed their half of the Lepanto flawlessly (NAP-ION, ROM-APU, VEN Hold), confirming their trustworthiness as a solid ally. Russia honored the Galicia DMZ by moving WAR-UKR, and Germany respected our DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia. My own moves succeeded, securing Serbia and positioning F ALB and A BUD for Fall gains.

Interestingly, Turkey successfully snuck F ANK into the Black Sea. This means Russia was either tricked into a DMZ or outmaneuvered. This is excellent news for me, as a brewing Russo-Turkish conflict will keep both powers distracted while Italy and I continue the Lepanto. 

For the Fall, my priority is to secure Greece using F ALB and A SER, while ensuring Italy takes Tunis and prepares for the 1902 convoy. I must continue to maintain the illusion of an alliance with Turkey to keep them complacent until the trap springs.

[F1901M] The Lepanto alliance with Italy is proceeding perfectly; Italy will convoy APU to TUN via ION and hold VEN. I have successfully fostered a Russo-Turkish war by warning Russia of Turkey's planned attack on RUM (BUL-RUM supported by BLA). Russia is heavily supporting RUM to bounce the attack, while Turkey believes Russia is completely deceived. Germany and France remain friendly and neutral, with Germany confirming our DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia.
Intent: Order F ALB - GRE, A SER S F ALB - GRE, and A BUD H. This secures Greece for a build while maintaining defensive positions. Continue to feign alliance with Turkey while secretly coordinating with Italy and Russia to crush Turkey in 1902.

[F1901M] The Fall 1901 phase unfolded exactly as planned, cementing a dominant position for Austria. The Lepanto alliance with Italy proved completely reliable; Italy successfully convoyed to Tunis and held Venice, honoring our DMZs. Meanwhile, I secured Greece with support from Serbia, earning two crucial builds for the winter. 

My diplomatic maneuvering to ignite a Russo-Turkish war was a resounding success. Turkey committed fully to attacking Romania, but Russia, forewarned, heavily supported the defense and bounced the Turkish assault. Turkey is now bogged down in a futile conflict with Russia, completely blind to the impending Austro-Italian strike. 

With two builds incoming, I will likely construct F Trieste to support the Lepanto and A Vienna to reinforce the Balkans or defend against any unexpected northern aggression. Italy remains highly trustworthy, and Russia is proving to be a useful anvil against the Turkish hammer. The trap is set for 1902.

[S1902M] Italy is executing the Lepanto by moving F ION - EAS and F NAP - ION. Russia is heavily defending RUM against Turkey's expected attack. Turkey is completely deceived, believing I will support their A BUL - RUM attack with my A SER and A BUD, and that I will hold F GRE. I have coordinated with Italy and Russia to spring the trap on Turkey this phase. Germany confirmed our DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia.
Intent: Betray Turkey and execute the Austro-Italian strike. Order F GRE - AEG, F TRI - ALB, and A SER - BUL. A BUD and A VIE will hold to respect the Galicia DMZ with Russia and the Bohemia/Tyrolia DMZs with Germany. This will disrupt Turkey's logistics (clashing with their A CON - BUL or bouncing their A BUL) while positioning fleets for a Fall offensive.

[S1902M] Spring 1902 went exactly according to plan. The Lepanto alliance with Italy is executing flawlessly; Italy successfully moved fleets to the Eastern Mediterranean and Ionian Sea, while I positioned my fleets in the Aegean and Albania. 

Our deception of Turkey worked perfectly. Blind to our trap, Turkey wasted their phase attacking Romania, which Russia easily defended with heavy support. Meanwhile, my move from Serbia to Bulgaria successfully bounced Turkey's army from Constantinople, completely jamming their logistics and leaving their units disorganized. 

Russia and Germany continue to be reliable neighbors, respecting our agreed DMZs in Galicia, Bohemia, and Tyrolia. My defensive holds in Vienna and Budapest secured the north while we focus south. 

My strategic position is incredibly strong. For the Fall, I must coordinate with Italy to convoy their Tunis army into Turkish territory (Syria or Smyrna) while I leverage my Aegean fleet and Serbian army to crack Bulgaria or Constantinople. Turkey is surrounded and doomed.

goals: Position fleets (BAR, NWG, SKA, NTH) to guarantee the capture of St. Petersburg and/or Sweden in Fall 1902.
Maintain the DMZ in the English Channel.
Encourage a prolonged conflict between France and Germany to keep the western front distracted.
Hold Belgium securely as a defensive anchor.
full_private_diary:
[S1901M] France: Agreed to DMZ English Channel; France is moving F BRE to MAO. Germany: Agreed to split Low Countries (England gets Belgium, Germany gets Holland) and respect claims to Norway/Denmark; Germany shared opening moves (F KIE-DEN, A BER-KIE, A MUN-RUH). Russia: Agreed to a northern non-aggression pact (England takes Norway, Russia takes Sweden); Russia moving F STP/SC to BOT. Italy, Austria, Turkey: Established friendly communications, with Turkey and Austria agreeing to keep Russia busy in the south.
Intent: Execute the agreed-upon northern opening: F EDI - NWG, F LON - NTH, A LVP - YOR. This honors the ENG DMZ with France, sets up for Norway and Belgium as discussed with Germany, and respects the Scandinavian split with Russia.

[S1901M] Spring 1901 went perfectly according to plan, with all neighbors honoring our agreements. The English Channel remains a DMZ, as France moved to MAO and PIC. Germany executed their exact shared moves (DEN, KIE, RUH), setting up our agreed split of the Low Countries where I will take Belgium and they take Holland. Russia moved to the Gulf of Bothnia, respecting our Scandinavian arrangement and leaving Norway uncontested for my fleet in the Norwegian Sea.

My strategic position is incredibly strong. I am perfectly positioned to secure both Norway (via F NWG) and Belgium (convoying A YOR via F NTH) this Fall. Trust with France, Germany, and Russia is currently high. My immediate goal is to secure these two builds and observe the Fall moves to decide whether to ally with Germany against France, France against Germany, or push against Russia in Scandinavia.

[F1901M] France agreed to support my convoy to Belgium (A PIC S A YOR - BEL) and confirmed their orders. Germany confirmed they will take Holland (A KIE - HOL, A RUH S A KIE - HOL) and leave Belgium to me. Russia confirmed they will take Sweden and leave Norway to me. Turkey is eager to coordinate a crossfire on Russia in 1902, which I agreed to consider. Italy was a friendly check-in.
Intent: Execute the agreed-upon moves to secure two builds: F NWG - NWY, F NTH C A YOR - BEL, and A YOR - BEL. Rely on French support (A PIC S A YOR - BEL) to guarantee Belgium.

[F1901M] Fall 1901 went flawlessly. France, Germany, and Russia all honored our agreements to the letter. France provided the promised support for my convoy into Belgium, Germany took Holland while respecting my claim to Belgium, and Russia took Sweden while leaving Norway to me. I successfully secured both target supply centers and will have two builds this winter.

My strategic position is exceptional, and trust with my immediate neighbors is currently very high. The English Channel remains clear. In the east, Turkey and Russia are already clashing over Romania, which keeps Russia distracted and fulfills Turkey's promise to apply pressure.

With two builds incoming, I must now decide my mid-term direction. I can ally with Germany against France, ally with France against Germany, or launch a northern campaign against Russia while they are occupied in the south. I will use the Winter build phase to position my new units and solidify my next alliance.

[S1902M] Successfully orchestrated a clash between France and Germany over Burgundy (France ordered A PAR - BUR; Germany ordered A MUN - BUR supported by A RUH). Reaffirmed the English Channel DMZ with France (F BRE moving to MAO). Convinced Russia of peaceful intentions in Scandinavia while secretly coordinating with Turkey to launch a massive northern offensive against St. Petersburg and Sweden, capitalizing on Russia's southern distraction.
Intent: Execute the northern fleet maneuver to surround Russia: F NWY - BAR, F EDI - NWG, F NTH - SKA, and F LON - NTH. Hold A BEL to maintain a secure border and anchor the line while France and Germany clash in Burgundy.

[S1902M] France has completely betrayed our trust, breaking the English Channel DMZ with F BRE - ENG and launching an unprovoked attack on Belgium (A PIC - BEL). Fortunately, my hold in Belgium bounced their attack, but the western front is now highly volatile and my home centers are threatened. 

In the north, my fleet maneuvers executed flawlessly, positioning me in BAR, NWG, SKA, and NTH. However, Russia anticipated the aggression, reinforcing St. Petersburg (A MOS - STP) and Livonia. 

With France turning hostile, my strategic priorities must shift immediately. I must ally closely with Germany, who successfully forced Burgundy and is now in a prime position to pressure France from the east. I need to secure my home centers against the French fleet in the Channel while deciding whether to press the attack on Russia's St. Petersburg/Sweden or redirect northern fleets to crush France. Trust in France is permanently shattered.

goals: Secure the English Channel to cripple England's naval dominance
Maintain DMZs with Germany (Burgundy) and Italy (Piedmont, GoL, TYS)
Shift Iberian forces (Portugal/Spain) north to support the war against England
Capture Belgium from England
full_private_diary:
[S1901M] Successfully negotiated DMZs on all key borders: English Channel with England, Burgundy with Germany, and Piedmont/Gulf of Lyon/Tyrrhenian Sea with Italy. England confirmed F LON to NTH and F EDI to NWG. Austria confirmed Italy is focusing East. Russia expressed interest in an alliance against England/Germany. Turkey warned about Italy, but Austria's intel contradicts this.
Intent: Execute a standard peaceful opening to secure Iberia while respecting all agreed DMZs. F BRE to MAO, A MAR to SPA, and A PAR to PIC or GAS.

[S1901M] Spring 1901 went perfectly according to plan. All negotiated DMZs were strictly respected: England stayed out of the English Channel, Germany avoided Burgundy, and Italy kept clear of Piedmont, the Gulf of Lyon, and the Tyrrhenian Sea. Italy's moves (F NAP-ION, A ROM-APU, A VEN Hold) confirm their eastern focus, validating Austria's earlier intel and completely securing my southern flank. 

My opening (F MAO, A SPA, A PIC) positions me ideally for the Fall. I am guaranteed to secure both Spain and Portugal for two builds. Meanwhile, A PIC gives me a strong voice in the fate of Belgium. Germany's move to Ruhr and England's fleet in the North Sea mean Belgium will be heavily contested. My next step is to negotiate with England and Germany to either secure Belgium for myself or use my influence to cement a strong western alliance. Trust with my neighbors is currently high.

[F1901M] Successfully negotiated a cooperative Fall phase. Agreed to support England's convoy into Belgium (A PIC S A YOR - BEL) to cement a long-term alliance. Germany is taking Holland and respects the Belgium arrangement. Italy confirmed they are taking Tunis and holding Venice, maintaining our DMZs in PIE, GOL, and TYS. Austria and Russia confirmed Turkey stabbed Russia in the Black Sea; Austria is focusing on the Balkans.
Intent: Execute agreed-upon moves: F MAO - POR and A SPA Hold to secure two builds from Iberia. Order A PIC S A YOR - BEL to fulfill my promise to England and solidify our alliance.

[F1901M] [F1901M] The Fall phase unfolded exactly as planned, marking a resounding success for French diplomacy. I secured both Portugal and Spain, guaranteeing two builds. Crucially, my support for England's convoy into Belgium succeeded, cementing our alliance and building immense trust. Germany respected this arrangement by taking Holland, and Italy kept their word by taking Tunis while holding Venice, leaving our DMZs in Piedmont, the Gulf of Lyon, and the Tyrrhenian Sea completely intact. 

With the West entirely peaceful and my borders secure, my strategic position is incredibly strong. The successful collaboration with England opens the door for a joint campaign, potentially against Germany or Italy, depending on the upcoming builds. My immediate focus is to build a fleet in Brest and an army in Paris or Marseilles to capitalize on this momentum while maintaining the trust of my neighbors. The East remains embroiled in conflict, giving the Western powers a distinct advantage.

[S1902M] England believes we are allied and coordinating against Germany; they plan to move their fleets North (EDI-NWG, LON-NTH, NTH-SKA) and hold A BEL, expecting me to move A PAR-BUR and F BRE-MAO. However, I have agreed with Germany to keep Burgundy empty and move F BRE-ENG to counter England's 4 fleets. I also informed Russia of England's exact northern fleet movements and my intent to move to the Channel to relieve pressure on them. Italy and I reaffirmed our DMZs in PIE, GOL, and TYS.
Intent: Stab England. Order F BRE - ENG to take control of the Channel while England moves North. Keep Burgundy empty to maintain the alliance with Germany (order A PAR - PIC or GAS). Order A PIC - BEL to attempt to dislodge England's army, or hold to support a future attack. Move F POR - MAO and A SPA - GAS to bring Iberian forces north for the campaign against England.

[S1902M] The Spring 1902 phase brought both triumph and disaster. My stab against England was perfectly executed: they moved their fleets north as promised, allowing me to slip into the English Channel unopposed. However, this naval victory was immediately overshadowed by a blatant German betrayal. Despite our explicit agreement to keep Burgundy demilitarized, Germany forced their way into BUR with support from Ruhr. 

My strategic position is now highly precarious. By stabbing England and being stabbed by Germany simultaneously, I face a dangerous two-front war in the West. My attack on Belgium bounced, and my armies are now scrambling to adjust. 

Moving forward, I must prioritize defending Paris and Marseilles from the German army in Burgundy. I need to urgently open diplomatic channels to see if I can salvage a truce with either England or Germany, as fighting both will be disastrous. Fortunately, my Iberian forces (now in MAO and GAS) have successfully moved north and are well-positioned to assist in the defense.

Intent: Execute the agreed-upon opening: F KIE - DEN, A BER - KIE, A MUN - RUH. This respects all DMZs (Burgundy, Bohemia, Tyrolia, Prussia, Silesia) while setting up to secure Denmark and Holland in the Fall.

Intent: Execute the agreed-upon moves to secure my two builds: A KIE - HOL, A RUH S A KIE - HOL, and F DEN holds. This guarantees Holland and Denmark while honoring my agreements to let England take Belgium and Russia take Sweden, and maintaining all established DMZs.

[F1901M] Fall 1901 went exactly as planned for my own centers: I secured Holland and Denmark, guaranteeing two builds. All established DMZs with France, Austria, and Russia held firm, maintaining a peaceful perimeter. 

However, a major strategic threat has emerged: France actively supported England's convoy into Belgium. This strongly suggests an Anglo-French alliance, which is traditionally very dangerous for Germany. England and France both secured two builds, matching my growth, and their cooperation in the Low Countries is a red flag. 

Russia also secured two builds (Sweden and Romania) and successfully defended against a Turkish attack, making them the board leader at six centers. 

My immediate priority is to address the potential Anglo-French threat. I must use my two builds to prepare defenses in the west while actively negotiating to break up their alliance. I will reach out to Russia and Italy to form a counter-coalition, while probing England and France to see who might be willing to turn on the other.

[S1902M] Agreed with England to launch a surprise attack on France by moving into Burgundy, while England holds Belgium and sends fleets north against Russia. Confirmed DMZs with Austria (Bohemia/Tyrolia) and Italy (Tyrolia). Agreed with Russia to maintain a peaceful north (F DEN holds, F SWE holds). Turkey confirmed England's fleets are heading north to attack Russia.
Intent: Execute the surprise attack on France: A MUN - BUR supported by A RUH. Move F KIE - HEL to establish a naval presence and defend the coast. Hold F DEN as agreed with Russia. Hold A HOL to secure the border with Belgium.

[S1902M] The surprise attack on France was a resounding success! I successfully occupied Burgundy, catching France completely off guard. Even better, France attempted to attack Belgium, confirming the end of the Anglo-French alliance. England kept their word, holding Belgium and committing a massive fleet presence (NTH, NWG, BAR, SKA) to a northern campaign against Russia. 

My strategic position is now excellent. With armies in Burgundy, Ruhr, and Holland, I am perfectly positioned to dismantle France alongside England. However, I must remain vigilant: England's overwhelming naval presence in the north could easily pivot toward Denmark or Helgoland if our alliance sours. 

Moving into the Fall, my priority is to coordinate with England to secure French centers (Paris or Picardy) while ensuring my northern flank remains secure. I will maintain my friendly relations with Austria, Italy, and Russia to keep the east quiet while I focus on the western offensive.

Intent: Execute the standard Lepanto opening as agreed with Austria: F NAP - ION, A ROM - APU, and A VEN Hold. This respects the DMZs with Austria, France, and Germany while setting up for a Fall convoy to Tunis and future action against Turkey.

My next steps are to secure Tunis, build F NAP in the Winter, and prepare to move F ION to the Eastern Mediterranean in 1902 to pressure Turkey.

Intent: Execute the agreed Fall Lepanto moves: F ION C A APU - TUN, A APU - TUN, and A VEN Hold. This secures Tunis, respects all DMZs with France, Germany, and Austria, and perfectly sets up a Winter build of F NAP for the 1902 offensive against Turkey.

My borders with France and Germany remain secure, as both respected our DMZs while focusing on the west (France even supported England into Belgium). 

My strategic position is exceptional. I have secured my fourth center (Tunis) and will build F NAP this Winter. In 1902, I will move F ION to the Eastern Mediterranean and F NAP to ION, springing the Lepanto trap on a Turkey that is already bogged down fighting Russia.

I will use my builds to reinforce the southern front against Turkey, likely adding a fleet in Sevastopol to challenge the Black Sea, and an army to support the Austrian push.
