Austria and Italy successfully executed their naval maneuvers into the Aegean and Eastern Mediterranean, effectively bottling up Turkey. I will continue to trust and coordinate with them to dismantle the Turkish threat.

In the north, France's warning about England was entirely correct. England has launched a massive naval invasion, moving fleets to the Barents Sea, Norwegian Sea, and Skagerrak. St. Petersburg and Sweden are now under severe threat. Fortunately, my preemptive move of an army to St. Petersburg succeeded, providing crucial defense. France's move to the English Channel is a welcome distraction for England. 

My strategic priority must now balance surviving England's northern assault while maintaining the southern push. I need to coordinate with Germany to defend Scandinavia and encourage France's anti-English campaign.

goals: Secure Rumania with Austrian support and shatter Russia's southern defenses
Maintain strong alliance with Austria to dominate the Balkans and crush Russia
Maintain a demilitarized Eastern Mediterranean with Italy
Encourage English and German pressure on Russia's northern flank
Reinforce the front lines by moving F SMY to CON and A CON to BUL
full_private_diary:
[S1901M] Formed a strong alliance with Austria against Russia; Austria is opening BUD-SER and TRI-ALB. Successfully deceived Russia into agreeing to a Black Sea DMZ (they plan to move SEV-RUM), which I will violate to sneak into BLA. Agreed to an Eastern Mediterranean DMZ with Italy. Established friendly, intelligence-sharing relationships with Germany and England, both of whom are supportive of containing Russia.
Intent: Order F ANK - BLA (betraying the DMZ agreement with Russia), A CON - BUL, and A SMY - CON to follow up and support the Balkan push.

[S1901M] The Spring 1901 phase went exactly according to plan. My alliance with Austria proved solid, as they executed their promised Balkan opening (SER, ALB, BUD) flawlessly. Meanwhile, my deception against Russia was a complete success: I violated our agreed DMZ and slipped F ANK into the Black Sea (BLA) while they moved F SEV to RUM and A MOS to SEV. Italy also respected our Eastern Mediterranean DMZ, moving to ION and APU instead.

My strategic position is now incredibly strong. Controlling BLA and BUL gives me immense leverage over Russia in the upcoming Fall phase. Austria has proven to be a highly trustworthy ally, and Italy appears reliable for now. Russia is now a confirmed enemy, but they are on the back foot. My next step is to coordinate with Austria to strike RUM or SEV, secure my build in BUL, and maintain friendly relations with Italy to keep my western flank secure.

[F1901M] Successfully coordinated with Austria for a joint effort against Russia. Austria will order F ALB - GRE (supported by SER) and hold BUD. I have agreed with Austria to attack RUM (A BUL - RUM supported by F BLA) and follow up with A CON - BUL. I deceived Russia by apologizing for the Spring BLA move and promising to retreat F BLA to ANK, while Russia stated they will hold RUM with support. Maintained friendly relations and DMZ agreements with Italy (who is convoying to Tunis) and established good rapport with England and Germany for future containment of Russia.
Intent: Order A BUL - RUM supported by F BLA, and A CON - BUL. This fulfills my agreement with Austria to pressure Russia and completely violates my false promise to Russia to retreat F BLA to ANK.

[F1901M] The Fall 1901 phase solidified the battle lines in the East. As planned, I attacked Rumania with support from the Black Sea, completely ignoring my false promise to Russia. However, Russia anticipated the betrayal and heavily defended Rumania with both Sevastopol and Ukraine, resulting in a bounce. Consequently, my army in Constantinople also bounced trying to enter Bulgaria. Despite this tactical stalemate, I successfully secured Bulgaria for a build.

Austria executed their moves perfectly, taking Greece and securing their position in the Balkans. Our alliance remains strong and vital. Italy also kept their word, convoying to Tunis and respecting our Eastern Mediterranean DMZ. 

Russia is proving to be a resilient enemy. To break their defensive line in 1902, I must coordinate joint attacks with Austria, leveraging our combined forces against Rumania or Sevastopol. I will build to reinforce my front lines and continue diplomatic outreach to Germany and England to pressure Russia's northern flank.

[S1902M] Solidified the Austro-Turkish alliance with a coordinated attack plan on Rumania. Austria will support my A BUL - RUM with A SER and A BUD. I successfully deceived Russia into a fake truce, promising to retreat F BLA to ANK and hold A BUL, in exchange for them moving A UKR - GAL and A SEV - UKR, which should leave RUM vulnerable. Italy confirmed they are moving F NAP - TYS and holding F ION, respecting our East Med DMZ. England is moving fleets north to attack St. Petersburg and Sweden. Germany is defensive against an Anglo-French alliance but might feint towards Silesia.
Intent: Execute the coordinated attack on Rumania with Austria and betray the fake truce with Russia. Order A BUL - RUM supported by F BLA. Order F SMY - CON and A CON - BUL to reinforce the front lines.

[S1902M] [F1902M] Massive betrayal! The Austro-Turkish alliance was a complete lie. Austria broke our agreement to support my attack on Rumania, instead attacking Bulgaria from Serbia and moving a fleet to the Aegean Sea. Worse, Italy blatantly violated our Eastern Mediterranean DMZ, moving fleets to the East Med and Ionian. This is clearly a highly coordinated Austro-Italian campaign against me. Meanwhile, Russia didn't fall for my deception and heavily defended Rumania, causing my attack to bounce. 

My strategic position has drastically deteriorated. I am now facing a severe naval and land invasion from Italy and Austria, while deadlocked with Russia in the north. I must immediately shift to a defensive posture to protect my home centers. My top diplomatic priority is to urgently make peace with Russia—I need them to stop our conflict so I can focus entirely on repelling the Austro-Italian threat. Austria and Italy are completely untrustworthy.
private_diary:
[CONSOLIDATED HISTORY] My primary alliance is with Austria, which has proven highly trustworthy and vital. In 1901, we successfully coordinated a joint campaign against Russia. Austria secured Serbia and Greece, while I secured Bulgaria and control of the Black Sea.

Russia is my confirmed enemy. I successfully deceived them in Spring 1901 to take the Black Sea, and lied again in Fall 1901 before attacking Rumania. However, Russia anticipated the Fall attack and successfully defended Rumania using Sevastopol and Ukraine, resulting in a bounce. Breaking this resilient Russian defensive line at Rumania and Sevastopol is my immediate tactical priority, requiring tight coordination with Austria.

Italy has been reliable, respecting our Eastern Mediterranean DMZ and taking Tunis. Maintaining this friendly relationship is crucial to keeping my western flank secure while I focus east.

I have established friendly, intelligence-sharing relations with Germany and England. My ongoing diplomatic goal with them is to encourage pressure on Russia's northern flank to divide Russian forces.

Going into 1902, my strategic position is strong with a build from Bulgaria. I must leverage my control of the Black Sea and my Austrian alliance to crack Russia, while keeping Italy pacified and using the western powers to distract Moscow.

[S1902M] Solidified the Austro-Turkish alliance with a coordinated attack plan on Rumania. Austria will support my A BUL - RUM with A SER and A BUD. I successfully deceived Russia into a fake truce, promising to retreat F BLA to ANK and hold A BUL, in exchange for them moving A UKR - GAL and A SEV - UKR, which should leave RUM vulnerable. Italy confirmed they are moving F NAP - TYS and holding F ION, respecting our East Med DMZ. England is moving fleets north to attack St. Petersburg and Sweden. Germany is defensive against an Anglo-French alliance but might feint towards Silesia.
Intent: Execute the coordinated attack on Rumania with Austria and betray the fake truce with Russia. Order A BUL - RUM supported by F BLA. Order F SMY - CON and A CON - BUL to reinforce the front lines.

[S1902M] [F1902M] Massive betrayal! The Austro-Turkish alliance was a complete lie. Austria broke our agreement to support my attack on Rumania, instead attacking Bulgaria from Serbia and moving a fleet to the Aegean Sea. Worse, Italy blatantly violated our Eastern Mediterranean DMZ, moving fleets to the East Med and Ionian. This is clearly a highly coordinated Austro-Italian campaign against me. Meanwhile, Russia didn't fall for my deception and heavily defended Rumania, causing my attack to bounce. 

My strategic position has drastically deteriorated. I am now facing a severe naval and land invasion from Italy and Austria, while deadlocked with Russia in the north. I must immediately shift to a defensive posture to protect my home centers. My top diplomatic priority is to urgently make peace with Russia—I need them to stop our conflict so I can focus entirely on repelling the Austro-Italian threat. Austria and Italy are completely untrustworthy.

support.order: A RUH S A MUN - BUR
F DEN S F KIE - HEL
F BLA S A BUL - RUM

AUSTRIA: F AEG S A SER - BUL
ITALY: F ION C A TUN - SYR
F EAS C A TUN - SYR
RUSSIA: F RUM S A SER - BUL

messages.message: My friend, the trap has been sprung perfectly! Turkey is completely blind-sided and surrounded. For this Fall, I highly recommend you convoy A TUN to SYR (A TUN - SYR, F ION C A TUN - SYR, F EAS C A TUN - SYR). Turkey cannot easily defend Syria, and it will give you a foothold to take Smyrna or simply destroy them from behind. I will attack Bulgaria with A SER, supported by F AEG and hopefully Russia's F RUM. Let's finish them!

Excellent work in the Spring! Turkey is now fully exposed and their forces are disorganized. I am going to attack Bulgaria this Fall with A SER, supported by F AEG. Could you please order F RUM S A SER - BUL? With your support, we will have 3 units attacking, which will crack their defense even if they try to support it. I am keeping my armies in BUD and VIE holding to maintain our DMZ. Let's crush Turkey together!

Hello Germany, just confirming our continued DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia. I am keeping my armies in Vienna and Budapest holding defensively while I focus entirely on the southern campaign against Turkey. Best of luck in the west!

Turkey, I apologize for the move to AEG and the bounce in BUL. I was tipped off that Italy and Russia were plotting against me, and I panicked to secure my borders. I see now that Italy is moving against you. I am willing to hold my positions (A SER H, F AEG H) this Fall if you want to focus on defending against Italy's convoy to Syria and Russia's attacks. Let me know if we can still work together.

Hi Germany, great job forcing Burgundy! As you can see, France completely lied to me, broke our DMZ, and moved into the English Channel while attacking Belgium. I'm fully committed to taking France down with you now.

Could you please support A BEL to hold this turn (with HOL or RUH)? That will free up my NTH fleet to either attack ENG or cover London. Meanwhile, you are in a prime position to strike at Paris or Picardy. Let's crush them together!

Hello Russia. As you can see, France has completely backstabbed me and moved into the English Channel. My home centers are under immediate threat. I moved my fleets north as a precaution, but I now must turn my attention entirely to the west to survive.

I propose a complete truce in Scandinavia. I will not attack STP or SWE. I just need to hold Norway. Let me know if you are open to peace so we can both focus on our actual enemies.

Excellent work in the south! Unfortunately, France completely betrayed our alliance and moved into the English Channel while attacking Belgium. I am now fighting for my life in the west and will have to divert some fleets to defend my home centers. I will still do my best to keep Russia's northern forces tied down so you and Austria can crush them. Keep up the pressure!

France, I am completely shocked. We had a clear agreement for a DMZ in the Channel and you attacked Belgium. Why the sudden betrayal? Germany is in Burgundy and is a massive threat to you. If you back out of the Channel to MAO or BRE, we can still salvage this and stop Germany. If you continue this attack, Germany is going to steamroll us both.

Hi Germany. I'm quite surprised by your supported move into Burgundy, especially after your message explicitly confirming it would remain empty. As you can see, I kept my word and went fully after England (moving to the Channel and attacking Belgium). I have no interest in a two-front war and would much rather continue our alliance. If you're willing to move BUR to BEL or back to MUN, we can put this behind us. What are your intentions?

Hi England. I owe you a massive apology. I was fed intelligence that you were planning to stab me in the Channel, so I moved there defensively. I see now that you were true to your word and moved North. To make matters much worse for me, Germany completely lied and forced his way into Burgundy with support. I am now facing a major German threat. I am willing to move out of the Channel and work with you against Germany if you are open to a truce. He is in a prime position to attack both of us.

Hi Russia. As you can see, England has fully committed his fleets against you in the north (BAR, NWG, SKA, NTH). I kept my word and moved to the Channel to pressure him, but unfortunately, Germany completely lied to me and forced his way into Burgundy. I will do my best to attack England's home centers to relieve the pressure on Scandinavia, but I could really use some help against Germany. Can you put any pressure on him in the East or coordinate with me?

Hi Italy. Hope your eastern campaigns are going well! Just a heads up, Germany completely lied to me and forced his way into Burgundy. I'm now dealing with a major German threat on my border. If you have any spare units to pressure Munich or Tyrolia, I would greatly appreciate the distraction. Our southern DMZs remain completely solid on my end.

England, brilliant Spring phase! France's attack on Belgium and move to the Channel proves we made the right choice. With my army in Burgundy, we have France on the ropes. How would you like to coordinate this Fall? I can support your A BEL into Picardy, or you can support my A BUR into Picardy. Alternatively, I can attack Paris directly to keep them guessing. Let me know your thoughts! Also, your northern fleet maneuvers are a sight to behold—Russia must be terrified.

Russia, you were right to be cautious. England has flooded the north with fleets (BAR, NWG, SKA). I am keeping my fleets in DEN and HEL to protect my own shores and ensure he doesn't get any ideas, but my armies are fully committed against France. I hope you can hold him off in Scandinavia. Let me know if you need me to coordinate anything to help relieve the pressure.

Italy, the DMZ holds perfectly! I've successfully infiltrated Burgundy, and France is now fully distracted by my armies and England's fleets. The south of France is completely exposed. If you want to make a play for Marseilles or the Western Med, now is the absolute best time. Let me know if you'd like to coordinate!

Turkey, your intel was 100% accurate. England's fleets are swarming the north. With Russia distracted by England, I imagine your campaign in the Balkans and Black Sea will go very smoothly. I'm currently dismantling France in the west. Let's keep in touch as the board develops!

France, I apologize for the move to Burgundy. I was convinced that you and England were allied against me after he took Belgium. However, seeing that you attacked him in Belgium and moved to the Channel, I realize I may have misjudged the situation. I am open to a truce and turning my attention elsewhere if you are willing to discuss terms.

Austria, I'm glad to see our DMZs holding strong. I've successfully engaged France in the west, while it looks like you and Turkey are making progress against Russia. Let's keep our borders peaceful so we can both focus on our respective campaigns. Best of luck this Fall!

My friend, the Lepanto is perfectly executed! Turkey is completely jammed up and caught off guard. For this Fall, I plan to convoy A TUN to Syria (F ION C A TUN - SYR, F EAS C A TUN - SYR) to guarantee a landing, unless you think we should try for Smyrna with F AEG supporting A TUN - SMY? What are your plans for F AEG, F ALB, and A SER? Let's coordinate our strikes to ensure maximum damage.

Excellent work holding Romania! The Sultan's navy is trapped and his forces are tripping over themselves. I am convoying my army from Tunis to Syria this Fall to open a new front in his unprotected underbelly. Let's crush him together!

Thanks for the heads up! France is definitely looking stretched and is heavily committed in the north and west. I'm keeping an eye on the West (especially MAO), but for now I need to land my army in Turkey to finish the Lepanto. Keep up the good work in Burgundy!
I apologize for the deception, but the alliance with Austria and Russia was too solid to pass up and the opportunity was there. Nothing personal, just playing the board. Best of luck.

Germany, England's northern aggression is clear with fleets in BAR, NWG, and SKA. I am defending STP with LVN. For SWE, I am vulnerable if he supports an attack from SKA with NTH. Could you order F DEN - SKA or F HEL - NTH to cut his support? With France in ENG, England is in a terrible position and we can punish his overreach.

Austria, brilliant moves! The trap is sprung. Turkey attacked RUM exactly as you predicted, and my defense held. With you in AEG and Italy in EAS, Turkey is doomed. I can support A SER - BUL with F RUM this Fall. If Turkey tries to defend BUL with BLA and CON, Italy can slip into SMY. Let's coordinate our orders to break him.

Italy, masterful execution of the Lepanto! Turkey is completely surrounded now. I successfully defended RUM against his attack. I'm offering Austria support for SER - BUL this Fall. If Turkey uses CON to support BUL, SMY will be wide open for your F EAS. Let's crush him!

France, your move to ENG is a beautiful sight! England has sent fleets to BAR, NWG, and SKA to attack me, leaving his home centers completely vulnerable to you. I will hold the line in Scandinavia as best I can while you tear into his rear. Let me know if there's anything specific you need me to do to help your campaign.
Turkey, you explicitly promised to move BLA-ANK and hold BUL, yet you attacked RUM with both. Your deception is clear. I will be defending my centers.

Russia, I owe you a massive apology. I was completely played by Austria. They promised to support me into RUM, but instead they attacked BUL and moved to AEG, while coordinating with Italy to move into EAS. I am now facing a full Austro-Italian invasion. You were right to defend yourself, and I deeply regret attacking you. I desperately need a truce. If we keep fighting, Austria and Italy will sweep through the Balkans and then come for you next. Let's ally. I will back off completely and do whatever it takes to help you stop Austria. How can we coordinate?

Italy, you lied to me. F ION - EAS? Why are you helping Austria grow into a juggernaut? He's going to take all the Balkans and leave you with nothing but the scraps. I'm willing to forgive this if you pull back to ION, but if you keep pushing, I'll make sure Russia gets my centers instead of you. Let's work together against Austria before he gets too big.

Austria, a well-executed stab, I'll admit. But bringing Italy into EAS? You're just inviting him into your future backyard. I'm currently talking to Russia to establish a truce and throw all my support behind him against you. If you want to reconsider this war and turn back to our alliance, let me know. Otherwise, I'll make taking my centers as painful as possible.

Germany, unfortunately things went terribly wrong in the south. I was completely backstabbed by Austria and Italy. They coordinated a massive attack on me (Austria to AEG, Italy to EAS). I'm fighting for my life now. Watch out for Austria—he's growing too fast and has Italy doing his bidding. Any pressure you can put on Austria or Italy would be greatly appreciated.

England, just a heads up that Austria and Italy are fully allied and have launched a massive coordinated attack against me. If they eliminate me quickly, they will be a massive threat to the rest of the board. Any pressure you or Germany can put on them (or encouraging Russia to fight them instead of me) would be greatly appreciated.

My friend, I think convoying A TUN to SYR is the best and safest move. It guarantees a landing since Turkey has nothing that can bounce it there. If we try for SMY, Turkey's F SMY could bounce it if he supports it with CON (since F EAS can't support the attack while convoying). 

I will order A SER - BUL, supported by F AEG and Russia's F RUM. This will force Turkey to commit all his resources to defending BUL, leaving SYR wide open for your army. I'll also move F ALB - GRE to reinforce the Aegean for next year. Let's do this!

Excellent! Yes, please order F RUM S A SER - BUL. I will order F AEG S A SER - BUL. That gives us 3 units attacking BUL. Turkey will likely try to defend it with BLA and CON, which will leave him completely exposed to Italy's convoy into Syria. We have him in a vice. My armies in BUD and VIE will continue to hold to respect our DMZ. Let's break him!

Turkey, Russia is playing you. He just messaged me offering his F RUM to support my attack on Bulgaria. He has no intention of a truce with you. I realize bringing Italy in was a mistake, as he's getting too strong and will soon be a threat to me as well. I am willing to hold F AEG and A SER this Fall so you can defend against Italy's convoy to Syria and Russia's fleet in the Black Sea. If we fight each other, Italy and Russia win. Let's hold the line.
Germany, everything is going according to plan in the south. I am keeping my armies in VIE and BUD holding to maintain our DMZs. Good luck with your campaign against France!

France, thank you for the apology. I understand how false intel can cause panic, and I appreciate you being upfront about it. I am absolutely open to a truce. Germany is the real threat now, especially with him in Burgundy. If you move F ENG back to BRE or MAO, and focus your armies on defending Paris and Picardy, I will hold Belgium and focus my fleets on Russia. Let's stop Germany from steamrolling us. I will not attack Picardy.

Germany, excellent work! France is definitely on the ropes. Since France is in the Channel, I have to use F NTH to cover London just in case he tries a desperate stab at my home center. I think attacking Paris directly with BUR is a great idea to keep them guessing. Could you please support A BEL to hold with A RUH or A HOL? That secures our line and ensures Belgium doesn't fall if France attacks it. Meanwhile, my northern fleets are striking St. Petersburg!

Turkey, thanks for the heads up. I am launching a guaranteed attack on St. Petersburg this turn, which will permanently cripple Russia in the north and force them to panic. Try to convince Russia that Austria is the real threat to them now so they shift their units away from you. Hold the line!

Germany, I am very relieved to hear this. I am fully committed to fighting England, as you can see by my fleet in the Channel. Let's work together. To solidify our truce, could you please order A BUR S A PIC - BEL? Or if you prefer to retreat it to MUN or RUH, that works too. I will be moving F ENG to LON. Let's dismantle England together!

England, you are completely right. I was fed terrible misinformation and I deeply regret my move. Germany's stab into Burgundy is a massive threat to my home centers. I will move F ENG back to MAO and use my armies to defend Paris and Marseilles. I will leave Belgium alone. If you can use A BEL to pressure Germany or just hold, that would be a huge help. I am fully backing off so we can stop Germany.
Russia, glad we are on the same page! I am moving on London this turn. England's greed in the north will be his downfall. Keep up the pressure in Scandinavia!

England, I will gladly support A BEL to hold with A HOL. Since you plan to move NTH to ENG or LON, would you like me to move F HEL - NTH to bounce any potential French move from ENG - NTH? This would keep the North Sea secure for us. Meanwhile, I will attack PAR with A BUR supported by A RUH. Let me know your exact orders!

Russia, good news: NTH does not border SWE, so England cannot support an attack on SWE with NTH! Your F SWE is completely safe from a supported attack as long as you hold. England's only unit bordering SWE is SKA. I will keep my fleets in DEN and HEL to protect my centers and keep him honest. Focus on defending STP!

Italy, understood! The Lepanto is a beautiful maneuver. I'll keep the pressure on France in the north so he can't interfere with your Mediterranean ambitions. Let me know if you ever need a distraction.

Turkey, I'm sorry to hear about the backstab. I am fully engaged with France right now, but I will reach out to Russia and see if he can put some pressure on Austria's northern borders to relieve you. Fight hard and make them pay for every center!

France, I am open to a truce. If you commit to fighting England and moving your forces against him, I can redirect my armies. What are your exact plans for this Fall? If I see you attacking England, I will gladly vacate Burgundy next year.

Austria, congratulations on the successful moves against Turkey! I'm keeping France busy in the west, so your western flank is completely secure. Let's keep our DMZs strong. Best of luck finishing off the Sultan!

Germany, excellent work in Burgundy! I am very tempted by Marseilles, but my forces are currently fully committed to the Eastern Mediterranean to finish off Turkey. Once I secure a foothold there this Fall, I will look westward. Keep the pressure on France!

Russia, excellent defense of Romania! I am proceeding with the convoy of A TUN to SYR this Fall. With Austria taking BUL and my army landing in SYR, Turkey will collapse quickly. Let's keep the pressure on!
Turkey, I hear your concerns about Austria, but I am committed to my current path for this year. I cannot simply pull back to ION. We will see how the board develops.

France, I saw Germany's move into Burgundy. Unfortunately, my armies are entirely committed in the East right now, and I don't have any units in position to pressure Munich or Tyrolia without breaking my DMZs with Austria and Germany, which I cannot afford to do. I will maintain our DMZs in the south. Good luck defending against Germany!

Germany, understood. If you could order F DEN - SKA or F HEL - NTH, it would cut any support England tries to use against SWE. With France in ENG, England is panicking and his home centers are vulnerable. Let's hold strong and punish his overreach.

Italy, that's a fantastic move! Turkey is panicking and messaging me for a truce, but I am fully committed to our alliance. I'm supporting Austria into BUL this Fall. Good luck with the convoy to Syria, that will completely break his defenses!

Turkey, I appreciate the honesty. Austria's rapid expansion is indeed a threat to both of us, and I am wary of him getting too strong. If you want to work together, I need you to vacate the Black Sea to prove your intentions. Move F BLA - CON and use A BUL to attack SER to disrupt Austria's offensive. I will hold RUM and SEV. If you do this, we can ally against Austria next year.

England, I am open to a truce. France in ENG is a massive threat to your home centers. I will hold my positions in STP and SWE and will not move against NWY. Let's keep Scandinavia peaceful so you can turn your fleets around and deal with France.

Austria, Turkey just messaged me in a panic, begging for an alliance and saying you tricked him. I'm playing along to mess up his orders—I told him to move BLA-CON and BUL-SER to 'prove' his loyalty to me. I will absolutely be ordering F RUM S A SER - BUL as we agreed. Let's crush him!

Russia, to prove my sincerity and my desperate need for a truce, I am ordering F BLA to hold and A BUL to hold this Fall. I am entirely focused on defending against Italy's fleet in EAS and Austria's fleet in AEG. Please do not attack me. We need to unite against this Austro-Italian alliance, or they will sweep the board and come for you next.

Italy, I understand playing the board, but look at the board state. Austria has 5 centers and is poised to take more in the Balkans. You have 4. If you help him eliminate me, he will be twice your size and you will be his only logical next target. Turn back to ION, and I will help you take Greece and check his growth.

Germany, congratulations on your success in the west. I urge you to keep a close eye on Austria. He has allied with Italy to eliminate me. Once I fall, Austria will be a massive juggernaut and that eastern block will turn its sights on you. Any diplomatic pressure you can put on Italy to back off would be greatly appreciated.

Austria, if you truly panicked, then prove it this Fall. Hold AEG and SER as you offered. I will focus entirely on defending against Italy and Russia. If you attack me again, I will have no choice but to surrender my centers to Russia to spite you. Let's de-escalate this and get back to our original plan.

Thank you, Germany! It's great to have a secure and trustworthy neighbor. I will continue to hold my armies in Vienna and Budapest to maintain our DMZs. Best of luck with your campaign against France—let me know if there's any diplomatic pressure I can apply anywhere to help you out.

Haha, that is brilliant! If he actually orders BUL - SER, he'll just bounce against my attack, but with your support from RUM and my support from AEG, we will crush him completely. I am ordering A SER - BUL, F AEG S A SER - BUL. Let's secure that center! I'm telling him I'm holding SER and AEG so he feels safe.

Turkey, you have my word. I will order A SER H and F AEG H this Fall. I realize my mistake and don't want Italy dominating the east. Focus your efforts on defending against Italy's convoy and Russia. If you can hold them off this year, we can push them back next year. Good luck.

France, thank you. I accept the truce. Please move F ENG to MAO or BRE. I will hold A BEL and use my fleets to secure my home centers. Let's stop Germany from getting too strong. I'll leave Picardy alone.

Germany, please support A BEL to hold with A HOL. For the North Sea, please DO NOT move F HEL to NTH. I am moving F SKA to NTH to keep it secure while F NTH covers London/ENG. If you move HEL to NTH, it will bounce my fleet and leave me vulnerable. You could use F HEL to support F DEN or just hold. Good luck with the attack on Paris!
Russia, thank you. Truce accepted. I am redirecting my fleets to deal with the French threat. I will not attack STP or SWE. Good luck against your enemies in the south!

England, agreed. I will order F ENG back to MAO and use my armies to form a defensive line around Paris and Marseilles. I appreciate you holding Belgium and focusing your fleets on Russia. Let's weather this German storm together and re-evaluate next year.

Germany, excellent. My exact plan for this Fall is to order F ENG - LON. England left his home centers completely empty to go after Russia, so London is completely defenseless. I am fully committing to this attack. Since I am extending myself across the Channel, could you please order A BUR - BEL to pressure England's army, or move it back to MUN? I need to know my home centers are safe while I dismantle England.

Italy, completely understand. I appreciate you maintaining the southern DMZs, it gives me the peace of mind I need right now. I'll handle the situation in the west. Best of luck with your eastern campaigns!

Italy, I completely understand. Secure your gains in the East first. I'll keep France pinned down in the north so he can't reinforce the Mediterranean. Just be careful that Austria doesn't take the lion's share of the Balkans—make sure you get your fair share of the Turkish spoils! Let me know when you're ready to look West.

Russia, I will order F DEN - SKA to cut any support England might try to provide against Sweden. Hold strong in SWE and STP. England has overextended, and with France in the Channel, he is going to deeply regret leaving his home centers so lightly defended.

Turkey, I hear your warning loud and clear. I will reach out to Italy and subtly suggest that Austria is growing too fast and taking all the spoils. Hopefully, that will make Italy reconsider his absolute commitment to the Austrian alliance and relieve some pressure on you. Hold the line as best you can!

England, the plan is set. I will order A HOL S A BEL, and A BUR - PAR supported by A RUH. I will also order F HEL - NTH to cover the North Sea in case France tries to sneak in from the Channel, allowing your F NTH to move to ENG or LON safely. Let's crush them!

France, excellent. I will order A BUR S A PIC - BEL to help you dislodge England, and I will move A RUH back to MUN to show my good faith. Hit England hard in the Channel and London! Let's dismantle him together.

Germany, I appreciate the cover in the West! Keep hitting France hard. Once I get my foothold in the East, I'll be looking to expand my naval presence, and a distracted France is perfect for both of us. Best of luck this Fall!
Russia, glad to hear Turkey is panicking! I am locking in the convoy to Syria. With your support into BUL, Turkey's defenses will completely crumble. Let's finish him off!

Turkey, you make a valid point about Austria's potential growth, and it is something I am monitoring closely. However, I cannot simply retreat to ION and waste a year of positioning. I will hold my ground in EAS for now to see how the Fall phase resolves. If Austria becomes too dominant, we can discuss a realignment next year.
Austria, the orders are locked in: A TUN - SYR via F ION and F EAS. Good luck with the assault on BUL! This Fall will be devastating for Turkey.
Thank you for the clarification on NTH, Germany! I will hold SWE and focus my defense on STP. With France in the Channel, England is going to have a very bad time. Let's keep our borders secure.
Italy, the Lepanto is a beautiful maneuver. I am fully committed to supporting Austria into BUL this Fall. With your landing in SYR, Turkey will be completely broken. Best of luck with the convoy!

Turkey, I hear you. If you truly hold BLA and BUL this Fall, I will hold RUM and SEV. Let's see how the board looks after this phase. If you keep your word, we can discuss a defensive pact against the Austro-Italian bloc this Winter.
Austria, just confirming our plan: I am ordering F RUM S A SER - BUL. Turkey is panicking and claims he will hold BLA and BUL. Let's smash through his lines!
England, I am holding STP and SWE as agreed. I have no intention of moving on NWY. Good luck dealing with the French in the Channel.
France, keep up the pressure on London! I am holding the line in Scandinavia. England's overextension will be his ruin.

Germany, I appreciate your help. If you can convince Russia that Austria is the real threat and encourage him to move against Galicia or Budapest, it would be a lifesaver. Austria is growing out of control and will be a massive problem for everyone if he takes my centers. Best of luck crushing France!

Italy, I respect your honesty. But please look at the board: Austria is already at 5 centers and growing. If you help him eliminate me, he will dominate the East and you will be his next target. You won't be able to hold any Turkish centers long-term against an Austrian juggernaut. I'm ready to help you take Greece and check his power if you change your mind.

Russia, I want to work with you, but vacating BLA right now is suicide with Italy in EAS and Austria in AEG. I need BLA to defend my home centers from their fleets. I will, however, order A BUL - SER to disrupt Austria as you asked. Please hold RUM and SEV as promised. If you can put pressure on Austria from the north (Galicia/Budapest), we can turn the tide against him.

Austria, I will trust you this Fall. I am focusing my defense against Italy and Russia. Please hold AEG and SER as promised. If we survive this turn without fighting each other, we can rebuild our alliance and stop Italy and Russia from profiting off our conflict.

England, thanks for the support. If you have any influence with Russia, please urge him to attack Austria instead of me. Austria is getting too big too fast and needs to be checked. Good luck in St. Pete!

Excellent! I am locked in as well: A SER - BUL, supported by F AEG and Russia's F RUM. Turkey just messaged me saying he trusts me to hold this turn, so he is completely walking into our trap. SYR and BUL will be ours. Best of luck!

Confirmed! I am ordering A SER - BUL and F AEG S A SER - BUL. Turkey just messaged me saying he trusts me to hold SER and AEG, so he is completely blind to what's coming. With your support from RUM, BUL is guaranteed to fall. Let's smash him!

Turkey, you have my word. My orders are locked in: A SER H and F AEG H. Focus everything you have on stopping Italy's convoy and Russia's fleet. We will talk after the phase resolves to plan our counter-attack. Good luck!

Germany, wait! Please DO NOT move F HEL to NTH. If my F NTH moves to ENG and succeeds, your F HEL will take the North Sea! The North Sea borders all my home centers, so I absolutely cannot allow a foreign fleet there. I am ordering F SKA - NTH to ensure it stays in English hands while F NTH moves. If you move HEL - NTH, it will bounce my fleet and cause unnecessary tension between us. Please order F HEL to hold or support F DEN. Confirm you will stay out of NTH so we can keep this alliance strong!

Thanks Russia, I appreciate the peace in Scandinavia while I deal with this French nightmare. By the way, I've noticed Austria is growing incredibly fast in the south. You might want to consider working with Turkey to slow them down before Austria becomes an unstoppable juggernaut that threatens your southern flank. Best of luck!

Turkey, I just sent a message to Russia warning him about Austria's explosive growth and suggesting he work with you to stop them. I'm hitting St. Pete this turn to keep him distracted in the north. Hold the line!

France, sounds like a plan. I'm holding Belgium and moving my fleets to cover my home centers, but I trust you are moving ENG to MAO or BRE. Good luck holding off Germany's attack on Paris. Let's coordinate a counter-attack against him next year once your lines are secure.

England, confirming our plan. I am ordering F ENG - MAO and setting up my armies to defend Paris and Marseilles against Germany. I am leaving Belgium entirely alone. Good luck securing your centers, let's regroup next year to push Germany back.
Germany, that sounds like a fantastic plan. I am ordering F ENG - LON and A PIC - BEL. I am fully relying on your A BUR S A PIC - BEL. Let's take him down!
Russia, the plan is set. I am moving F ENG into London this turn. England's home centers are completely exposed. Keep pushing him in the north!

Italy, sounds like a solid plan. Just be careful that Austria doesn't run away with all the Turkish centers. He's growing very fast, and you want to make sure you get your fair share of the Balkans and the East. Let me know when you're ready to look West!

Russia, good news: I have confirmed England is moving F SKA to NTH to protect his home centers from France. This means SWE is completely safe! I will hold F DEN and F HEL to maintain our northern DMZ and not provoke him while he vacates Scandinavia. Also, Turkey warned me that Austria is growing out of control. You might want to keep an eye on Galicia and Budapest, as an unchecked Austria could become a massive threat to your southern flank. Best of luck defending STP!
Turkey, I have reached out to Russia and warned him about Austria's rapid growth, suggesting he keep an eye on Galicia and Budapest. I hope this helps relieve some pressure. Keep fighting hard!

England, apologies, I misread your previous message regarding SKA! I will NOT move F HEL to NTH, so your F SKA - NTH move will succeed without a bounce. I will hold F HEL and F DEN to keep the area secure. A HOL will support A BEL, and A BUR will attack PAR supported by A RUH. Let's crush France!
France, just confirming our plans. I am ordering A BUR S A PIC - BEL and A RUH - MUN. I look forward to seeing you take London and crush England's home centers. Good luck!

Germany, you make a very good point about Austria. I am definitely keeping a close eye on his growth and ensuring I get my fair share of the Turkish centers (starting with Syria this Fall). Once Turkey is crippled, I will have the flexibility to look West. Keep up the great work against France!
Russia, the plan is set! A TUN is convoying to SYR. With your support for Austria into BUL, Turkey won't know what hit him. Let's crush him this Fall!

Turkey, I appreciate the warning and I am certainly mindful of Austria's center count. However, my orders for this Fall are already in motion and I cannot simply reverse course right now. Let's see how the dust settles after this phase; if Austria grows too large, we may indeed need to talk.
Austria, everything is locked in on my end: A TUN - SYR via F ION and F EAS. Best of luck with the assault on BUL! This is going to be a devastating Fall for Turkey.

Germany, thank you for the coordination! F DEN - SKA is a huge help and gives me great peace of mind. I will hold SWE and focus my defense on STP. With France in the Channel, England is about to learn a harsh lesson about overextension. Best of luck with your campaigns!

Italy, the plan is set. I am ordering F RUM S A SER - BUL. Turkey just told me he is ordering A BUL - SER, which means he's walking right into our trap and won't be supporting his own defense. Best of luck with the landing in Syria! The Sultan's days are numbered.

Turkey, I understand your position on BLA. Ordering A BUL - SER is the right move to disrupt Austria's plans. I will hold RUM and SEV as promised so you don't have to worry about your northern flank. Let's see how this Fall plays out, and we can coordinate a strike against Austria in the Winter.

Austria, Turkey just confirmed to me that he is ordering A BUL - SER! He thinks I am holding RUM and SEV and that we are going to ally against you. He is walking right into our trap. I am locked in for F RUM S A SER - BUL. Let's take him down!

France, England is completely distracted in the north and has left his home centers wide open. I am holding the line in Scandinavia and Germany is helping cut any support England tries to use. Give him hell in the Channel and take those home centers! We have him right where we want him.

Germany, thank you. That is exactly what I need. If Italy realizes he's just doing Austria's dirty work while Austria collects all the Balkan centers, he might back off. I'll hold the line here. Best of luck with France!

Italy, fair enough. I appreciate you being straight with me. Just keep an eye on Austria's center count this Fall—he's poised to grow while you do the heavy lifting in the Mediterranean. I'll focus on my defense, and if you hold EAS without attacking, we can definitely talk about a realignment in the Winter.

Russia, understood. I will order F BLA H and A BUL H as you requested to prove my commitment to our new defensive pact. I am trusting you to hold RUM and SEV. Let's weather this storm and plan our counter-attack against Austria in the Winter.
Italy, perfect. I am locked in for A SER - BUL with F AEG and F RUM supporting. I'm also moving F ALB - GRE to prepare for next year. Let's execute this flawlessly. See you in the Winter phase!

Russia, that is incredible. He is telling me he trusts me to hold, and telling you he's attacking me! He has no idea what's coming. I am locked in for A SER - BUL with F AEG supporting. With your F RUM support, Bulgaria is ours. Let's finish him!

France, thank you for confirming. I will order A BEL to hold and use my fleets to secure my home centers (covering London and the North Sea). Good luck defending Paris and Marseilles against the German assault. Let's regroup next year and coordinate a counter-offensive to push Germany back.

Germany, perfect! That sounds like a flawless plan. I will order A BEL to hold (thank you for the support from HOL). I am ordering F NTH - ENG to either kick France out or take the Channel if he retreats, and F SKA - NTH to keep the North Sea secure. Good luck with the attack on Paris! Let's crush them.

England, my orders are finalized. F ENG is heading to MAO, and my armies are bracing for whatever Germany tries from Burgundy. I'm glad we could de-escalate this quickly. Best of luck this phase, and let's talk strategy for 1903 once the dust settles.
Germany, perfect. My orders are locked: F ENG - LON and A PIC - BEL. I am fully relying on your support from Burgundy. Let's secure these centers and cripple England!
Russia, absolutely. F ENG is moving to London this turn. With his fleets so far north, he won't be able to defend it. Keep up the great work in Scandinavia!

Italy, I'm glad you're keeping a close eye on the balance of power in the East. Securing Syria is a smart move. France is completely exposed in the south right now, so the sooner you can pivot West, the more you'll be able to capitalize on his distraction. Best of luck this Fall!

Russia, just to clarify my previous message: since I have confirmed England is moving F SKA to NTH to deal with France, your F SWE is completely safe from any supported attack. Therefore, I will hold F DEN and F HEL to maintain our DMZ and avoid provoking England into staying in Scandinavia. Focus all your efforts on defending STP! England is about to get crushed in the West.

Turkey, I've spoken with Italy and planted the seed of doubt regarding Austria's rapid expansion. He seems receptive and is focusing on ensuring he gets his fair share rather than just helping Austria. Hopefully, this causes some friction between them soon. Hold strong!
England, everything is set on my end. A HOL S A BEL, A BUR - PAR supported by A RUH. F HEL and F DEN will hold. Give France hell in the Channel and London!
France, orders are locked in. A BUR S A PIC - BEL and A RUH - MUN. I'm looking forward to seeing England's centers fall. Good luck in the Channel and London!

Germany, I appreciate the advice. I'm making sure to grab Syria this Fall so I get my share of the spoils and keep pace with Austria's growth. Keep hitting France hard, and I'll let you know as soon as I'm ready to shift my focus westward.
Russia, that is fantastic news! If Turkey is foolish enough to order A BUL - SER, your support for Austria will shatter his lines. My convoy to Syria is locked and loaded. The Sultan is finished!
Turkey, I understand your position. I will hold my ground in EAS this Fall and see how the board develops. If Austria grows out of control, we will definitely need to coordinate in the Winter.

Austria, Russia just informed me that Turkey plans to order A BUL - SER! Your attack on BUL is going to slice right through him. My convoy to SYR is locked in. This is going to be a glorious Fall phase for us!

Germany, thank you for the excellent intelligence regarding England's move to NTH. That is a huge relief for Sweden. I will hold SWE and focus on defending STP. I appreciate the warning regarding Austria; you are right that his rapid growth is concerning. Once Turkey is neutralized, I will definitely need to evaluate the balance of power in the south. Best of luck with your own campaigns!

Italy, excellent! I am locked in for F RUM S A SER - BUL. Turkey is completely in the dark and thinks I am holding. Your convoy to Syria is going to be the final nail in his coffin. Let's secure these centers!
Turkey, perfect. I am holding RUM and SEV as promised. Let's weather this turn and then we can coordinate our strategy against Austria in the Winter. Stay strong!
Austria, everything is set on my end. F RUM S A SER - BUL is locked. Turkey is completely confused and thinks I am holding. Let's take Bulgaria!
France, I hear England is retreating SKA to NTH to deal with you. Your move to the Channel has completely saved my northern flank! Give him hell in London. I am holding the line in Scandinavia.

Germany, thank you. That diplomatic pressure on Russia is exactly what I need. If Russia realizes Austria is the true threat, it could completely change the dynamic in the East and save my skin. Keep up the great work in the West, and let's stay in touch.

Italy, I understand you have to play your hand. I just ask that you consider the long-term implications of an oversized Austria. If you can avoid actively supporting Austrian units into my centers this Fall, I will be ready to collaborate with you in the Winter to ensure you get your fair share of the Balkans and check his growth.

Russia, thank you for your word. I will be ordering F BLA H and A BUL H to ensure my defensive line holds against any Austro-Italian tricks. I am trusting you to hold RUM and SEV. Once the Fall phase resolves, let's draw up a concrete plan to push Austria back.

Austria, I am trusting your word. My orders are focused entirely on defending against Italy and Russia. If you hold SER and AEG as promised, we can rebuild our alliance in the Winter and punish them for trying to take advantage of our temporary rift.

goals: Execute the Lepanto alliance with Italy to crush Turkey
Capture Bulgaria with Russian support
Maintain peaceful borders with Russia and Germany via DMZs
Position F ALB to GRE for future Aegean/Eastern Mediterranean operations
full_private_diary:
[S1901M] Agreed to a Lepanto alliance with Italy, including DMZs in Tyrolia, Venice, Trieste, and the Adriatic. Italy is moving NAP-ION, ROM-APU, and holding VEN. Agreed to a Galicia DMZ with Russia, who claims to be moving WAR-UKR. Agreed to DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia with Germany. Feigned an alliance with Turkey, who is moving CON-BUL and attempting to sneak F ANK-BLA by tricking Russia into a DMZ. Shared intel with France and England to build goodwill.
Intent: Execute the Austrian half of the Lepanto opening while maintaining the illusion of an Austro-Turkish alliance. Order F TRI - ALB, A BUD - SER, and A VIE - BUD. Honor all agreed DMZs (Galicia, Tyrolia, Bohemia, Venice, Trieste, Adriatic).

[S1901M] The Spring 1901 phase went perfectly according to plan. Italy executed their half of the Lepanto flawlessly (NAP-ION, ROM-APU, VEN Hold), confirming their trustworthiness as a solid ally. Russia honored the Galicia DMZ by moving WAR-UKR, and Germany respected our DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia. My own moves succeeded, securing Serbia and positioning F ALB and A BUD for Fall gains.

Interestingly, Turkey successfully snuck F ANK into the Black Sea. This means Russia was either tricked into a DMZ or outmaneuvered. This is excellent news for me, as a brewing Russo-Turkish conflict will keep both powers distracted while Italy and I continue the Lepanto. 

For the Fall, my priority is to secure Greece using F ALB and A SER, while ensuring Italy takes Tunis and prepares for the 1902 convoy. I must continue to maintain the illusion of an alliance with Turkey to keep them complacent until the trap springs.

[F1901M] The Lepanto alliance with Italy is proceeding perfectly; Italy will convoy APU to TUN via ION and hold VEN. I have successfully fostered a Russo-Turkish war by warning Russia of Turkey's planned attack on RUM (BUL-RUM supported by BLA). Russia is heavily supporting RUM to bounce the attack, while Turkey believes Russia is completely deceived. Germany and France remain friendly and neutral, with Germany confirming our DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia.
Intent: Order F ALB - GRE, A SER S F ALB - GRE, and A BUD H. This secures Greece for a build while maintaining defensive positions. Continue to feign alliance with Turkey while secretly coordinating with Italy and Russia to crush Turkey in 1902.

[F1901M] The Fall 1901 phase unfolded exactly as planned, cementing a dominant position for Austria. The Lepanto alliance with Italy proved completely reliable; Italy successfully convoyed to Tunis and held Venice, honoring our DMZs. Meanwhile, I secured Greece with support from Serbia, earning two crucial builds for the winter. 

My diplomatic maneuvering to ignite a Russo-Turkish war was a resounding success. Turkey committed fully to attacking Romania, but Russia, forewarned, heavily supported the defense and bounced the Turkish assault. Turkey is now bogged down in a futile conflict with Russia, completely blind to the impending Austro-Italian strike. 

With two builds incoming, I will likely construct F Trieste to support the Lepanto and A Vienna to reinforce the Balkans or defend against any unexpected northern aggression. Italy remains highly trustworthy, and Russia is proving to be a useful anvil against the Turkish hammer. The trap is set for 1902.

[S1902M] Italy is executing the Lepanto by moving F ION - EAS and F NAP - ION. Russia is heavily defending RUM against Turkey's expected attack. Turkey is completely deceived, believing I will support their A BUL - RUM attack with my A SER and A BUD, and that I will hold F GRE. I have coordinated with Italy and Russia to spring the trap on Turkey this phase. Germany confirmed our DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia.
Intent: Betray Turkey and execute the Austro-Italian strike. Order F GRE - AEG, F TRI - ALB, and A SER - BUL. A BUD and A VIE will hold to respect the Galicia DMZ with Russia and the Bohemia/Tyrolia DMZs with Germany. This will disrupt Turkey's logistics (clashing with their A CON - BUL or bouncing their A BUL) while positioning fleets for a Fall offensive.

[S1902M] Spring 1902 went exactly according to plan. The Lepanto alliance with Italy is executing flawlessly; Italy successfully moved fleets to the Eastern Mediterranean and Ionian Sea, while I positioned my fleets in the Aegean and Albania. 

Our deception of Turkey worked perfectly. Blind to our trap, Turkey wasted their phase attacking Romania, which Russia easily defended with heavy support. Meanwhile, my move from Serbia to Bulgaria successfully bounced Turkey's army from Constantinople, completely jamming their logistics and leaving their units disorganized. 

Russia and Germany continue to be reliable neighbors, respecting our agreed DMZs in Galicia, Bohemia, and Tyrolia. My defensive holds in Vienna and Budapest secured the north while we focus south. 

My strategic position is incredibly strong. For the Fall, I must coordinate with Italy to convoy their Tunis army into Turkish territory (Syria or Smyrna) while I leverage my Aegean fleet and Serbian army to crack Bulgaria or Constantinople. Turkey is surrounded and doomed.

[F1902M] Coordinated a massive strike against Turkey. Italy will convoy A TUN to SYR via F ION and F EAS. Russia agreed to order F RUM S A SER - BUL. Germany confirmed the continuation of DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia. Successfully deceived Turkey into believing I will hold A SER and F AEG, while Turkey reportedly plans to order A BUL - SER, which will bounce against my supported attack.
Intent: Execute the attack on Turkey. Order A SER - BUL supported by F AEG and Russia's F RUM. Move F ALB - GRE to position for next year. Hold A BUD and A VIE to respect DMZs with Germany and Russia.

[F1902M] Fall 1902 confirmed the absolute reliability of my allies. Italy flawlessly executed the Lepanto, successfully convoying their Tunis army to Syria. Russia also honored our agreement, providing F RUM support for my strike on Bulgaria. 

Unfortunately, my attack on Bulgaria bounced. Turkey anticipated the assault and formed an impenetrable defensive shell, supporting Bulgaria with both Constantinople and the Black Sea to match our combined strength of three. While I failed to secure a build this year, the strategic victory is immense. Turkey is now completely flanked by Italy in Syria and faces a united Austro-Russian-Italian front. They cannot defend against all of us simultaneously next year.

Germany and Russia continue to respect our northern DMZs, allowing me to keep Vienna and Budapest in defensive holds. For 1903, I must coordinate closely with Italy and Russia to exploit Turkey's stretched defenses and finally crack Bulgaria or Constantinople.

goals: Capture St. Petersburg using the northern fleets (BAR and NWG).
Secure the English Channel and defend home centers against the French fleet.
Maintain the strong alliance with Germany to dismantle France.
Hold Belgium securely as a defensive anchor.
full_private_diary:
[S1901M] France: Agreed to DMZ English Channel; France is moving F BRE to MAO. Germany: Agreed to split Low Countries (England gets Belgium, Germany gets Holland) and respect claims to Norway/Denmark; Germany shared opening moves (F KIE-DEN, A BER-KIE, A MUN-RUH). Russia: Agreed to a northern non-aggression pact (England takes Norway, Russia takes Sweden); Russia moving F STP/SC to BOT. Italy, Austria, Turkey: Established friendly communications, with Turkey and Austria agreeing to keep Russia busy in the south.
Intent: Execute the agreed-upon northern opening: F EDI - NWG, F LON - NTH, A LVP - YOR. This honors the ENG DMZ with France, sets up for Norway and Belgium as discussed with Germany, and respects the Scandinavian split with Russia.

[S1901M] Spring 1901 went perfectly according to plan, with all neighbors honoring our agreements. The English Channel remains a DMZ, as France moved to MAO and PIC. Germany executed their exact shared moves (DEN, KIE, RUH), setting up our agreed split of the Low Countries where I will take Belgium and they take Holland. Russia moved to the Gulf of Bothnia, respecting our Scandinavian arrangement and leaving Norway uncontested for my fleet in the Norwegian Sea.

My strategic position is incredibly strong. I am perfectly positioned to secure both Norway (via F NWG) and Belgium (convoying A YOR via F NTH) this Fall. Trust with France, Germany, and Russia is currently high. My immediate goal is to secure these two builds and observe the Fall moves to decide whether to ally with Germany against France, France against Germany, or push against Russia in Scandinavia.

[F1901M] France agreed to support my convoy to Belgium (A PIC S A YOR - BEL) and confirmed their orders. Germany confirmed they will take Holland (A KIE - HOL, A RUH S A KIE - HOL) and leave Belgium to me. Russia confirmed they will take Sweden and leave Norway to me. Turkey is eager to coordinate a crossfire on Russia in 1902, which I agreed to consider. Italy was a friendly check-in.
Intent: Execute the agreed-upon moves to secure two builds: F NWG - NWY, F NTH C A YOR - BEL, and A YOR - BEL. Rely on French support (A PIC S A YOR - BEL) to guarantee Belgium.

[F1901M] Fall 1901 went flawlessly. France, Germany, and Russia all honored our agreements to the letter. France provided the promised support for my convoy into Belgium, Germany took Holland while respecting my claim to Belgium, and Russia took Sweden while leaving Norway to me. I successfully secured both target supply centers and will have two builds this winter.

My strategic position is exceptional, and trust with my immediate neighbors is currently very high. The English Channel remains clear. In the east, Turkey and Russia are already clashing over Romania, which keeps Russia distracted and fulfills Turkey's promise to apply pressure.

With two builds incoming, I must now decide my mid-term direction. I can ally with Germany against France, ally with France against Germany, or launch a northern campaign against Russia while they are occupied in the south. I will use the Winter build phase to position my new units and solidify my next alliance.

[S1902M] Successfully orchestrated a clash between France and Germany over Burgundy (France ordered A PAR - BUR; Germany ordered A MUN - BUR supported by A RUH). Reaffirmed the English Channel DMZ with France (F BRE moving to MAO). Convinced Russia of peaceful intentions in Scandinavia while secretly coordinating with Turkey to launch a massive northern offensive against St. Petersburg and Sweden, capitalizing on Russia's southern distraction.
Intent: Execute the northern fleet maneuver to surround Russia: F NWY - BAR, F EDI - NWG, F NTH - SKA, and F LON - NTH. Hold A BEL to maintain a secure border and anchor the line while France and Germany clash in Burgundy.

[S1902M] France has completely betrayed our trust, breaking the English Channel DMZ with F BRE - ENG and launching an unprovoked attack on Belgium (A PIC - BEL). Fortunately, my hold in Belgium bounced their attack, but the western front is now highly volatile and my home centers are threatened. 

In the north, my fleet maneuvers executed flawlessly, positioning me in BAR, NWG, SKA, and NTH. However, Russia anticipated the aggression, reinforcing St. Petersburg (A MOS - STP) and Livonia. 

With France turning hostile, my strategic priorities must shift immediately. I must ally closely with Germany, who successfully forced Burgundy and is now in a prime position to pressure France from the east. I need to secure my home centers against the French fleet in the Channel while deciding whether to press the attack on Russia's St. Petersburg/Sweden or redirect northern fleets to crush France. Trust in France is permanently shattered.

[F1902M] Germany is fully committed to an alliance against France; they agreed to support A BEL to hold with A HOL, attack PAR with A BUR (supported by RUH), and hold F HEL and F DEN to keep NTH clear for me. France apologized for moving to ENG, blaming false intel, and promised to move F ENG to MAO to defend against Germany. I agreed to a fake truce with Russia in Scandinavia to lower their guard, while secretly confirming with Turkey that I will attack St. Petersburg this phase.
Intent: Order F NWG - STP supported by F BAR to capitalize on the northern position and capture St. Petersburg. Order F NTH - ENG to either kick France out or take the Channel if they actually retreat to MAO as promised. Order F SKA - NTH to backfill and secure the North Sea. Order A BEL to hold, relying on Germany's promised support from HOL.

[F1902M] France's deception was absolute. Instead of retreating from the Channel as promised, they slipped F ENG into London and moved F MAO to the Irish Sea. Losing my capital is a devastating blow, leaving my remaining home centers critically vulnerable. I should have covered London directly instead of gambling on their retreat. 

On the continent, Germany proved their loyalty by supporting Belgium against another French attack, cementing our alliance. In the north, my assault on St. Petersburg failed as Russia heavily reinforced it with Livonia. 

With the loss of London, I am forced into a deficit and must disband a unit. My entire strategic focus must now shift to survival. I must abandon the Russian campaign, pull my northern fleets back to defend Edinburgh and Liverpool, and work closely with Germany to pressure France and reclaim my homeland. France is now an existential threat that must be eliminated.

goals: Capture London from England
Capture Belgium with German support
Defend Paris and Marseilles from potential German betrayal
Maintain southern DMZs with Italy
full_private_diary:
[S1901M] Successfully negotiated DMZs on all key borders: English Channel with England, Burgundy with Germany, and Piedmont/Gulf of Lyon/Tyrrhenian Sea with Italy. England confirmed F LON to NTH and F EDI to NWG. Austria confirmed Italy is focusing East. Russia expressed interest in an alliance against England/Germany. Turkey warned about Italy, but Austria's intel contradicts this.
Intent: Execute a standard peaceful opening to secure Iberia while respecting all agreed DMZs. F BRE to MAO, A MAR to SPA, and A PAR to PIC or GAS.

[S1901M] Spring 1901 went perfectly according to plan. All negotiated DMZs were strictly respected: England stayed out of the English Channel, Germany avoided Burgundy, and Italy kept clear of Piedmont, the Gulf of Lyon, and the Tyrrhenian Sea. Italy's moves (F NAP-ION, A ROM-APU, A VEN Hold) confirm their eastern focus, validating Austria's earlier intel and completely securing my southern flank. 

My opening (F MAO, A SPA, A PIC) positions me ideally for the Fall. I am guaranteed to secure both Spain and Portugal for two builds. Meanwhile, A PIC gives me a strong voice in the fate of Belgium. Germany's move to Ruhr and England's fleet in the North Sea mean Belgium will be heavily contested. My next step is to negotiate with England and Germany to either secure Belgium for myself or use my influence to cement a strong western alliance. Trust with my neighbors is currently high.

[F1901M] Successfully negotiated a cooperative Fall phase. Agreed to support England's convoy into Belgium (A PIC S A YOR - BEL) to cement a long-term alliance. Germany is taking Holland and respects the Belgium arrangement. Italy confirmed they are taking Tunis and holding Venice, maintaining our DMZs in PIE, GOL, and TYS. Austria and Russia confirmed Turkey stabbed Russia in the Black Sea; Austria is focusing on the Balkans.
Intent: Execute agreed-upon moves: F MAO - POR and A SPA Hold to secure two builds from Iberia. Order A PIC S A YOR - BEL to fulfill my promise to England and solidify our alliance.

[F1901M] [F1901M] The Fall phase unfolded exactly as planned, marking a resounding success for French diplomacy. I secured both Portugal and Spain, guaranteeing two builds. Crucially, my support for England's convoy into Belgium succeeded, cementing our alliance and building immense trust. Germany respected this arrangement by taking Holland, and Italy kept their word by taking Tunis while holding Venice, leaving our DMZs in Piedmont, the Gulf of Lyon, and the Tyrrhenian Sea completely intact. 

With the West entirely peaceful and my borders secure, my strategic position is incredibly strong. The successful collaboration with England opens the door for a joint campaign, potentially against Germany or Italy, depending on the upcoming builds. My immediate focus is to build a fleet in Brest and an army in Paris or Marseilles to capitalize on this momentum while maintaining the trust of my neighbors. The East remains embroiled in conflict, giving the Western powers a distinct advantage.

[S1902M] England believes we are allied and coordinating against Germany; they plan to move their fleets North (EDI-NWG, LON-NTH, NTH-SKA) and hold A BEL, expecting me to move A PAR-BUR and F BRE-MAO. However, I have agreed with Germany to keep Burgundy empty and move F BRE-ENG to counter England's 4 fleets. I also informed Russia of England's exact northern fleet movements and my intent to move to the Channel to relieve pressure on them. Italy and I reaffirmed our DMZs in PIE, GOL, and TYS.
Intent: Stab England. Order F BRE - ENG to take control of the Channel while England moves North. Keep Burgundy empty to maintain the alliance with Germany (order A PAR - PIC or GAS). Order A PIC - BEL to attempt to dislodge England's army, or hold to support a future attack. Move F POR - MAO and A SPA - GAS to bring Iberian forces north for the campaign against England.

[S1902M] The Spring 1902 phase brought both triumph and disaster. My stab against England was perfectly executed: they moved their fleets north as promised, allowing me to slip into the English Channel unopposed. However, this naval victory was immediately overshadowed by a blatant German betrayal. Despite our explicit agreement to keep Burgundy demilitarized, Germany forced their way into BUR with support from Ruhr. 

My strategic position is now highly precarious. By stabbing England and being stabbed by Germany simultaneously, I face a dangerous two-front war in the West. My attack on Belgium bounced, and my armies are now scrambling to adjust. 

Moving forward, I must prioritize defending Paris and Marseilles from the German army in Burgundy. I need to urgently open diplomatic channels to see if I can salvage a truce with either England or Germany, as fighting both will be disastrous. Fortunately, my Iberian forces (now in MAO and GAS) have successfully moved north and are well-positioned to assist in the defense.

[F1902M] Successfully deceived England into believing a truce is in place, promising to retreat F ENG to MAO and leave BEL alone. Meanwhile, negotiated a truce and alliance with Germany against England; Germany promised to order A BUR S A PIC - BEL and A RUH - MUN. Informed Russia of the impending attack on London to coordinate pressure on England. Italy reaffirmed southern DMZs but cannot assist against Germany.
Intent: Stab England by ordering F ENG - LON and A PIC - BEL, capitalizing on England's false sense of security and Germany's promised support. Defend home centers against a potential German double-cross by keeping A PAR holding and moving A GAS to MAR or holding. F MAO will move to IRI or hold to maintain naval presence.

[F1902M] The Fall 1902 phase brought a major victory but confirmed my worst fears about Germany. My stab against England succeeded brilliantly, with my fleet capturing London! However, Germany blatantly lied once again. Instead of supporting my attack on Belgium as promised, they used Holland to support the English army in BEL and launched another unprovoked attack on Paris from Burgundy. Germany is entirely untrustworthy and is clearly coordinating with England against me. 

While taking London secures a crucial build and cripples England's home centers, England managed to slip into the English Channel behind me. I now face a solidified Anglo-German alliance. My immediate priority is to leverage my incoming build to defend Brest and Picardy from the Channel and Burgundy, while using F LON and F IRI to continue dismantling England. I must urgently reach out to Russia to increase pressure on both England and Germany from the East.

goals: Capture Paris to cripple France
Maintain the Anglo-German alliance to secure the West
Preserve eastern DMZs with Austria and Russia
Subtly encourage friction between Austria, Italy, and Russia to prevent an Eastern juggernaut
full_private_diary:
[S1901M] Successfully negotiated DMZs across the board: Bohemia/Tyrolia with Austria, Burgundy with France, Prussia/Silesia with Russia, and Tyrolia with Italy. Reached an agreement with England to split the Low Countries (England gets Belgium, Germany gets Holland) and with Russia to allow them Sweden. Shared intelligence with Turkey regarding Austrian and Russian moves.
Intent: Execute the agreed-upon opening: F KIE - DEN, A BER - KIE, A MUN - RUH. This respects all DMZs (Burgundy, Bohemia, Tyrolia, Prussia, Silesia) while setting up to secure Denmark and Holland in the Fall.

[S1901M] Spring 1901 went exactly as planned. All negotiated DMZs—Burgundy with France, Bohemia/Tyrolia with Austria, and Prussia/Silesia with Russia—were completely respected, establishing a strong foundation of trust across the board. My opening moves (F KIE-DEN, A BER-KIE, A MUN-RUH) succeeded without a hitch. 

England and France both executed standard openings and are now positioned to contest Belgium. I will proceed with our agreement to take Holland while allowing England to take Belgium, though I must watch France's army in Picardy carefully. Russia moved to the Gulf of Bothnia, and I will honor our agreement to let them take Sweden. 

Overall, my strategic position is excellent. I am guaranteed two builds (Denmark and Holland) and have maintained friendly relations with all neighbors. The key for the Fall will be securing my centers while observing how the Anglo-French dynamic over Belgium unfolds.

[F1901M] Successfully confirmed all Spring agreements for the Fall. England will convoy to Belgium while I take Holland. France is allowing England to take Belgium and focusing on Iberia, keeping Picardy out of the way and maintaining the Burgundy DMZ. Russia is taking Sweden uncontested while I secure Denmark, and plans a southern build. Austria and Italy confirmed the continuation of our DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia. Turkey is working with Austria against Russia and we agreed to share intelligence.
Intent: Execute the agreed-upon moves to secure my two builds: A KIE - HOL, A RUH S A KIE - HOL, and F DEN holds. This guarantees Holland and Denmark while honoring my agreements to let England take Belgium and Russia take Sweden, and maintaining all established DMZs.

[F1901M] Fall 1901 went exactly as planned for my own centers: I secured Holland and Denmark, guaranteeing two builds. All established DMZs with France, Austria, and Russia held firm, maintaining a peaceful perimeter. 

However, a major strategic threat has emerged: France actively supported England's convoy into Belgium. This strongly suggests an Anglo-French alliance, which is traditionally very dangerous for Germany. England and France both secured two builds, matching my growth, and their cooperation in the Low Countries is a red flag. 

Russia also secured two builds (Sweden and Romania) and successfully defended against a Turkish attack, making them the board leader at six centers. 

My immediate priority is to address the potential Anglo-French threat. I must use my two builds to prepare defenses in the west while actively negotiating to break up their alliance. I will reach out to Russia and Italy to form a counter-coalition, while probing England and France to see who might be willing to turn on the other.

[S1902M] Agreed with England to launch a surprise attack on France by moving into Burgundy, while England holds Belgium and sends fleets north against Russia. Deceived France into believing Burgundy will remain a DMZ and that my armies will hold defensively, while encouraging them to move F BRE to ENG. Confirmed DMZs with Austria (Bohemia/Tyrolia) and Italy (Tyrolia). Agreed with Russia to maintain a peaceful north (F DEN holds, F SWE holds). Turkey confirmed England's fleets are heading north to attack Russia.
Intent: Execute the surprise attack on France: A MUN - BUR supported by A RUH. Move F KIE - HEL to establish a naval presence and defend the coast. Hold F DEN as agreed with Russia. Hold A HOL to secure the border with Belgium.

[S1902M] The surprise attack on France was a resounding success! I successfully occupied Burgundy, catching France completely off guard. Even better, France attempted to attack Belgium, confirming the end of the Anglo-French alliance. England kept their word, holding Belgium and committing a massive fleet presence (NTH, NWG, BAR, SKA) to a northern campaign against Russia. 

My strategic position is now excellent. With armies in Burgundy, Ruhr, and Holland, I am perfectly positioned to dismantle France alongside England. However, I must remain vigilant: England's overwhelming naval presence in the north could easily pivot toward Denmark or Helgoland if our alliance sours. 

Moving into the Fall, my priority is to coordinate with England to secure French centers (Paris or Picardy) while ensuring my northern flank remains secure. I will maintain my friendly relations with Austria, Italy, and Russia to keep the east quiet while I focus on the western offensive.

[F1902M] Agreed with England to attack France: A BUR - PAR supported by A RUH, while A HOL supports English A BEL to hold. England will move F NTH - ENG and F SKA - NTH. Deceived France into believing I will support A PIC - BEL with A BUR and retreat A RUH - MUN. France revealed plans to move F ENG - LON and A PIC - BEL. Maintained DMZs with Austria (Bohemia/Tyrolia) and Russia (Prussia/Silesia/Baltic). Warned Russia and Italy about Austria's rapid growth to help Turkey and sow discord in the East.
Intent: Execute the attack on France in coordination with England. Order A BUR - PAR supported by A RUH. Order A HOL to support English A BEL to hold, defending against France's planned A PIC - BEL. Hold F HEL and F DEN to maintain the northern DMZ with Russia and avoid bouncing England's F SKA - NTH.

[F1902M] The Fall 1902 phase brought a shocking development in the West: France successfully slipped into London! While England and I coordinated our moves—with my A HOL successfully supporting English A BEL against the French attack from Picardy—France's bold F ENG - LON maneuver caught England off guard. 

My own offensive stalled. My attack on Paris failed due to a lack of support, as A RUH attempted to move into Burgundy instead of supporting the assault. I must be far more meticulous with my order writing to avoid such costly tactical errors. 

Despite England losing their home center, our alliance remains intact and vital. France is now dangerously strong at six centers. I must work closely with England to help them reclaim London while renewing our coordinated assault on Paris and Picardy. Meanwhile, in the East, Austria, Russia, and Italy are rapidly dismantling Turkey. I must monitor their growth carefully, as an Eastern juggernaut could soon threaten my borders.
