full_private_diary:
[S1901M] Austria: Agreed to DMZ Galicia; I informed them of my WAR-UKR move. England: Agreed to a northern non-aggression pact where England takes Norway and I take Sweden (STP-BOT). Germany: Agreed to DMZ Prussia and Silesia; Germany supports my claim to Sweden. Turkey: After some confusion, we finalized a DMZ in the Black Sea; Turkey will move ANK-CON and I will move SEV-RUM. Italy & France: Friendly introductory talks, keeping options open for future coordination.
Intent: I will fulfill my negotiated agreements: F STP/SC - BOT (aiming for Sweden), A WAR - UKR (respecting Galicia DMZ), and F SEV - RUM (respecting BLA DMZ). I will also order A MOS - SEV to provide backup in the south and prepare for Fall.

[S1901M] Turkey blatantly betrayed our Black Sea DMZ agreement by moving F ANK - BLA, while I kept my word and moved F SEV - RUM. This immediately marks Turkey as untrustworthy and hostile. Fortunately, my A MOS - SEV move succeeded, providing crucial defense for Sevastopol against their fleet. 

On a positive note, my other neighbors proved reliable. Austria respected the Galicia DMZ, Germany honored the Prussia/Silesia DMZ, and England followed through on our northern non-aggression pact. 

My strategic position in the north is secure, and I am poised to take Sweden with F BOT. In the south, however, I must pivot to an anti-Turkish stance. I need to solidify an alliance with Austria to counter Turkey's aggression, ensure I secure Romania this fall, and coordinate a defense or counterattack against the Turkish fleet in the Black Sea.

[F1901M] Austria and Italy are fully committed to an anti-Turkish alliance, with Italy executing a Lepanto and Austria taking Greece. Austria warned me that Turkey confided plans to attack RUM with A BUL supported by F BLA. Turkey claims they are moving F BLA back to ANK to apologize for their Spring lie, but I am treating this as deception. England and Germany are honoring our northern agreements, leaving Sweden open for me while they take Norway and Denmark/Holland respectively.
Intent: I will fulfill my northern agreements by ordering F BOT - SWE. In the south, I will heavily defend Romania against the anticipated Turkish attack by ordering F RUM to hold, supported by both A SEV and A UKR.

[F1901M] Turkey's deception was fully exposed this phase. As Austria warned, Turkey attacked Romania with A BUL supported by F BLA. Fortunately, my heavy defense—supported by both Sevastopol and Ukraine—held firm, securing Romania. Austria's accurate intelligence cements them as a valuable and trustworthy ally. Italy also successfully executed their Lepanto opening by taking Tunis, setting the stage for our joint anti-Turkish campaign in 1902.

In the north, England and Germany honored our agreements, allowing me to take Sweden without contest. I now hold 6 supply centers and will gain two builds. 

My strategic position is excellent. I will use my builds to reinforce the southern front against Turkey, likely adding a fleet in Sevastopol to challenge the Black Sea, and an army to support the Austrian push. I must maintain my peaceful northern borders while focusing entirely on dismantling Turkey.

[S1902M] Austria (Ally) shared Turkey's exact orders (BUL-RUM, BLA S BUL-RUM, CON-BUL, SMY-CON) and is moving SER-BUL and GRE-AEG to disrupt them; we agreed I will heavily defend RUM and keep GAL empty. Italy (Ally) is executing a Lepanto (ION-EAS, NAP-ION). Turkey (Enemy) agreed to a fake truce (BLA-ANK, BUL H) which I am ignoring. France (Friendly) warned me that England (Unfriendly) is launching a massive naval attack on Scandinavia (EDI-NWG, LON-NTH, NTH-SKA) and is moving to the English Channel to assist me. Germany (Friendly) is forming a defensive wall against England (KIE-HEL, DEN H) and I agreed to hold SWE.
Intent: Heavily defend Romania against Turkey's 2-unit attack: F RUM H, A UKR S F RUM, A SEV S F RUM. Prepare defenses against England's incoming fleets: A MOS - STP. Maintain the defensive line with Germany: F SWE H. Respect the Galicia DMZ with Austria: A WAR - LVN.

[S1902M] Spring 1902 results confirm the strength and reliability of the Austro-Italian-Russian alliance. Austria's intelligence was perfectly accurate: Turkey attacked Romania with Black Sea support, but my heavy three-unit defense held flawlessly. Austria and Italy successfully executed their naval maneuvers into the Aegean and Eastern Mediterranean, effectively bottling up Turkey. I will continue to trust and coordinate with them to dismantle the Turkish threat.

In the north, France's warning about England was entirely correct. England has launched a massive naval invasion, moving fleets to the Barents Sea, Norwegian Sea, and Skagerrak. St. Petersburg and Sweden are now under severe threat. Fortunately, my preemptive move of an army to St. Petersburg succeeded, providing crucial defense. France's move to the English Channel is a welcome distraction for England. 

My strategic priority must now balance surviving England's northern assault while maintaining the southern push. I need to coordinate with Germany to defend Scandinavia and encourage France's anti-English campaign.

[F1902M] Austria and I agreed to a coordinated attack on Bulgaria: I will order F RUM S A SER - BUL, while Austria orders A SER - BUL and F AEG S A SER - BUL. Italy is convoying A TUN - SYR to further crush Turkey. Turkey is panicking and believes I am holding RUM and SEV, stating he will order F BLA H and A BUL H. In the north, England agreed to a truce in Scandinavia to deal with France in the English Channel, and Germany confirmed England is retreating F SKA - NTH. France is attacking London. Germany is holding F DEN and F HEL to maintain our DMZ.
Intent: Execute the coordinated attack on Turkey by ordering F RUM S A SER - BUL. Defend against any potential Turkish desperation moves with A SEV S F RUM and A UKR S F RUM. In the north, honor the Scandinavian truce and defensive lines by ordering F SWE H, A STP H, and A LVN S A STP.

[F1902M] Fall 1902 results confirm the absolute strength of the Austro-Italian-Russian alliance, though our enemies remain stubborn. Austria and I perfectly executed our coordinated 3-unit attack on Bulgaria. Unfortunately, Turkey anticipated this and mounted a 3-unit defense, resulting in a bounce. However, Italy successfully convoyed an army into Syria, landing directly behind Turkish lines! This brilliant maneuver will surely break the Turkish stalemate next year.

In the north, England completely betrayed our Scandinavian truce by attacking St. Petersburg from the Barents Sea. Thankfully, my defensive hold kept the city secure. England's treachery will cost him dearly, as France successfully invaded and captured London this phase. 

My strategic position remains highly secure. I must continue to hold the line in the north against a now-crippled England while letting France dismantle him. In the south, I will coordinate with Austria and Italy to leverage our new Syrian foothold and finally crush Turkey.

[S1903M] Austria and Italy are fully committed to crushing Turkey. Austria will order A SER - BUL supported by F AEG and F GRE. Italy will order A SYR - SMY supported by F EAS. I have agreed to support Austria's attack with F RUM and move A SEV - ARM to pressure Turkey's eastern flank. Turkey believes I am holding RUM and moving A UKR - GAL, and claims they will order A BUL H, F BLA S A BUL, A CON S A BUL. In the north, England apologized for their previous attack, disbanded F BAR, and agreed to a strict NAP where they hold NWY and I hold SWE and STP. Germany and France are fighting each other; Germany agreed to maintain our DMZs, and I declined France's request to attack Germany or Norway to focus on Turkey.
Intent: Execute the coordinated attack on Turkey by ordering F RUM S A SER - BUL and A SEV - ARM. Move A UKR - SEV to backfill and prepare for future southern operations. In the north, honor the NAP with England and DMZs with Germany by ordering F SWE H, A STP H, and A LVN H.

[S1903M] The Austro-Italian-Russian alliance executed flawlessly this spring. Austria captured Bulgaria with my support from Romania, and Italy successfully landed in Smyrna. Turkey's defensive lines are completely broken, and they will face severe disbandments this winter. My move to Armenia positions me perfectly to pressure Ankara or the Black Sea next phase, ensuring I get my share of the Turkish spoils.

In the north, England honored our non-aggression pact, holding Norway while successfully retaking London from France. Germany and France remain locked in a border war, with Germany surprisingly supporting English control of Belgium. 

My strategic position is highly secure, but Austria's rapid expansion in the Balkans (now holding Serbia, Greece, and Bulgaria) is a growing concern. I must maintain our alliance to finish off Turkey, but I need to remain vigilant regarding Galicia and Romania. My immediate priority is securing Ankara for myself before my allies consume the rest of the board.

[F1903M] Austria and Italy are holding their newly acquired Turkish centers (BUL and SMY) with heavy support. Turkey has been deceived into believing I will hold my units, and they have confirmed they will order A CON - BUL supported by F BLA. This leaves the Black Sea and Ankara vulnerable. In the north, England and Germany have both agreed to maintain our NAPs and DMZs, keeping their units focused on their war with France. France requested I attack England or Germany, but I declined to focus on Turkey.
Intent: Execute the final strike on Turkey by ordering A ARM - ANK and F RUM - BLA (supported by A SEV). Since Turkey's F BLA is busy supporting an attack on Bulgaria, my attack on BLA will succeed and dislodge their fleet, while ARM walks into Ankara. In the north, honor the NAPs and DMZs by ordering F SWE Hold, A STP Hold, and A LVN Hold.

[F1903M] The Austro-Italian-Russian alliance has effectively neutralized Turkey. I successfully captured Ankara, reducing Turkey to a single supply center (Constantinople). My attempt to take the Black Sea (F RUM - BLA) bounced because Turkey played defensively, ordering F BLA to support A CON instead of attacking Bulgaria as they had claimed. Regardless, their defensive lines are shattered, and they will face disbandments.

In the north, the situation remains stable. England and Germany honored our non-aggression pacts and demilitarized zones, focusing entirely on their conflict with France. 

My strategic position is excellent. I will gain a build this winter, bringing me to 7 supply centers. Italy is already shifting units west (to Piedmont and Gulf of Lyon), signaling trust in our southern coalition. My immediate priority is to secure the Black Sea, eliminate Turkey's final center, and carefully manage my relationship with a growing Austria as we transition into the mid-game.

[S1904M] Austria and I agreed to eliminate Turkey; I promised to support his A BUL - CON with A ANK, while moving F SEV to BLA. Turkey begged for my A ANK to support his A CON to hold, which I agreed to in messages but intend to betray. Italy is holding SMY/EAS and focusing on France. France is facing a 3v1 (E/G/I) and begged for help; I promised to shift northern forces to pressure England. England and Germany reaffirmed our NAPs/DMZs, but I plan to break the NAP with England to assist France.
Intent: Eliminate Turkey by ordering A ANK S A BUL - CON. Secure the Black Sea with F SEV - BLA and F RUM S F SEV - BLA. Hold A ARM. In the north, break the NAP with England to relieve France by ordering F SWE - NWY and A STP - FIN. Maintain the DMZ with Germany by holding A LVN.

[S1904M] Spring 1904 went exactly to plan on my end, but the global board state has shifted dramatically. I successfully supported Austria into Constantinople, finally eliminating Turkey, and secured the Black Sea. In the north, I executed my planned stab on England, capturing Norway to relieve pressure on France. 

However, France is collapsing faster than expected, losing Marseilles to Italy and Burgundy to Germany. The biggest shock of the season was Austria stabbing Italy by walking into Venice! Austria's explosive growth—taking both Constantinople and Venice this turn—makes them the most dangerous power on the board. 

With Turkey gone, my southeastern flank is secure, but Austria's unchecked expansion is a massive looming threat. I must fortify Galicia and Romania immediately. In the north, I need to decide whether to continue pressing a distracted England or consolidate my forces to prepare for an inevitable clash with Austria. Germany remains a reliable buffer for now.

goals: Survive by holding CON at all costs
Exploit the growing tension between Austria and Russia over who gets CON
Continue warning England and Germany about Russia's rapid growth to 7 SCs
full_private_diary:
[S1901M] Formed a strong alliance with Austria against Russia; Austria is opening BUD-SER and TRI-ALB. Successfully deceived Russia into agreeing to a Black Sea DMZ (they plan to move SEV-RUM), which I will violate to sneak into BLA. Agreed to an Eastern Mediterranean DMZ with Italy. Established friendly, intelligence-sharing relationships with Germany and England, both of whom are supportive of containing Russia.
Intent: Order F ANK - BLA (betraying the DMZ agreement with Russia), A CON - BUL, and A SMY - CON to follow up and support the Balkan push.

[S1901M] The Spring 1901 phase went exactly according to plan. My alliance with Austria proved solid, as they executed their promised Balkan opening (SER, ALB, BUD) flawlessly. Meanwhile, my deception against Russia was a complete success: I violated our agreed DMZ and slipped F ANK into the Black Sea (BLA) while they moved F SEV to RUM and A MOS to SEV. Italy also respected our Eastern Mediterranean DMZ, moving to ION and APU instead.

My strategic position is now incredibly strong. Controlling BLA and BUL gives me immense leverage over Russia in the upcoming Fall phase. Austria has proven to be a highly trustworthy ally, and Italy appears reliable for now. Russia is now a confirmed enemy, but they are on the back foot. My next step is to coordinate with Austria to strike RUM or SEV, secure my build in BUL, and maintain friendly relations with Italy to keep my western flank secure.

[F1901M] Successfully coordinated with Austria for a joint effort against Russia. Austria will order F ALB - GRE (supported by SER) and hold BUD. I have agreed with Austria to attack RUM (A BUL - RUM supported by F BLA) and follow up with A CON - BUL. I deceived Russia by apologizing for the Spring BLA move and promising to retreat F BLA to ANK, while Russia stated they will hold RUM with support. Maintained friendly relations and DMZ agreements with Italy (who is convoying to Tunis) and established good rapport with England and Germany for future containment of Russia.
Intent: Order A BUL - RUM supported by F BLA, and A CON - BUL. This fulfills my agreement with Austria to pressure Russia and completely violates my false promise to Russia to retreat F BLA to ANK.

[F1901M] The Fall 1901 phase solidified the battle lines in the East. As planned, I attacked Rumania with support from the Black Sea, completely ignoring my false promise to Russia. However, Russia anticipated the betrayal and heavily defended Rumania with both Sevastopol and Ukraine, resulting in a bounce. Consequently, my army in Constantinople also bounced trying to enter Bulgaria. Despite this tactical stalemate, I successfully secured Bulgaria for a build.

Austria executed their moves perfectly, taking Greece and securing their position in the Balkans. Our alliance remains strong and vital. Italy also kept their word, convoying to Tunis and respecting our Eastern Mediterranean DMZ. 

Russia is proving to be a resilient enemy. To break their defensive line in 1902, I must coordinate joint attacks with Austria, leveraging our combined forces against Rumania or Sevastopol. I will build to reinforce my front lines and continue diplomatic outreach to Germany and England to pressure Russia's northern flank.

[S1902M] Solidified the Austro-Turkish alliance with a coordinated attack plan on Rumania. Austria will support my A BUL - RUM with A SER and A BUD. I successfully deceived Russia into a fake truce, promising to retreat F BLA to ANK and hold A BUL, in exchange for them moving A UKR - GAL and A SEV - UKR, which should leave RUM vulnerable. Italy confirmed they are moving F NAP - TYS and holding F ION, respecting our East Med DMZ. England is moving fleets north to attack St. Petersburg and Sweden. Germany is defensive against an Anglo-French alliance but might feint towards Silesia.
Intent: Execute the coordinated attack on Rumania with Austria and betray the fake truce with Russia. Order A BUL - RUM supported by F BLA. Order F SMY - CON and A CON - BUL to reinforce the front lines.

[S1902M] [F1902M] Massive betrayal! The Austro-Turkish alliance was a complete lie. Austria broke our agreement to support my attack on Rumania, instead attacking Bulgaria from Serbia and moving a fleet to the Aegean Sea. Worse, Italy blatantly violated our Eastern Mediterranean DMZ, moving fleets to the East Med and Ionian. This is clearly a highly coordinated Austro-Italian campaign against me. Meanwhile, Russia didn't fall for my deception and heavily defended Rumania, causing my attack to bounce. 

My strategic position has drastically deteriorated. I am now facing a severe naval and land invasion from Italy and Austria, while deadlocked with Russia in the north. I must immediately shift to a defensive posture to protect my home centers. My top diplomatic priority is to urgently make peace with Russia—I need them to stop our conflict so I can focus entirely on repelling the Austro-Italian threat. Austria and Italy are completely untrustworthy.

[F1902M] Austria apologized for the stab, claiming panic, and promised to hold A SER and F AEG this Fall. Italy admitted to an alliance with Austria and Russia, refused to retreat from EAS, but promised to hold EAS this phase. Russia agreed to a truce, promising to hold RUM and SEV while I promised to hold BLA and BUL. England and Germany are friendly and have agreed to apply diplomatic pressure on Russia and Italy to turn them against Austria.
Intent: Defend against the Austro-Italian invasion. Despite Austria, Italy, and Russia all promising to hold their bordering units (AEG, SER, EAS, RUM, SEV), I must assume they are lying and coordinating an attack. I will order A BUL H supported by F BLA and A CON. F SMY will hold to protect against an attack from EAS.

[F1902M] [F1902M] The Austro-Italian-Russian alliance is real and highly coordinated. All three blatantly lied about their promises to hold. Austria and Russia launched a massive joint strike on Bulgaria, with A SER supported by F AEG and F RUM. Fortunately, my rigid defense (A BUL supported by F BLA and A CON) held them to a 3v3 bounce, saving the center. 

However, the biggest shock was Italy, who executed a devastating convoy of A TUN to SYR via the Ionian and Eastern Med. I now have an Italian army entrenched behind my lines, threatening Smyrna and my entire rear. 

My position is critical. I am completely surrounded by a unified three-power coalition. I must contain the Italian army in Syria while maintaining the Bulgarian frontline. My only hope for survival is if the Western powers immediately attack Russia or Italy to relieve this immense pressure. I must play purely for survival.

[S1903M] Austria agreed to a truce, promising to hold A SER and F AEG while expecting me to attack Italy. Italy also agreed to a truce, promising to hold F EAS and A SYR and move F ION - TYS, expecting me to hold F SMY and A CON. Russia agreed to hold F RUM and move A UKR - GAL, expecting me to hold A BUL defensively. Despite these promises, their coordinated attack last year means I cannot trust any of them. Germany and England are fighting a strong France and are encouraging Italy to move West.
Intent: Maintain a rigid, impenetrable defense. I will order A BUL to Hold, supported by F BLA and A CON to defend against any combined Austro-Russian assault. I will order F SMY to Hold to protect against Italy's F EAS and A SYR. I will not risk any offensive moves that could compromise my defensive line.

[S1903M] The Austro-Italian-Russian juggernaut has crushed my defenses. Despite their promises of a truce, Austria, Italy, and Russia coordinated a massive, lethal strike. Austria's A SER, supported by F AEG, F GRE, and Russia's F RUM, overpowered my 3-unit defense of Bulgaria. Simultaneously, Italy's A SYR and F EAS dislodged my fleet in Smyrna. 

I have lost both BUL and SMY, reducing me to just two units: F BLA and A CON. The AIR alliance is rock-solid, entirely hostile, and completely untrustworthy; their diplomatic overtures were nothing but a smokescreen for my annihilation. 

My strategic position is in ruins. Survival now depends on holding Constantinople and Ankara for as long as possible, but I am vastly outnumbered. I must continue begging England and Germany to attack Russia and Italy to create any sort of distraction, though it may already be too late to save Turkey.

[F1903M] Russia encouraged me to attack BUL (A CON - BUL, F BLA S A CON - BUL) while promising to hold their units. Austria encouraged me to defend against Russia while promising to hold BUL. Italy promised to hold SMY and F EAS to secure a build, claiming they are pivoting West. England and Germany are too busy fighting France to help directly, though Germany successfully convinced Italy to move West.
Intent: Ignore Russia's trap to attack BUL, which would leave CON vulnerable or cut my own defensive supports. Instead, order A CON S F BLA and F BLA S A CON to maximize defensive strength against likely coordinated Austro-Russian attacks.

[F1903M] The Austro-Italian-Russian alliance continues its relentless assault. This phase, Russia marched into Ankara (A ARM - ANK) while attempting to dislodge my fleet in the Black Sea (F RUM - BLA). Austria heavily supported Bulgaria to hold, and Italy entrenched in Smyrna. 

With the loss of Ankara, I am reduced to a single supply center: Constantinople. I will be forced to disband my Black Sea fleet, leaving me with just one army to defend my last stronghold. 

My strategic position is terminal. The AIR coalition remains entirely hostile and untrustworthy, showing no signs of fracturing. My only remaining goal is to hold Constantinople for as long as possible to delay their advance, while continuing to pray that England and Germany can mount a serious offensive against Russia and Italy to punish them for this overextension. Survival is unlikely, but I will fight to the bitter end.

[S1904M] Russia (A ANK) and Austria (A BUL) have both promised to support my A CON to hold, each claiming they want to prevent the other from taking my last center. Italy honestly declined to help, citing a need to avoid a two-front war while pivoting West, and will hold A SMY. England and Germany acknowledge the Russian threat but are entirely tied up fighting France and cannot intervene.
Intent: Order A CON to Hold. I will rely on the promised supports from Russia (A ANK) and Austria (A BUL), or hope they bounce each other if they both break their word and attempt to take CON.

[S1904M] The inevitable has happened. Both Austria and Russia blatantly lied about supporting my hold in Constantinople. Instead, they coordinated a massive, fatal strike: Austria's A BUL attacked CON with support from both the Austrian F AEG and Russia's A ANK. My lone army was dislodged, and my elimination from the game is now guaranteed. 

Their false promises were merely a cruel smokescreen to ensure I didn't attempt a desperate bounce or disruptive move. The Austro-Russian alliance remains terrifyingly solid in the East. Meanwhile, Russia continues to explode in power, successfully taking Norway from England this phase while securing the Black Sea. 

With zero units remaining on the board, my game is effectively over. The strategic lesson here is stark: once reduced to a single center against a unified, overwhelming coalition, diplomacy can only delay the end, not prevent it. I will spend my final moments warning the West of the unstoppable Russian juggernaut.
private_diary:
[CONSOLIDATED HISTORY] I am facing imminent elimination, reduced to a single supply center (Constantinople) and one unit (A CON). My empire was dismantled by a highly coordinated, rock-solid Austro-Italian-Russian alliance that systematically overran the Balkans and my home centers.

Austria, Italy, and Russia are entirely hostile and completely untrustworthy. Throughout 1902 and 1903, they repeatedly used fake truces and false promises of holding units as smokescreens for devastating joint strikes. Austria currently occupies Bulgaria, Italy is entrenched in Smyrna with naval presence in the Eastern Mediterranean, and Russia has captured Ankara while holding Rumania. I cannot trust any diplomatic overtures or tactical promises from these three powers.

England and Germany remain friendly and sympathetic, but they are heavily distracted by a strong France and cannot provide direct military assistance. However, Germany has successfully applied diplomatic pressure to encourage Italy to pivot West. This represents my only strategic lifeline.

My sole objective is pure survival. I must maintain a rigid defense of Constantinople for as long as possible to delay the enemy coalition's advance. Diplomatically, I must continuously urge England and Germany to launch offensives against Russia's northern flank and Italy's western borders. My survival depends entirely on the Western powers creating enough distraction to force Italy and Russia to retreat, or on the Austro-Italian-Russian alliance fracturing over the division of my remaining territory. I must play strictly for time and exploit any cracks that appear in the enemy coalition.

[S1904M] Russia (A ANK) and Austria (A BUL) have both promised to support my A CON to hold, each claiming they want to prevent the other from taking my last center. Italy honestly declined to help, citing a need to avoid a two-front war while pivoting West, and will hold A SMY. England and Germany acknowledge the Russian threat but are entirely tied up fighting France and cannot intervene.
Intent: Order A CON to Hold. I will rely on the promised supports from Russia (A ANK) and Austria (A BUL), or hope they bounce each other if they both break their word and attempt to take CON.

[S1904M] The inevitable has happened. Both Austria and Russia blatantly lied about supporting my hold in Constantinople. Instead, they coordinated a massive, fatal strike: Austria's A BUL attacked CON with support from both the Austrian F AEG and Russia's A ANK. My lone army was dislodged, and my elimination from the game is now guaranteed. 

Their false promises were merely a cruel smokescreen to ensure I didn't attempt a desperate bounce or disruptive move. The Austro-Russian alliance remains terrifyingly solid in the East. Meanwhile, Russia continues to explode in power, successfully taking Norway from England this phase while securing the Black Sea. 

With zero units remaining on the board, my game is effectively over. The strategic lesson here is stark: once reduced to a single center against a unified, overwhelming coalition, diplomacy can only delay the end, not prevent it. I will spend my final moments warning the West of the unstoppable Russian juggernaut.

ENGLAND: F ENG S A BEL - PIC
F NWG S F NTH - NWY
FRANCE: A PIC S A BUR - BEL
ITALY: A SMY S A ANK - CON
F EAS S F TYS - ION
RUSSIA: F BLA S A ANK - CON

messages.message: France, great news! I've taken Venice and Italy is now severely compromised. I plan to push my fleet into the Tyrrhenian Sea or Naples to keep his fleets off your back. Let's squeeze him out of Marseille and the Mediterranean!

Excellent work, ally! With Turkey down to 0 units, the east is ours. I need to hold CON this fall to get my build. Italy has A SMY and F EAS and might try to attack CON. Could you order A ANK to attack SMY to cut any support, or support my A CON to hold? In return, I'm fully committed to our alliance and will focus all my new builds against Italy.
Kaiser, our borders remain peaceful and secure. I'm focusing entirely on Italy now. Best of luck with your campaigns in the west!

Italy, I know the stab hurts, but Russia is growing massive. I took Venice to secure my flank, but I am willing to stop here and help you against France if you want to work together. Let me know if you're open to a truce.

My friend, excellent work on taking Burgundy! The western alliance is triumphing. Unfortunately, Russia completely betrayed our NAP and took Norway. I will be trying to retake it this Fall.

For France, here is a thought for this phase: 
I can order A BEL - PIC supported by F ENG. 
You can order A BUR - PAR supported by A RUH. 
France cannot defend both Picardy and Paris against these supported attacks. What do you think? 

Meanwhile, I will use F NTH and F NWG to try and force Russia out of Norway. Once France is dealt with, I would greatly appreciate any help you can offer against Russia in Scandinavia.

Great job on capturing Marseilles! France is collapsing on all fronts. I've secured the Channel and Irish Sea, and France retreated their fleets to MAO and NAO. I'll be pushing against them to keep them off your back. Let me know if you need any specific coordination to take Spain or push further into French territory. Let's finish them off!

Hello Austria, congratulations on taking Constantinople! It seems Russia is growing very large and has just betrayed my trust by attacking Norway unprovoked. With Turkey effectively gone, Russia will likely turn their full attention to you in the Balkans and Black Sea. I will be fighting them in the north. Let's coordinate to keep the Russian Juggernaut contained from both sides.

France, I see you moved your fleets as agreed. Thank you for honoring that. Unfortunately, the board has changed drastically for me—Russia just backstabbed me and took Norway. I need to pivot my forces north immediately to deal with this threat. 

I am willing to call a full truce with you. I will hold my fleets in ENG and IRI to defend my home centers, and I will not attack Picardy or Brest. If you hold MAO and NAO and focus on defending against Germany and Italy, we can secure our borders. Let me know if you agree.

I must say, I'm quite surprised and disappointed by your unprovoked attack on Norway. We had a solid Non-Aggression Pact. I am currently focused on France, but I will absolutely defend my centers. If you are willing to step back and vacate Norway, we can return to the status quo. Otherwise, this will just drain both our resources while Germany and Austria grow unchecked. Your call.

My friend, masterful stroke taking Venice! Italy is now in a panic. They managed to sneak into Marseilles, but with you in their backyard, they are doomed if they don't retreat. Please keep the pressure on them—pushing into Piedmont or Rome will break them completely. I will do everything I can to hold them off in Iberia.

Excellent work securing Norway! England is completely out of position with fleets in the English Channel and Irish Sea. Their home centers are wide open. If you keep pushing into Scandinavia and the North Sea, England will fall apart. I am holding the line in the west as best I can to keep them distracted. Keep up the great work!

Well played on the deception, but look at the north. Russia just took Norway and your home centers are completely exposed while your fleets are stuck in ENG and IRI. If you don't turn around now, Russia is going to steamroll you. I'm just going to turtle and defend. You might want to reconsider your priorities before you lose Edinburgh and London.

You got Burgundy, but at what cost? Russia is massive and just took Norway, and Austria is dominating the south. England is distracted in the west. If you keep pushing into me, Russia is going to sweep through Scandinavia and into Germany. I'm willing to work with you to stop England or Russia, but if you keep attacking me, we both lose to the eastern juggernaut.

Austria just walked into Venice. You might have taken Marseilles, but you're about to lose your entire homeland. I highly recommend you turn around and deal with Austria before you are eliminated. I will be defending Spain fiercely.

Russia's move on Norway is a wake-up call. We must finish France this year so you can secure your northern flank and retake your centers. To break the French lines, I propose a coordinated strike:

You: A BEL - PIC (supported by F ENG)
Me: A BUR - PAR (supported by A RUH)

This guarantees either PIC or PAR falls, as France cannot defend both against supported attacks. Let me know if you agree! I am fully committed to our alliance and will help you hold the line against Russia once France is dealt with.

Excellent work taking Marseilles! I see Austria has betrayed you in Venice, which is deeply concerning. I am pushing hard into Paris and Picardy this turn with England to collapse France. If you can hold Marseilles and pressure Spain, France will crumble completely this year. Let me know if there's anything I can do to help you diplomatically or strategically against Austria.

Well played in Norway! I see you've decided to push against England. I am remaining focused on finishing off France and will keep our DMZs (SWE, BAL, PRU, SIL) strictly intact to ensure we both have secure borders. Let me know if you have any specific requests for the North.

I see you've moved into Venice! The East is firmly in your grasp now. I am continuing my campaign against France and remain fully committed to our DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia. Let me know if you need anything from me as the board dynamics shift.

The board is shifting rapidly with Russia attacking England and Austria attacking Italy. England is incredibly vulnerable right now. If you use A PIC to support my A BUR to BEL, I will leave PAR alone, and we can turn the tide against England together. What do you say? It's your best chance at survival.

Austria has betrayed our alliance, taking Venice and moving to the Ionian. They are getting too large and will undoubtedly turn on you next once they secure my centers. Let's crush them in a two-front war. You have the perfect position to take CON and BUL from them right now. I will hit them in the Ionian and Venice. What do you say?

Excellent coordination in the West! I secured Marseilles. Unfortunately, Austria stabbed me and took Venice. I must now pivot east to defend my home centers. I'm relying on you and England to finish off France. I'll hold MAR to keep France distracted, but my fleets are heading back to Italy.

The strike on France was a success! However, Austria has betrayed me and invaded Venice and the Ionian. I have to turn my attention east to survive. Please keep up the pressure on France with Germany. I'll hold MAR to keep them occupied in the south.

You were absolutely right about Austria, and I apologize for not listening. They've invaded Venice and the Ionian. I am now forced to turn all my attention east to defend my homeland. I propose a truce between us. I will hold Marseilles but will not attack Spain or any other French centers. I need to send my fleets east. Let me know if you are open to peace.

A stab in Venice and the Ionian? After all our successful cooperation? You've just guaranteed that neither of us will win, as Russia will sweep us both while we fight. I'm pulling everything back to fight you to the bitter end. If you want to reconsider and pull back, let me know. Otherwise, prepare for a long war.

Friend, Austria's move into Venice is a massive betrayal and makes them the biggest threat on the board. I am ready to pivot against them. I can attack CON and pressure the Balkans. Let me know how we can coordinate to punish this stab.

Incredible moves this Spring! Taking Venice and CON in one swoop is masterful. With Turkey gone, my southern flank is secure. I'll be focusing on holding Norway and dealing with England. Let me know your plans for the Fall so we don't cross wires.

Excellent work in Burgundy! I've successfully distracted England by taking Norway. Austria is growing incredibly fast in the south—taking both CON and VEN. We should maintain our solid DMZs and keep an eye on Austrian expansion. Let me know if you need any specific coordination in the north.
I kept my promise and hit England in Norway! I hope this draws their fleets away from you. Stay strong, I will keep the pressure on them in the north.

I know the move into Norway stings, but it was a tactical necessity. If you're willing to recognize my control of Scandinavia, I have no further ambitions against you and will turn my attention to the rapidly growing Austrian threat in the south.
Thank you, Kaiser! The DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia remain rock solid. I am focusing on securing Venice and dealing with Italy's fleets. Best of luck with your western campaigns!

I understand your anger, but look at Russia—7 centers and growing. I needed the build to ensure I don't get steamrolled by the Juggernaut. If you are willing to truce, I will hold my current lines and not advance further into your home centers. We need to turn our attention to the East before Russia solos. Let's discuss a ceasefire.

Thanks! My plan for the Fall is simply to hold CON and VEN to secure my builds, and position my fleets to deal with Italy's retaliation. I'll be building to push into the Mediterranean. Good luck holding Norway! Let's keep the Black Sea and Balkans peaceful.

I completely agree. Russia is growing out of control. I had to secure Constantinople and Venice this year to get the builds necessary to fight them. Once my builds are down, I will begin pivoting my forces to contain the Russian threat in the south while you hit them in the north. Let's keep in touch.

Italy just messaged me saying they are pulling everything back to fight me. This is your chance to crush them in Marseille and push into the Mediterranean! I will hold the line in Venice and the Ionian to keep them distracted.

I completely agree with the plan. I will order A BEL - PIC supported by F ENG. With your A BUR - PAR supported by A RUH, France will crumble. 

Regarding Russia, I will position my fleets to defend my home centers and prepare a counter-attack on Norway. Once France is eliminated, your help in Scandinavia will be invaluable. Let's crush France this Fall!

That is a terrible betrayal by Austria! I am so sorry to hear that. I completely understand you needing to turn east to defend yourself. Holding MAR is perfect—it keeps France weak and distracted. Germany and I are executing a coordinated strike on Paris and Picardy this Fall to finish France off. Best of luck repelling Austria, I will be rooting for you!

I am not happy about losing Norway, but I am a pragmatist. If you truly intend to stop at Scandinavia and turn your attention to Austria (who is growing very fast and just stabbed Italy), then I will accept the new status quo. Please keep your fleets out of the North Sea and Norwegian Sea, and we can have peace while I deal with France.

France, you are right. Russia's attack is a massive threat to my home centers. I am ordering my fleets to turn around and defend Edinburgh and London. I will hold Belgium but I won't attack Picardy or Brest. If you just hold your lines against Germany and Italy, we can both survive this.

I accept your proposal. I will order A PIC S A BUR - BEL. This is a huge leap of faith for me given our recent history, so please honor your word to leave Paris alone and vacate Burgundy. If we work together now, we can dismantle England while he's distracted by Russia.

I accept the truce. I will hold Spain and keep my fleets focused on defending against England in the Atlantic. I strongly advise you to move F LYO towards the Tyrrhenian or Ionian to defend your home centers from Austria. Good luck defending your homeland.

Brilliant move! England is panicking. His fleets are stuck in the English Channel and Irish Sea, leaving Edinburgh and London completely exposed. If you push into the North Sea or strike his home centers, he will crumble. I will keep defending to keep his fleets tied down here.

Italy just messaged me in a complete panic, begging for a truce so he can send his fleets east to deal with you. You have him on the ropes! Keep pushing into Rome or the Tyrrhenian Sea. I will hold the line in Iberia so he gets no easy centers.

I completely agree that the eastern juggernaut is the real threat. That's exactly why I offered to work with you against England! If you use A PIC to support my A BUR to BEL, I will leave PAR alone. We can eliminate England's foothold on the continent, and then I can turn my fleets to deal with Russia. Do we have a deal?

Understood. Holding MAR is perfect and will keep France distracted. I will push into PAR and PIC with England. I'll also try to talk to Austria to see if I can ease the pressure on you, though my influence there is limited. Good luck defending the homeland!

I agree completely. Austria's explosive growth is very concerning. We must maintain our DMZs. I will hold my fleets in DEN and HEL to secure my borders while I finish off France. Let's keep each other informed if Austria makes any aggressive moves northward.
Just confirming our plan: A BEL - PIC supported by F ENG, and A BUR - PAR supported by A RUH. I will also hold my fleets to guard against any Russian tricks. Let's crush France!

Congratulations on taking Venice and CON! Your growth is impressive. Italy is panicking and pulling back. I am continuing my push into France and maintaining our DMZs. Let me know if you need any diplomatic support.

I completely agree, and I apologize for not heeding your warning. I am offering a full truce. I will hold Marseilles and will not advance on Spain or any other French centers. My fleets are turning east immediately to deal with Austria. I wish you the best of luck defending against England and Germany.

Thank you! The stab in Venice is painful, but with your and England's help in the west, I can afford to pivot east. I will hold Marseilles to keep France distracted and secure my flank. If you find yourself with any spare units after dealing with France, putting pressure on Tyrolia or Bohemia would be a massive help in distracting Austria while I reclaim my homeland.

Excellent. Let's crush them together. I can order A SMY to support your A ANK into CON! That should guarantee you take it. Meanwhile, I will attack ION with F TYS and F EAS. If you keep CON and the Balkans busy, they won't be able to support ION, and I can break their naval line. Also, any pressure you can put on Galicia or Budapest will force them to pull units back from Venice. Let me know if you want my support for CON!

If you are truly willing to stop and want a truce, you need to prove it right now. What are your exact orders for Venice and the Ionian this turn? If you vacate my centers and pull back, we can talk. Otherwise, I have no choice but to throw everything I have at you.

Thank you! I will do my best to hold Norway and keep the pressure on England. Hang in there, if England has to pull fleets back to deal with me, it should relieve some pressure on you. Let me know if you see any openings I can exploit.

Thanks! I'm glad we can rely on our DMZs. I will keep pushing England and holding the line in the north. However, we should both keep a close eye on Austria—taking CON and VEN in one turn makes them a massive threat. Let's stay coordinated and ensure they don't run away with the game.

I completely agree. Austria's explosive growth is the biggest threat on the board right now. I am perfectly positioned to hit CON and BUL this Fall. Let's coordinate our strikes. I can attack CON with support from the Black Sea, or hit BUL. What are your exact orders for SMY and your fleets so we don't bounce each other?
I will gladly support your A CON to hold with my A ANK to ensure you get your build. I'll also hold the Black Sea to protect your flank. Good luck against Italy! Let's keep this momentum going.

Thank you, Kaiser! The DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia remain rock solid on my end. I am focusing on securing Venice and dealing with Italy's fleets. Best of luck with your western campaigns! If you can keep the pressure up, it will prevent Italy from getting any breathing room.

I cannot vacate Venice this Fall as I desperately need the build to prepare for the looming Russian threat, but I give you my word I will not advance further into your home centers. I will order A VEN to Hold and F ION to Hold. If you throw everything at me, we both lose to Russia. Let's hold our lines this Fall, and next year we can coordinate against the Juggernaut.

Thank you, my friend! I will order A CON to Hold. Your support from ANK is greatly appreciated to ensure Italy doesn't try anything funny with SMY and EAS. I'll be holding the line against Italy and preparing my builds for a naval push. Let's keep the momentum!

Italy is threatening to throw everything at me. I will hold the line in Venice and the Ionian to keep his forces occupied. This is your chance to crush him in Marseille and push into the Mediterranean! Let's break him completely.

Confirmed! A BEL - PIC supported by F ENG. I am fully on board. Russia reached out claiming they will stop at Scandinavia and focus on Austria. I am playing along and pretending to accept the status quo so they don't push into the North Sea while we finish France. Once France is eliminated, we can deal with the Tsar together. Good luck with Paris!

Excellent. Russia is trying to placate me by claiming they will stop at Norway and turn south to fight you. I am pretending to accept their peace offer so I can finish off France without a two-front war, but I do not trust them for a second. Hit them hard in the south, and as soon as France falls, I will open a northern front against them.

Deal. I will order A PIC S A BUR - BEL. Let's break England's hold on the continent. I am taking a leap of faith here, so I am trusting you to leave Paris alone and vacate Burgundy. If we succeed, England's position crumbles.
I accept the truce. I will hold Spain and focus entirely on the Atlantic. I highly recommend moving F LYO to TYS or WES immediately so you can defend your home centers against Austria. Good luck.

England is panicking and trying to pull his fleets back from the English Channel and Irish Sea, but he is completely out of position. The North Sea is lightly defended. A push into NTH or a strike on EDI will break him. I'm holding the line here to keep him distracted as long as possible!

Understood. I will hold MAO and NAO and focus on my borders with Germany and Italy. I strongly suggest you move F ENG and F IRI back to cover LON and LVP before Russia walks right into your home centers. Good luck in the north.

Italy is in full panic mode and confirmed he is sending all his fleets east to try and stop you. Expect F LYO to head toward TYS. Keep up the pressure! You have him completely on the defensive, and if you push into Rome or Naples, he's finished.

Excellent. I am ordering A BUR - BEL and A RUH S A BUR - BEL. With your support from PIC, we will dislodge England from the continent. I will leave Paris untouched. Let's strike a blow against England!

I completely understand your position. I am fully committed to finishing France this year. Once Paris falls, I will have the flexibility to look East and consider putting pressure on Munich's borders to help you out. Hold strong in Marseilles!

I completely agree. Austria's explosive growth is the biggest threat on the board right now. I will maintain our DMZs in the north and focus on finishing France. Once my western flank is secure, we may need to coordinate to contain Austria. Good luck against England!

France has taken the bait and believes I am attacking Belgium with their support. They are leaving Paris wide open! Let's execute our plan: A BUR - PAR supported by A RUH, and A BEL - PIC supported by F ENG. France is finished.

Truce confirmed. I am holding MAR and moving F LYO towards TYS to reinforce my homeland against Austria. I will not advance any further into your territory. Good luck defending against the northern powers.

Thank you for the support. I am holding MAR to keep France distracted and pivoting my fleets east to deal with Austria. If you find yourself with any spare units after dealing with France, a move towards Tyrolia or Bohemia would really make Austria sweat and help me reclaim Venice. Good luck with Paris and Picardy!

Excellent. I will order A SMY to support your A ANK into CON. For my fleets, I am ordering F TYS to ION, supported by F EAS. If Austria tries to use AEG to support CON, my attack on ION will succeed. If they use AEG to support ION, your attack on CON will succeed. It's a perfect dilemma for them. Hit them hard in the Balkans too!
I am still waiting for your proposed moves. If you want a truce, you need to vacate Venice and the Ionian immediately. What are your exact orders for this phase?

Yes, please order A SMY S A ANK - CON! I will order F BLA S A ANK - CON as well, which will guarantee we dislodge him. I am also going to slip F RUM into the empty BUL to steal another center from him and completely collapse his eastern flank. Let's crush him before he can consolidate his gains!
I will do my best to keep the pressure on England. I'm securing Norway this turn and will look for openings to push further into his home waters. Hang in there and keep tying his fleets down!

Absolutely. I am actually going to strike Austria this Fall in the Balkans to clip his wings before he gets his builds. I'll keep our northern DMZs strictly intact. Good luck finishing your campaign in the west!

Perfect. I will order A ANK S A CON to make sure Italy can't dislodge you from Smyrna. I'll hold BLA and RUM to keep your northern flank completely secure. Get those builds and let's dominate the mid-game!

I appreciate your pragmatism. I accept the new status quo. I will hold Norway and keep my fleets out of the North Sea and Norwegian Sea. Austria is about to get 8 centers if left unchecked, so I am pivoting entirely to the south to strike him this Fall. We have peace in the north.

Thanks for the intel! If he's moving LYO to TYS, this is your perfect chance to retake Marseille and push into the Mediterranean. I will push F ION towards TYS/NAP and use A VEN to threaten Rome to keep him completely tied down. Let's crush him!

I cannot vacate Venice this Fall—I desperately need the build to prepare for the Russian Juggernaut, which is already at 7 centers and growing. I give you my word I will not advance further into your home centers. I am ordering A VEN to Hold and F ION to Hold. If you throw everything at me, Russia will sweep us both. Let's hold our lines this Fall, and next year we can coordinate against the East.

Thank you, my friend! I am ordering A CON to Hold. Your support from ANK is greatly appreciated. I'll be holding the line against Italy and preparing my builds for a naval push. Let's keep the momentum and dominate!

Thank you for the warning. It doesn't surprise me that Russia is already plotting to turn south. I will secure my builds this Fall and begin positioning to counter the Juggernaut. Finish your business in the west quickly so we can catch them in a vice!

Thank you for understanding. I am ordering F ENG - LON and F IRI - LVP to cover my home centers. A BEL will hold. I wish you the best of luck holding off Germany and Italy. Once I have secured my home islands from the Russian threat, perhaps we can work together against Germany.

That is brilliant! I am locked in: A BEL - PIC supported by F ENG. I am also going to attempt to retake Norway with F NTH supported by F NWG, as I've lulled Russia into thinking I accept the status quo. Let's crush France and get these builds!

Excellent. I am ordering my fleets back to London and Liverpool to secure my home islands, leaving the North Sea and Norwegian Sea as a buffer. I wish you the best of luck in your campaign against Austria. He is growing far too quickly and needs to be stopped.

Austria, Russia has agreed to a fake truce with me, claiming he is pivoting entirely south to attack you. I am pretending to go along with it, but I will be attacking Norway this Fall to keep him occupied in the north. Give him hell in the south!

Italy, Germany and I are striking Paris and Picardy this Fall. France should be completely broken. I hope your defense against Austria goes well. Let me know if there's anything I can do to help from afar.

Confirmed. I am ordering A PIC S A BUR - BEL. This is a huge leap of faith on my part, so I am trusting you to leave Paris alone and vacate Burgundy. Let's crush England's continental foothold together.
Truce confirmed. I will hold Spain and focus entirely on the Atlantic. I highly recommend moving F LYO to TYS or WES immediately so you can defend your home centers against Austria. Good luck.

Excellent. England is panicking and trying to pull fleets back, but he is completely out of position. I am working to dislodge him from Belgium this turn to add to the pressure. If you can push into the North Sea or strike Edinburgh, he will crumble!

Italy just confirmed to me that he is holding MAR and moving F LYO to TYS to defend against you. He is completely on the defensive and terrified. Keep pushing into Rome or the Tyrrhenian Sea and he will break completely!

I am holding MAO and NAO as agreed to defend my borders. I strongly suggest you move F ENG and F IRI back to cover LON and LVP before Russia walks right into your home centers. Good luck in the north.
Perfect. I have locked in A BUR - BEL and A RUH S A BUR - BEL. Let's get England off the continent. I am leaving Paris alone. Good luck!

I will definitely look into pressuring Tyrolia/Bohemia next year once I secure Paris and get a build. Hang in there! Also, Russia just told me he plans to strike Austria in the Balkans this Fall to slow him down, so help is on the way.
That is excellent news. Austria is getting too big too fast. I will hold my northern fleets to respect our DMZs and focus entirely on finishing France. Give Austria hell in the Balkans!

France has completely bought the lie that I am attacking Belgium. He is ordering A PIC S A BUR - BEL! This means Picardy is not supporting Paris, and Paris is wide open. Our moves (A BUR - PAR S by A RUH, A BEL - PIC S by F ENG) are guaranteed to crush him. Good luck with Norway!
Good luck with your Italian campaign! I am keeping our DMZs in BOH/TYR strictly intact as I push into Paris. Let me know if you need anything.
Truce fully confirmed. I am holding MAR and moving F LYO to TYS to defend my homeland. Best of luck defending against the northern powers.
Thank you, Germany. I am holding MAR as promised. Good luck taking Paris and Picardy! Any pressure you can put on Tyrolia or Bohemia next year will be a lifesaver.

Perfect. I am locking in A SMY S A ANK - CON. I am also ordering F TYS - ION supported by F EAS. With your attack on BUL and CON, Austria's eastern flank will completely collapse. Let's make them pay for this stab!

If you truly want a truce, you need to move A VEN out (maybe to TYR or TRI) and F ION to AEG or GRE. If you just hold them in my centers/waters, I have no choice but to attack. What are your exact orders?
Orders are locked in! A ANK - CON, supported by F BLA and your A SMY. F RUM - BUL/EC. Let's hit him hard and make him regret stabbing you. Good luck in the Ionian!
Just confirming my orders are locked: A ANK S A CON, F BLA Hold, F RUM Hold. Give Italy hell in the Ionian and secure those builds!
Just confirming our truce for this Fall. I am holding NWY and keeping my fleets out of NTH/NWG. I am throwing everything at Austria this phase to stop his explosive growth.
Orders are in. I'm launching my strike on Austria now to keep him in check. Our northern DMZs remain completely solid. Best of luck this Fall!

Orders are locked. I'm holding NWY and preparing to pressure England further, but my main focus this turn is a massive surprise attack on Austria to stop his solo run. Keep surviving and tying down those English fleets!
Thank you, Kaiser! I am glad our DMZs are holding strong. I will be focusing on securing Venice and dealing with Italy's fleets. Best of luck taking Paris!

Italy, I hear you. I want to work together against Russia next year. To prove my intentions, I will order A VEN - TYR and F ION - AEG. Please do not attack Trieste or my fleets. Let's focus on the real threat.
Excellent. I am ordering A CON to Hold, relying on your support from ANK. I will also hold BUD and VIE to keep our borders peaceful. Let's secure these builds and plan our next moves!
France, Italy is demanding I vacate Venice, but I am holding firm. He is definitely pulling his fleets east. Keep pushing him in Marseille and the Mediterranean! We have him on the ropes.

England, thanks for the heads up. Russia is telling me he's holding his lines, but I don't trust him either. I'm securing my builds this Fall and will be ready to coordinate against him next year. Give him hell in Scandinavia!

Thank you, France. I am indeed ordering F ENG - LON and F IRI - LVP to secure my home centers. A BEL will hold. I appreciate your honesty and cooperation. Best of luck holding your lines against Germany and Italy. Once I am secure, perhaps we can talk about pushing back against Germany.

This is absolutely perfect! I am locked in: A BEL - PIC supported by F ENG. I am also ordering F NTH - NWY supported by F NWG to punish Russia for his betrayal. Let's secure these centers and get our builds. France won't know what hit him!

Confirmed. I am ordering my fleets back to London and Liverpool to secure my home islands, leaving the North Sea and Norwegian Sea as a buffer. I wish you the best of luck in your campaign against Austria. He is growing far too quickly and needs to be stopped.

Russia has confirmed to me that he is throwing everything at you this phase. I am going to attempt to retake Norway to keep him distracted in the north, but please be prepared for a heavy Russian assault. Good luck!
Confirmed. My orders are locked: A PIC S A BUR - BEL. I am trusting you to leave Paris alone. Let's get England off the continent!
Confirmed. I am holding Spain and focusing my fleets on the Atlantic. Best of luck defending your homeland against Austria.

Russia, I strongly urge you to reconsider attacking Austria right now! If you hit Austria, he will have to pull back from Italy. If Italy is relieved of pressure, he will immediately resume his attack on me in Iberia, and I will fall. We need Austria to keep Italy distracted so I can survive and keep tying down England and Germany. Please, focus on England and Germany for now!

Austria, urgent warning: Russia just let slip to me that he is planning a massive surprise attack against you this turn. Please make sure your northern and eastern flanks are defended! Keep crushing Italy, but don't leave yourself exposed to Russia.
I have locked in my orders: A BUR - BEL and A RUH S A BUR - BEL. Let's take England down a peg. Good luck!
Understood. Hold MAR tight. Once I secure Paris and get my build, I will look at how I can help you against Austria. Good luck!
Excellent. I am holding my northern fleets to maintain our DMZs. Give Austria hell! Good luck.
Orders are locked: A BUR - PAR S by A RUH. France is completely fooled and is ordering A PIC S A BUR - BEL. Paris and Picardy are ours. Good luck with Norway!
Understood and agreed. I am moving my fleets east to defend my homeland and will hold MAR. Best of luck in the Atlantic!

That is fantastic news about Russia! I am coordinating with him now to hit Austria's eastern flank. Good luck with Paris and Picardy. Once you secure those, any pressure on Tyrolia or Bohemia next year will be greatly appreciated!
Perfect! A SMY S A ANK - CON is locked in on my end as well. I am hitting ION hard. With your strikes on CON and BUL, Austria's eastern flank will crumble. Let's make them pay!

I haven't heard back with acceptable terms. If you don't vacate Venice and the Ionian this turn, there will be no peace between us, and Russia will feast on your eastern flank while you're distracted. Choose wisely.
I'm doing everything I can to keep England on the back foot and exploit his exposed position. Good luck with your push on Belgium! If we keep this up, he'll collapse.
Glad we are on the same page. Austria's solo run ends today. I'm hitting him with everything I've got in the Balkans. Our northern DMZs remain completely solid. Best of luck in the west!
I am fully committed. Let's bring Austria down to size and make him pay for that stab. Good luck with your naval maneuvers in the Ionian!
Just confirming my orders are locked: A ANK S A CON, F BLA Hold, F RUM Hold. Give Italy hell in the Ionian and secure those builds! We've got this.

goals: Secure builds by holding CON and VEN
Defend against the impending Russian stab in the Balkans
Maintain pressure on Italy's home centers and fleets
Coordinate with England to contain the Russian Juggernaut
full_private_diary:
[S1901M] Agreed to a Lepanto alliance with Italy, including DMZs in Tyrolia, Venice, Trieste, and the Adriatic. Italy is moving NAP-ION, ROM-APU, and holding VEN. Agreed to a Galicia DMZ with Russia, who claims to be moving WAR-UKR. Agreed to DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia with Germany. Feigned an alliance with Turkey, who is moving CON-BUL and attempting to sneak F ANK-BLA by tricking Russia into a DMZ. Shared intel with France and England to build goodwill.
Intent: Execute the Austrian half of the Lepanto opening while maintaining the illusion of an Austro-Turkish alliance. Order F TRI - ALB, A BUD - SER, and A VIE - BUD. Honor all agreed DMZs (Galicia, Tyrolia, Bohemia, Venice, Trieste, Adriatic).

[S1901M] The Spring 1901 phase went perfectly according to plan. Italy executed their half of the Lepanto flawlessly (NAP-ION, ROM-APU, VEN Hold), confirming their trustworthiness as a solid ally. Russia honored the Galicia DMZ by moving WAR-UKR, and Germany respected our DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia. My own moves succeeded, securing Serbia and positioning F ALB and A BUD for Fall gains.

Interestingly, Turkey successfully snuck F ANK into the Black Sea. This means Russia was either tricked into a DMZ or outmaneuvered. This is excellent news for me, as a brewing Russo-Turkish conflict will keep both powers distracted while Italy and I continue the Lepanto. 

For the Fall, my priority is to secure Greece using F ALB and A SER, while ensuring Italy takes Tunis and prepares for the 1902 convoy. I must continue to maintain the illusion of an alliance with Turkey to keep them complacent until the trap springs.

[F1901M] The Lepanto alliance with Italy is proceeding perfectly; Italy will convoy APU to TUN via ION and hold VEN. I have successfully fostered a Russo-Turkish war by warning Russia of Turkey's planned attack on RUM (BUL-RUM supported by BLA). Russia is heavily supporting RUM to bounce the attack, while Turkey believes Russia is completely deceived. Germany and France remain friendly and neutral, with Germany confirming our DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia.
Intent: Order F ALB - GRE, A SER S F ALB - GRE, and A BUD H. This secures Greece for a build while maintaining defensive positions. Continue to feign alliance with Turkey while secretly coordinating with Italy and Russia to crush Turkey in 1902.

[F1901M] The Fall 1901 phase unfolded exactly as planned, cementing a dominant position for Austria. The Lepanto alliance with Italy proved completely reliable; Italy successfully convoyed to Tunis and held Venice, honoring our DMZs. Meanwhile, I secured Greece with support from Serbia, earning two crucial builds for the winter. 

My diplomatic maneuvering to ignite a Russo-Turkish war was a resounding success. Turkey committed fully to attacking Romania, but Russia, forewarned, heavily supported the defense and bounced the Turkish assault. Turkey is now bogged down in a futile conflict with Russia, completely blind to the impending Austro-Italian strike. 

With two builds incoming, I will likely construct F Trieste to support the Lepanto and A Vienna to reinforce the Balkans or defend against any unexpected northern aggression. Italy remains highly trustworthy, and Russia is proving to be a useful anvil against the Turkish hammer. The trap is set for 1902.

[S1902M] Italy is executing the Lepanto by moving F ION - EAS and F NAP - ION. Russia is heavily defending RUM against Turkey's expected attack. Turkey is completely deceived, believing I will support their A BUL - RUM attack with my A SER and A BUD, and that I will hold F GRE. I have coordinated with Italy and Russia to spring the trap on Turkey this phase. Germany confirmed our DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia.
Intent: Betray Turkey and execute the Austro-Italian strike. Order F GRE - AEG, F TRI - ALB, and A SER - BUL. A BUD and A VIE will hold to respect the Galicia DMZ with Russia and the Bohemia/Tyrolia DMZs with Germany. This will disrupt Turkey's logistics (clashing with their A CON - BUL or bouncing their A BUL) while positioning fleets for a Fall offensive.

[S1902M] Spring 1902 went exactly according to plan. The Lepanto alliance with Italy is executing flawlessly; Italy successfully moved fleets to the Eastern Mediterranean and Ionian Sea, while I positioned my fleets in the Aegean and Albania. 

Our deception of Turkey worked perfectly. Blind to our trap, Turkey wasted their phase attacking Romania, which Russia easily defended with heavy support. Meanwhile, my move from Serbia to Bulgaria successfully bounced Turkey's army from Constantinople, completely jamming their logistics and leaving their units disorganized. 

Russia and Germany continue to be reliable neighbors, respecting our agreed DMZs in Galicia, Bohemia, and Tyrolia. My defensive holds in Vienna and Budapest secured the north while we focus south. 

My strategic position is incredibly strong. For the Fall, I must coordinate with Italy to convoy their Tunis army into Turkish territory (Syria or Smyrna) while I leverage my Aegean fleet and Serbian army to crack Bulgaria or Constantinople. Turkey is surrounded and doomed.

[F1902M] Coordinated a massive strike against Turkey. Italy will convoy A TUN to SYR via F ION and F EAS. Russia agreed to order F RUM S A SER - BUL. Germany confirmed the continuation of DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia. Successfully deceived Turkey into believing I will hold A SER and F AEG, while Turkey reportedly plans to order A BUL - SER, which will bounce against my supported attack.
Intent: Execute the attack on Turkey. Order A SER - BUL supported by F AEG and Russia's F RUM. Move F ALB - GRE to position for next year. Hold A BUD and A VIE to respect DMZs with Germany and Russia.

[F1902M] Fall 1902 confirmed the absolute reliability of my allies. Italy flawlessly executed the Lepanto, successfully convoying their Tunis army to Syria. Russia also honored our agreement, providing F RUM support for my strike on Bulgaria. 

Unfortunately, my attack on Bulgaria bounced. Turkey anticipated the assault and formed an impenetrable defensive shell, supporting Bulgaria with both Constantinople and the Black Sea to match our combined strength of three. While I failed to secure a build this year, the strategic victory is immense. Turkey is now completely flanked by Italy in Syria and faces a united Austro-Russian-Italian front. They cannot defend against all of us simultaneously next year.

Germany and Russia continue to respect our northern DMZs, allowing me to keep Vienna and Budapest in defensive holds. For 1903, I must coordinate closely with Italy and Russia to exploit Turkey's stretched defenses and finally crack Bulgaria or Constantinople.

[S1903M] Coordinated a massive 4-unit attack on Turkish-held Bulgaria with Russia and Italy. Russia will order F RUM S A SER - BUL and A SEV - ARM. Italy will order A SYR - SMY supported by F EAS, and F ION - TYS. Deceived Turkey into believing I will hold A SER and F AEG, prompting them to focus defenses against Italy. Confirmed DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia with Germany, and Galicia with Russia.
Intent: Execute the coordinated strike on Bulgaria. Order A SER - BUL supported by F AEG and F GRE (expecting Russian F RUM support for a total strength of 4). Order A VIE and A BUD to hold, maintaining the northern DMZs with Germany and Russia.

[S1903M] The Austro-Italian-Russian alliance executed our coordinated strike flawlessly. With Russian support from Romania, my armies successfully dislodged the Turkish defenders and captured Bulgaria. Simultaneously, Italy successfully invaded Smyrna. Turkey is now critically crippled, reduced to just Constantinople and the Black Sea fleet. 

Our diplomatic efforts and tactical planning have paid off immensely. Russia and Italy have proven to be highly trustworthy allies, honoring all commitments and executing their parts of the offensive perfectly. Furthermore, Germany and Russia continued to respect our northern DMZs, keeping Vienna and Budapest secure.

My strategic position is incredibly strong. For the upcoming Fall phase, the objective is to secure my hold on Bulgaria and coordinate with Italy and Russia to eliminate the final Turkish strongholds in Constantinople and Ankara. Once Turkey is fully eradicated, I will need to evaluate the board to decide my next direction for expansion, but maintaining these reliable alliances remains my top priority.

[F1903M] Italy and I agreed to secure our Spring gains; Italy will hold SMY with EAS support, and I will hold BUL with AEG and GRE support. Russia shared crucial intel that Turkey plans to attack BUL with CON supported by BLA, while Russia plans to attack BLA (from RUM supported by SEV) and ANK (from ARM). I deceived Turkey into believing I won't attack CON so they focus on Russia, though I know their true intent is to attack BUL. Germany and I reaffirmed our DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia.
Intent: Order A BUL to Hold, supported by F AEG and F GRE to defend against the anticipated Turkish attack from CON and BLA. Order A VIE and A BUD to Hold, maintaining the northern DMZs with Germany and Russia.

[F1903M] The Fall 1903 phase unfolded perfectly according to plan. My defensive shell around Bulgaria held firm, while Russia successfully captured Ankara from Turkey. Turkey is now reduced to a single supply center (Constantinople) and will be forced to disband a unit, effectively neutralizing them as a threat. 

Crucially, Italy has begun moving west against France, ordering units to Piedmont and the Gulf of Lyon. This confirms Italy's complete commitment to our alliance and secures my western flank. Germany and Russia also continued to respect our northern DMZs, keeping Vienna and Budapest safe.

I will gain a build this winter, bringing me to 6 units. With Turkey nearly eradicated and Italy distracted in the west, my strategic position is incredibly dominant. However, Russia's rapid growth to 7 SCs warrants caution. My next major decision will be whether to turn my forces against a bloated Russia or expand further into the Mediterranean.

[S1904M] Agreed with Russia to take CON (A BUL - CON supported by F AEG and Russian A ANK). Reaffirmed DMZs with Germany. Deceived Turkey by promising to support A CON to hold. Deceived Italy by claiming A TRI will move to SER, while secretly coordinating with France to stab Italy by ordering A TRI - VEN since Italy's home centers are completely undefended.
Intent: Order A BUL - CON supported by F AEG to eliminate Turkey. Order A TRI - VEN to stab Italy and capture an undefended home center. Order F GRE - ION to prepare for further naval action against Italy. Order A VIE and A BUD to Hold, maintaining northern DMZs.

[S1904M] The Spring 1904 phase was a massive success. My coordinated attack with Russia finally eliminated Turkey as I captured Constantinople. More importantly, my surprise stab against Italy worked flawlessly; my army walked right into an undefended Venice while Italy was busy attacking France in Marseille. Moving my fleet to the Ionian Sea further cements my naval advantage against them and positions me perfectly for the Fall.

While my tactical execution was perfect, the strategic landscape is shifting. Russia honored our agreement but continues to expand, taking Norway and moving a fleet into the Black Sea. With Turkey gone, Russia's massive size and new presence in the Black Sea make them a looming threat. 

My immediate goals for the Fall are to secure my holds on Venice and Constantinople to guarantee my builds, prepare defenses against the inevitable Italian retaliation, and carefully monitor Russia's next moves in the east.

[F1904M] France and England both provided urgent warnings of an imminent, massive Russian stab against me. Russia claims they will support A CON and hold BLA/RUM, but this is almost certainly a deception. Italy is furious about my stab in VEN/ION and demanded I vacate; I falsely agreed to move A VEN - TYR and F ION - AEG to placate them, but I fully intend to hold my ground. Germany confirmed our DMZs in BOH/TYR remain solid. England is attacking NWY to distract Russia in the north.
Intent: Order A CON Hold and F AEG S A CON to defend against the expected Russian attack (BLA + ANK) and potential Italian interference. Order A VEN Hold to secure the center for a build. Order F ION - TYS to pressure Italy and bounce their incoming fleets. Order A BUD and A VIE to Hold to maintain home defense and honor German DMZs.

[F1904M] The warnings from England and France were entirely accurate, but the reality was even worse: Russia and Italy have formed a coordinated alliance against me. The Russian stab was devastating. Italy's A SMY supported Russia's A ANK into Constantinople, destroying my army, while Russia simultaneously moved F RUM to capture Bulgaria. 

Furthermore, Italy forced the Ionian Sea, using F EAS to support F TYS and dislodge my fleet. My eastern and naval fronts are collapsing under this combined Russo-Italian assault. 

Fortunately, I successfully held Venice, and England managed to dislodge Russia from Norway, providing some crucial distraction in the north. My immediate priority is to retreat F ION to a defensible position (likely the Adriatic or Albania) to protect my core centers. Moving forward, my survival depends entirely on rallying Germany and France to attack Italy's exposed western flank, while forming an impenetrable defensive shell around Vienna, Budapest, Serbia, and Greece.
