Austria's explosive growth has been halted, and they are now reeling on multiple fronts. 

However, my northern flank has collapsed. England blatantly betrayed our truce, launching a coordinated attack to dislodge my fleet in Norway. Their word is entirely worthless, and I must treat them as a permanent hostile threat. Germany, thankfully, continues to respect our demilitarized zones.

Despite the loss of Norway, my southern gains will yield a net positive in builds. My immediate priority is to continue dismantling Austria alongside Italy before they can recover, while urgently fortifying St. Petersburg and Scandinavia against further English aggression. I must balance the southern offensive with a staunch northern defense.

AUSTRIA: A BUD S A VIE - GAL
F NAP S F AEG - ION
ENGLAND: A PIC S A BUR - PAR
ITALY: F TYS S F ION - NAP
RUSSIA: F BUL/EC S A SEV - RUM
F BLA S A SEV - RUM

messages.message: Excellent work taking Norway! Russia is at 9 centers and is the clear threat to the board. I am doing everything I can to hold them back in the Balkans, but I'm facing a combined Russo-Italian attack. Please keep hitting them in the north (STP/SWE). Have you spoken to Germany about opening an eastern front against Warsaw? We need a coordinated effort to stop the Juggernaut.

Friend, Russia has reached 9 centers and is steamrolling the east. I am holding the line in the Balkans against a Russo-Italian alliance, but I cannot hold forever. With England distracting them in Scandinavia, this is the perfect time for you to shift an army or two east (perhaps to Silesia or Prussia) to threaten Warsaw. If we don't contain Russia now, they will dominate the board. Our DMZs in BOH/TYR remain solid on my end.

France, I see England and Germany are pressuring you. I am fighting a desperate war against Russia and Italy in the east. Italy's fleets are tied up fighting me (I took Naples and Venice!). This might give you an opening to defend yourself or even push into the Mediterranean if you can spare a fleet. Stay strong!

Italy, I know we are at war, but look at the board: Russia is at 9 centers and growing. They used us both to eliminate Turkey and are now reaping all the rewards. If we keep destroying each other, Russia will solo. I am willing to discuss a ceasefire and returning centers if we can turn our combined forces against the Juggernaut before it's too late. What do you say?

Well played in the Balkans. However, England is in Norway and Germany is completely free in the west. If you push too hard against me, you'll leave yourself open to a western coalition. I'm willing to act as a buffer for you against Italy and the west if we can come to a mutually beneficial arrangement and stop the bloodshed here.

Hi Germany, fantastic progress! We have France cornered. For this spring, how would you like to coordinate? I can use A PIC to support A BUR into Paris, or I can attack Brest with A PIC supported by F ENG. Let me know what works best for your moves.

Also, we need to keep an eye on Russia—they are at 9 centers now. I've secured Norway for now, but they have forces in St. Pete and Sweden. If you can spare a fleet, moving F DEN to BAL or SWE would be a huge help in containing them. Let's finish France quickly so we can secure the stalemate lines against the eastern juggernaut.

Greetings Austria, Russia is growing dangerously large at 9 centers and taking CON is a big warning sign. I've managed to push them out of Norway to keep them contained in the north, but they are a massive threat. Are you planning a counter-offensive against them in the Balkans? I will keep the pressure on them in Scandinavia to draw their units away from your front.

Hello Italy, great job holding Marseilles! France is collapsing. Germany and I are moving in on Paris and Brest.

I'm getting very concerned about Russia's explosive growth in the east (9 centers). Are you and Austria working together to contain them? I'm doing my best to hold them off in Scandinavia.

Hello Russia. I retook Norway because it is my home sphere, but I have no ambitions against Sweden or St. Petersburg. I am perfectly happy to reinstate our Non-Aggression Pact in Scandinavia so you can focus your forces on your southern expansion. Let me know if you agree to a strict NAP: I hold Norway, you hold Sweden/St. Pete, and we leave each other alone.

France, Germany is determined to take Paris this year. I am willing to offer you a lifeline: if you focus your defense entirely on stopping Germany (supporting Paris), I will hold my forces in Picardy and the Channel and not attack Brest. I'd rather see Germany bleed for Paris than hand it to them easily. Let me know if you'll take this deal.

Greetings Tsar! Congratulations on your massive success and reaching 9 centers! You are in a fantastic position to win this. I wanted to point out that Germany and England are entirely focused on destroying me in the west, leaving their eastern flanks completely exposed. With your new builds in Mos and War, you could easily sweep through Germany and Scandinavia with almost no resistance. I will continue to tie down their forces here as long as I can!

Hello Austria, excellent work taking Venice and Naples! Italy is crumbling. Keep up the pressure and you can secure the entire south. I am doing my best to hold off England and Germany in the west. If you can finish off Italy, we might both survive this game.

Germany, look at the board. Russia is at 9 centers and just built armies in Warsaw and Moscow. They are coming for you next. England is perfectly happy to let you fight me while they secure their own borders. You need to turn east immediately to defend your homeland, or Russia will steamroll you. I am willing to truce if you need to reposition.

England, Russia is at 9 centers and growing rapidly. They just built in Moscow and Warsaw and already have Sweden and StP. They are going to sweep Scandinavia and then come for your home centers. We need to stop this endless war in the west so you can defend against the Russian juggernaut. I am willing to agree to a strict truce.

Italy, Austria has taken Venice and Naples. Your homeland is falling! I have no intention of attacking you. If you need to move your army out of Marseilles to go defend your home centers, I promise I will not move into it. You need to save yourself!

My friend, excellent work in Picardy and Norway! France is on the ropes. To break his lines this Spring, I propose:
A PIC S A BUR - PAR
F ENG - BRE (to cut support)
F IRI - MAO (to pressure)
I will order A BUR - PAR. This should guarantee Paris falls or is heavily compromised. What do you think?

Greetings Tsar, congratulations on your gains! I see you've taken Sweden. I am writing to reaffirm our DMZs in Prussia, Silesia, and the Baltic Sea. I will keep my fleets in DEN and HEL to secure my borders and stay out of your way in Scandinavia. Let me know your plans and if I can be of any assistance.
Greetings Archduke, I hope the southern campaigns are fruitful. I am writing to reaffirm our strict DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia. I remain fully committed to the West. Best of luck!

Greetings Italy, fantastic work holding Marseilles! France is down to 4 units. England and I are making a push for Paris this Spring. If you can continue to pressure Spain or hold Marseilles, France will collapse entirely. Let me know how I can help.

France, England is growing too rapidly and I fear I am next on his list. I must strike back before he consolidates. I am ordering A BUR - BEL supported by RUH and HOL. If you can order A PAR - PIC to cut his support or dislodge him, we can push him off the continent. Let's work together to stop him.

Excellent work taking CON and BUL! Austria's eastern flank is collapsing. I am moving to retake Naples this turn. If you can continue pushing into the Balkans (Serbia/Greece), it will prevent Austria from defending effectively. Let's finish them off!

Germany, I'm fully committed to fighting Austria and holding the line. Austria is vulnerable right now with Russia and I pushing them. A move by you into Tyrolia or Bohemia would completely break them and net you some easy centers. Let me know if you can spare a unit for that!
France, I am honoring our truce and holding MAR. My forces are entirely dedicated to fighting Austria in Italy and the Ionian. Best of luck in the West.

England, I am keeping my word and staying out of the West to focus entirely on Austria. I hope your campaign against France is going well. If Germany can be convinced to pressure Austria from the north, we can dismantle them quickly.

My friend, the operation was a complete success! Austria is on the back foot. How shall we proceed this Spring? I can use F BUL/EC to support a move against F AEG, or I can push for GRE. What are your orders for F ION and A SMY? Let's keep the pressure on them.

Kaiser, I hope things are going well in the west. England blatantly lied to me and took Norway. I will be defending Sweden and St. Petersburg. I remain fully committed to our DMZs in Prussia, Silesia, and the Baltic. Let me know if there's any way we can cooperate against England in the future.

I see our truce was short-lived. If you want to keep fighting over Scandinavia, we can, but it will only slow us both down while Germany and France resolve the west. I'm open to reinstating a truce if you are.
England has turned their fleets against me in the north. I hope this gives you the breathing room you need to recover and push back!
I had to take the opportunity; your explosive growth was too threatening to ignore. If you are willing to talk about a truce so you can focus on defending against Italy, I am willing to listen.

Thank you, France! I am pressing the advantage against Italy and intend to eliminate them as a threat. With their home centers falling, they won't be able to bother you much longer. Hold strong against England and Germany; if I can secure the south, I will look to help balance the board and relieve the pressure on you.

Greetings Kaiser! I gladly reaffirm our strict DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia. I am making great progress against Italy, but Russia's 9 centers are a massive looming threat to us both. With England pushing them in Scandinavia, a German army moving towards Warsaw or Silesia would be devastating to them and highly profitable for you. Consider it! I will keep the south secure.

Tsar, I understand your reasoning, though the stab certainly stung! A truce is exactly what we need right now. I am heavily engaged in finishing off Italy (having taken Venice and Naples). If we can agree to hold our current lines in the Balkans (I keep AEG/GRE/SER/BUD, you keep BUL/CON/RUM/GAL), I will focus entirely westward and leave your southern flank completely secure so you can deal with England in Scandinavia. Do we have a deal?

Excellent work in Scandinavia! I am opening fake truce negotiations with Russia to stall their advance in the Balkans while I finish off Italy. Please keep hitting them hard in the north. I've also urged Germany to look towards Warsaw, as Russia is simply too big to ignore.

I completely agree with your plan. I will order A PIC S A BUR - PAR, F ENG - BRE, and F IRI - MAO. Let's crush France this year! Also, with Russia at 9 centers, any chance you could move F DEN to BAL or SWE to help keep them contained? We need to start preparing for the eastern threat.

Italy, I understand your position. Austria has grown quite large as well. I will speak to Germany about potentially putting pressure on Austria from the north once France is dealt with. In the meantime, please hold strong in Marseilles—we are moving in on Paris and Brest this Spring to finally break France!

I am perfectly happy to reinstate the truce. I have Norway back, which is all I needed for my security. I will hold F NWY and F NWG. You hold SWE and STP. Let's leave each other alone so I can finish France and you can focus on your southern campaign.

France, I hear you about Russia, but I can't just turn around while your fleets are in the Atlantic. If you use A BRE and A PAR to defend against Germany, I will hold A PIC and F ENG. I won't attack Brest. Let Germany waste his time bouncing against your defenses.

Austria, I've secured Norway and agreed to a fake truce with Russia to keep him from attacking me while I finish France. I am urging Germany to move fleets east to pressure Russia. Keep fighting the good fight in the Balkans—we will come to your aid against the Juggernaut as soon as the West is secure.

Germany, I agree completely. England is a massive threat and we need to push him off the continent. I will order A PAR - PIC to cut his support so you can take Belgium. Please make sure you move BUR - BEL, as I am leaving Paris vulnerable to help you!

England, I accept your offer. I will focus all my units on defending Paris and Brest against Germany. I will not move against Picardy or the Channel. Please hold your positions as promised so you can focus your fleets on the massive Russian threat in the north.
Thank you, Italy. I will hold my positions in Iberia and leave Marseilles alone. I wish you the best of luck in defending your homeland against Austria.

Thank you, Tsar! Your pressure in the north is the only thing keeping me alive. England is still threatening my coasts, and Germany is trying to take Paris. If you can push into Germany's exposed home centers or Scandinavia, their alliance will shatter. Keep up the great work!

Austria, great job keeping Italy on the ropes! Italy told me they are dedicating all their forces to fighting you. Keep pushing and you can take the rest of their centers. I am holding the line in the west as best I can.

France, I agree that Russia is a massive threat, which is exactly why I need to secure my western flank immediately. As I mentioned, I am moving against England this turn. I am ordering A BUR - BEL supported by RUH and HOL. If you can order A PAR - PIC to cut his support or dislodge him, we can push him off the continent. Once England is weakened, I will turn my forces East to deal with Russia. Let's work together on this.

Italy, excellent work in the south! Unfortunately, my armies are currently tied up dealing with France and preparing for a potential stab from England. I cannot spare a unit for Tyrolia or Bohemia just yet, as I must maintain my defensive lines and I don't want to overextend while Russia is so huge. Keep up the pressure on Austria and France, and once the West is secure, I will gladly look toward the East.

Tsar, I am sorry to hear about England's betrayal in Norway. I am currently locked in a struggle in the West, but I remain fully committed to our DMZs in Prussia, Silesia, and the Baltic. My fleets in DEN and HEL will hold their positions to secure my borders without threatening yours. Once my western borders are secure, I would be very open to cooperating against England. Let us maintain our peace and DMZs for now.

England, I completely agree with your plan! Please order A PIC S A BUR - PAR. I will order A BUR - PAR. Your moves of F ENG - BRE and F IRI - MAO sound perfect to keep France locked down and unable to support Paris. Let's crush them this Spring. Regarding Russia, I am keeping my fleets in DEN and HEL to form a defensive wall. I don't want to provoke Russia by moving to BAL or SWE just yet until France is eliminated and we can face them together. Let's finish the job in the West first!
France, thank you for the message. I will hold MAR for now to keep my center secure, but I appreciate the offer of a truce there. I am focusing entirely on retaking my homeland from Austria.

Germany, I will hold MAR to keep France occupied. However, Austria is a massive threat to me right now. If you could spare a unit to move to Tyrolia or Bohemia, it would force Austria to divert units and help me reclaim my home centers. Can you make that happen?

Russia, excellent work! I am going to order F TYS S F ION - NAP to reclaim my home center. If you could use F BUL/EC and A CON to attack F AEG or GRE, it would prevent Austria from supporting Naples or the Ionian. My A SMY will hold to protect your flank. Let's crush them!

Austria, it's hard to listen to talk of a ceasefire while you occupy Venice and Naples. If you are serious about stopping Russia, you must vacate my home centers immediately. What are your exact orders for VEN and NAP this turn to prove your sincerity?

England, I am holding MAR to keep France contained. Please keep pushing them. Also, if you have any influence with Germany, please encourage them to move against Austria (Tyrolia/Bohemia). Austria is getting too big and I need help containing them while Russia pushes from the east.

Excellent! I am moving my new armies from Warsaw and Moscow towards Galicia and Ukraine/Romania to put immense pressure on Budapest and Vienna. For the Balkans, I can order F BUL/EC to GRE to keep Austria scrambling. What will your A SMY do? Let me know how I can best support your move on Naples and if you need any specific coordination against F AEG.

Greetings Kaiser! Thank you. I am fully committed to our DMZs in Prussia, Silesia, and the Baltic Sea. I will be focusing my new builds on the southern front against Austria, while maintaining a defensive posture in Scandinavia against England. I appreciate your continued friendship and wish you the best in the west.

Greetings! Thank you for the encouragement. I am currently heavily engaged with Austria in the south, but I am keeping a close eye on the north. England's betrayal has forced me to defend Scandinavia, which hopefully draws some of their attention away from you. Keep fighting hard, I will look for opportunities to pressure them if they leave themselves exposed.

England, I am willing to reinstate our NAP: you hold Norway, I hold Sweden and St. Petersburg. Let's not waste our units fighting over Scandinavia when there are bigger fish to fry. Please confirm if we are agreed to a strict truce.

Excellent strategy. I am also maintaining a fake truce with Russia to stall their advance while I finish off Italy. Please keep pushing Germany to open an eastern front—Warsaw is wide open for them. I'll hold the line in the Balkans!
Thank you, France! I will keep pressing Italy. With their home centers falling, they are desperate. Hold the line as best you can; once Italy is gone, I can project power westward to help you.

I understand your position. To prove my sincerity and establish a foundation of trust, I will order A VEN - TYR and F NAP - APU this turn, vacating your centers. In return, I ask that you move F ION - EAS and F TYS - LYO to avoid any accidental bounces, and use A SMY to harass Russia. Let's stop fighting each other and stop the Juggernaut.

Perfect. I have locked in A PIC S A BUR - PAR, F ENG - BRE, and F IRI - MAO. Please make sure to order A RUH S A BUR - PAR as well, just in case France tries to support Paris with Brest or Spain! I understand your caution regarding Russia. A defensive wall in DEN/HEL makes sense until we secure the West. Once Paris and Brest fall, we can pivot together.

Thanks for holding MAR. France is about to crack. I will mention Austria to Germany, but right now his units are fully committed to taking Paris and forming a defensive line against Russia in the north. Keep up the good work, and if you can push into Spain or Gulf of Lyon, it would help collapse France even faster!
Agreed. I accept the strict NAP. I will hold F NWY and F NWG. You hold SWE and STP. Let's focus on our respective fronts and leave each other be. Good luck with your southern campaigns.
Just confirming our deal. I am ordering A PIC and F ENG to hold. Give Germany hell in Paris! Focus all your defense there so he wastes his time.

Austria, I've agreed to a fake truce with Russia in the north to keep him off my back while I finish France. Germany and I are making the final push on Paris this Spring. Keep hitting Russia hard in the Balkans! Once France is gone, we will turn our full might eastward to help you.

Germany, excellent. I have locked in A PAR - PIC to cut his support. Let's push England off the continent. I am leaving Paris completely exposed to help you, so please do not betray this trust and ensure BUR moves to BEL!

England, just confirming our deal. I am locking in my defensive orders for Paris and Brest to bounce any German attacks. I am counting on you to hold Picardy and the Channel as promised so we can both survive this.

Tsar, thank you! If you can push fleets into the Baltic or armies into Prussia/Silesia, Germany will completely collapse. He has left his eastern flank entirely undefended to attack me. A strike now would be devastating and secure your dominance!
Italy, sounds like a plan. I will focus entirely on my northern defense against Germany and England. Good luck reclaiming your centers!

Austria, Italy just confirmed to me that he is holding Marseilles and dedicating everything to fighting you. He is completely isolated from any allies. Keep pushing and you'll have the entire Mediterranean!
Excellent! With your A PAR - PIC cutting his support, my A BUR - BEL (supported by RUH and HOL) will surely succeed. I am locking in my orders now. Let's push England off the continent!

Italy, I wish I could help against Austria right now, but I am fully committed to a massive tactical maneuver in the West this Spring to finally break the stalemate. If I move to Tyrolia or Bohemia, I risk exposing Munich and failing my western campaign. Please hold MAR and keep the pressure on. Once I secure my western flank this year, I will look to assist you against Austria.

Greetings Tsar! Excellent to hear. I am locking in my orders to hold my fleets in DEN and HEL, keeping the Baltic and Scandinavia clear. Best of luck with your southern campaigns against Austria. Our continued peace and secure borders are my top priority.

England, everything is set. France has taken the bait completely and told me they are ordering A PAR - PIC to 'help' me attack Belgium! Your A PIC S A BUR - PAR will work perfectly, and Paris will fall. Let's execute the plan!
France, thank you. I will hold MAR and focus entirely on Austria. Good luck defending against England and Germany.

Germany, understood. Finish off France as quickly as you can, and keep a close eye on England. Once you are secure, any pressure on Austria's north would be greatly appreciated. I will hold MAR to keep France contained.

Russia, F BUL/EC to GRE is perfect! If you could also order A CON to attack AEG, it would completely paralyze Austria's fleets and guarantee my move F ION - NAP succeeds (I am ordering F TYS S F ION - NAP). My A SMY will hold to secure your flank. With your armies pushing into Galicia and Romania, Austria will collapse quickly. Let's crush them this year!

Italy, confirming our moves. I will order F BUL/EC - GRE to cut any support and keep Austria occupied. I'm also moving my new armies to Galicia and Ukraine to pressure Vienna and Budapest. Give them hell in Naples!

Kaiser, confirming our DMZs in Prussia, Silesia, and the Baltic remain strictly in place. I am holding my northern lines defensively. Let's revisit cooperation against England once you've secured the west.
Austria, we have a deal. I will hold my lines in BUL, CON, RUM, and GAL. Focus your forces westward against Italy. I will turn my attention to defending Scandinavia from England.
England, agreed. The NAP is reinstated. I will hold SWE and STP, and you hold NWY. Good luck in the west.
France, I am doing my best to hold England in Scandinavia and moving my new armies westward to pressure the central board. Keep fighting hard, every turn you hold out helps us both!

Understood. I have also agreed to a fake truce with Russia to freeze the Balkan lines while I finish off Italy. Once Italy is eliminated, I will be ready to join you in a massive two-front war against the Juggernaut. Good luck with Paris!

Thanks for the intel. Italy is indeed throwing everything at me, but with his home centers falling, he won't last long. Hold the line as best you can! Once I secure the Mediterranean, I will do what I can to relieve the pressure on you.
Excellent. I confirm our deal. I will hold my positions in the Balkans and direct my forces against Italy to secure the rest of his centers. Best of luck against England in the north!

Kaiser, reaffirming our DMZs in BOH and TYR. I am making a final push against Italy. With Russia distracted by England in the north and me in the south, Warsaw is practically begging for a German army. Keep it in mind!
Confirmed, France. My orders are locked in to hold Picardy and the Channel. Focus everything you have on stopping Germany from taking Paris. Good luck!
Perfect! I am locking in A PIC S A BUR - PAR, F ENG - BRE, and F IRI - MAO. With France confused, Paris is guaranteed to fall. Let's finish this!
Confirmed, Russia. My orders are locked in to hold NWY and NWG. Best of luck with your southern campaigns.
Germany, understood. I am locking in A PAR - PIC. I am trusting you completely here to take BEL and not attack PAR. Let's make this happen!
Italy, understood. I am holding SPA and focusing entirely on my defense against England and Germany. Best of luck reclaiming your centers from Austria.

Tsar, that is music to my ears! Germany has left his eastern flank completely bare (Munich and Berlin are wide open if you can get armies there). If you push into Silesia/Prussia, he will crumble. I will keep tying down his armies in Burgundy and Ruhr as long as I can!

England, I am locking in my defensive orders for Paris and Brest. I am counting on you to hold Picardy and the Channel. Germany is trying to trick me into attacking Picardy to cut your support, but I am ignoring him and focusing purely on defense. Let's hold the line.

France, this is perfect. I have locked in A BUR - BEL supported by RUH and HOL. With your A PAR - PIC, England's hold on the continent will be broken. Thank you for your trust; this is the turning point we needed!

Italy, thank you for holding MAR. It is absolutely vital. Paris should fall this season, and once France is dealt with, I will be in a much better position to assist you against Austria. Keep up the great work in the south!

Tsar, I gladly confirm our DMZs in Prussia, Silesia, and the Baltic Sea. My fleets in DEN and HEL are holding defensively. I wish you the best of luck in your campaigns, and I look forward to working together once my western borders are secure.

England, just confirming that all orders are locked in. A BUR - PAR supported by A RUH. France has completely taken the bait and is ordering A PAR - PIC. Paris is ours this Spring! Good luck with your naval maneuvers.

Archduke, I am writing to reaffirm our strict DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia. I am watching Russia's growth very closely, but I must secure my western flank before I can commit forces eastward. Hold the line in the Balkans, and we will deal with the eastern threat together soon.
Thank you, France. I will hold MAR as agreed and focus entirely on my homeland. Best of luck defending against the northern aggression.

Understood, Germany. Secure your western flank first. I will hold MAR and keep France contained. Once you are ready, any pressure on Austria will be greatly appreciated. Good luck with your tactical maneuver!

Excellent, Russia! Confirming our moves: F BUL/EC - GRE is perfect to keep them scrambling. I am ordering F TYS S F ION - NAP to retake my home center. With your armies marching on Galicia and Ukraine, Austria won't know what hit them. Let's break their back this Spring!

Austria, if you are truly willing to vacate Venice and Naples (A VEN - TYR, F NAP - APU), then I will accept this ceasefire to stop the Russian juggernaut. I will order F ION - EAS and F TYS - LYO as requested, and I will prepare A SMY to harass Russia. Please do not betray this trust, or Russia will surely solo.

Italy, my friend, I just realized a tactical limitation: my fleet is in Bulgaria (East Coast), which means it cannot move to Greece or the Aegean Sea! I will instead hold CON and BUL to secure our eastern flank, while I march my armies from Warsaw, Moscow, and Sevastopol into Galicia, Ukraine, and Romania. This massive northern pressure will force Austria to divert their forces away from you. Best of luck taking Naples!

Kaiser, confirming our DMZs in Prussia, Silesia, and the Baltic remain strictly in place. I am moving my new armies south to Galicia and Ukraine to deal with Austria, and holding my northern lines defensively against England. Best of luck in the west.

France, I wish I could help, but England's betrayal in Norway forces me to keep my northern units strictly on defense. Furthermore, I am fully committed to a massive ground war against Austria in the south. I cannot afford to open a third front against Germany right now. Hold the line as best you can!

Austria, confirming our truce. I will hold my positions in BUL and CON, and move my new units to secure RUM and GAL as agreed. I will not attack your centers. Good luck reclaiming your Italian centers and defending against the west.
England, confirming our strict NAP. I will hold SWE and STP defensively. Good luck in the west.
Kaiser, understood. I will hold the line in the Balkans and keep our DMZs in BOH and TYR strictly demilitarized. Best of luck wrapping up the West quickly so we can turn the tide against Russia!
Excellent. I am ordering A VEN - TYR and F NAP - APU as agreed. I look forward to seeing F ION - EAS and F TYS - LYO. Let's turn this game around and stop the Russian menace.
Tsar, thank you for confirming. I am ordering my units to hold the line and will focus entirely on Italy. I am moving my forces westward. Good luck in Scandinavia!
Perfect. If you just hold and support your own units (like A PAR S A BRE or vice versa), Germany will bounce right off you. I am holding PIC and ENG as promised. Let's make Germany waste his turn.

France just messaged me saying they are ignoring your 'trick' to attack Picardy and are instead focusing purely on defense (likely supporting Paris with Brest or vice versa). This is actually great news for us! Since they aren't attacking Picardy, my support (A PIC S A BUR - PAR) will not be cut. With your A RUH supporting A BUR, we have 3 units against whatever they do. Paris is definitely falling. My orders are locked: A PIC S A BUR - PAR, F ENG - BRE, F IRI - MAO.
Confirmed, Russia. My orders are locked to hold NWY and NWG. Best of luck with your southern campaigns.
Just an update: Germany and I are making the final push on Paris this Spring. Once France is crippled, we will be able to turn our attention east. Keep holding the line against Russia!
Germany, I am locked in for A PAR - PIC. I am trusting you completely to take BEL and not attack PAR. Let's break England's hold on the continent!
Italy, understood. I am holding SPA and focusing entirely on my defense against England and Germany. Best of luck reclaiming your centers from Austria.

Tsar, I understand you are stretched thin. Just keeping England occupied in Scandinavia is a huge help to me. If you ever see an opening to slip into the Baltic or pressure Germany's empty home centers, please take it! I will hold the line here as long as I can.
England, I am locked in to defend PAR and BRE as we agreed. I am counting on you to hold PIC and ENG. Let's hope Germany wastes his time bouncing against my defenses.
Austria, Italy has confirmed to me again that he is holding MAR and dedicating everything to fighting you. Keep pushing and you'll have the entire Mediterranean! I am holding the line in the west.
France, perfect. I am locking in A BUR - BEL supported by RUH and HOL. With your A PAR - PIC, we will break England's hold. Thank you for your trust, let's execute this flawlessly!

Italy, thank you for your understanding and for holding MAR. This is the turn we break France. Once Paris falls, I will begin shifting my focus eastward to help contain the Austro-Russian threats. Best of luck this Spring!

Tsar, excellent to hear. I confirm our DMZs in Prussia, Silesia, and the Baltic remain strictly in place. My fleets in DEN and HEL will hold defensively. Best of luck with your southern campaigns against Austria!

England, everything is set on my end. France has confirmed they are ordering A PAR - PIC, which means your support will hold strong and Paris will fall. I am ordering A BUR - PAR supported by A RUH, and relying on your A PIC S A BUR - PAR. Let's crush them!

Archduke, just checking in to reaffirm our DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia. I am making my final push in the West this Spring. Hold strong against Russia and Italy, I will be looking East very soon once my western flank is secure.
Thank you, France. I am holding MAR as promised. Good luck with your defense.
Germany, sounds like a solid plan. I am holding MAR to keep France pinned down. I look forward to your help against Austria once you've secured the West. Best of luck taking Paris!

Russia, no worries about the East Coast limitation, holding CON and BUL is perfectly fine. Your march into Galicia, Ukraine, and Romania will be devastating to Austria and force them to retreat from my centers. I am proceeding with F TYS S F ION - NAP. Let's break them!

Austria, confirming my orders are in: F ION - EAS and F TYS - LYO. A SMY is holding to prepare for our anti-Russian campaign. I am trusting you to order A VEN - TYR and F NAP - APU as agreed. Let's turn the tide against Russia.

France, I must focus on Austria and defending against England for now. If Germany remains completely open and my southern front stabilizes, I will consider a strike, but I cannot promise anything this year. Keep fighting!
Kaiser, my orders are locked to respect our DMZs and hold the north defensively. My armies are marching south to deal with Austria. Good luck in the west!

Italy, just to reiterate my last message: my fleet in BUL is on the East Coast and cannot move to GRE or AEG. I will hold the line in BUL and CON while my armies march into GAL, UKR, and RUM to crush Austria from the north. Best of luck taking Naples!
Austria, my orders are locked. I am moving to GAL, UKR, and RUM, and holding BUL and CON. Our truce is in full effect. Focus your wrath on Italy!
England, my orders are locked to hold SWE and STP. The NAP is in full effect. Good luck with your western campaigns.

goals: Defend VIE and BUD against Russia's incoming move to GAL
Maintain control of VEN and NAP while Italy moves fleets away
Expand naval control into ADR and ION
Maintain German DMZs in BOH and TYR
Encourage England and Germany to open an eastern front against Russia
full_private_diary:
[S1901M] Agreed to a Lepanto alliance with Italy, including DMZs in Tyrolia, Venice, Trieste, and the Adriatic. Italy is moving NAP-ION, ROM-APU, and holding VEN. Agreed to a Galicia DMZ with Russia, who claims to be moving WAR-UKR. Agreed to DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia with Germany. Feigned an alliance with Turkey, who is moving CON-BUL and attempting to sneak F ANK-BLA by tricking Russia into a DMZ. Shared intel with France and England to build goodwill.
Intent: Execute the Austrian half of the Lepanto opening while maintaining the illusion of an Austro-Turkish alliance. Order F TRI - ALB, A BUD - SER, and A VIE - BUD. Honor all agreed DMZs (Galicia, Tyrolia, Bohemia, Venice, Trieste, Adriatic).

[S1901M] The Spring 1901 phase went perfectly according to plan. Italy executed their half of the Lepanto flawlessly (NAP-ION, ROM-APU, VEN Hold), confirming their trustworthiness as a solid ally. Russia honored the Galicia DMZ by moving WAR-UKR, and Germany respected our DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia. My own moves succeeded, securing Serbia and positioning F ALB and A BUD for Fall gains.

Interestingly, Turkey successfully snuck F ANK into the Black Sea. This means Russia was either tricked into a DMZ or outmaneuvered. This is excellent news for me, as a brewing Russo-Turkish conflict will keep both powers distracted while Italy and I continue the Lepanto. 

For the Fall, my priority is to secure Greece using F ALB and A SER, while ensuring Italy takes Tunis and prepares for the 1902 convoy. I must continue to maintain the illusion of an alliance with Turkey to keep them complacent until the trap springs.

[F1901M] The Lepanto alliance with Italy is proceeding perfectly; Italy will convoy APU to TUN via ION and hold VEN. I have successfully fostered a Russo-Turkish war by warning Russia of Turkey's planned attack on RUM (BUL-RUM supported by BLA). Russia is heavily supporting RUM to bounce the attack, while Turkey believes Russia is completely deceived. Germany and France remain friendly and neutral, with Germany confirming our DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia.
Intent: Order F ALB - GRE, A SER S F ALB - GRE, and A BUD H. This secures Greece for a build while maintaining defensive positions. Continue to feign alliance with Turkey while secretly coordinating with Italy and Russia to crush Turkey in 1902.

[F1901M] The Fall 1901 phase unfolded exactly as planned, cementing a dominant position for Austria. The Lepanto alliance with Italy proved completely reliable; Italy successfully convoyed to Tunis and held Venice, honoring our DMZs. Meanwhile, I secured Greece with support from Serbia, earning two crucial builds for the winter. 

My diplomatic maneuvering to ignite a Russo-Turkish war was a resounding success. Turkey committed fully to attacking Romania, but Russia, forewarned, heavily supported the defense and bounced the Turkish assault. Turkey is now bogged down in a futile conflict with Russia, completely blind to the impending Austro-Italian strike. 

With two builds incoming, I will likely construct F Trieste to support the Lepanto and A Vienna to reinforce the Balkans or defend against any unexpected northern aggression. Italy remains highly trustworthy, and Russia is proving to be a useful anvil against the Turkish hammer. The trap is set for 1902.

[S1902M] Italy is executing the Lepanto by moving F ION - EAS and F NAP - ION. Russia is heavily defending RUM against Turkey's expected attack. Turkey is completely deceived, believing I will support their A BUL - RUM attack with my A SER and A BUD, and that I will hold F GRE. I have coordinated with Italy and Russia to spring the trap on Turkey this phase. Germany confirmed our DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia.
Intent: Betray Turkey and execute the Austro-Italian strike. Order F GRE - AEG, F TRI - ALB, and A SER - BUL. A BUD and A VIE will hold to respect the Galicia DMZ with Russia and the Bohemia/Tyrolia DMZs with Germany. This will disrupt Turkey's logistics (clashing with their A CON - BUL or bouncing their A BUL) while positioning fleets for a Fall offensive.

[S1902M] Spring 1902 went exactly according to plan. The Lepanto alliance with Italy is executing flawlessly; Italy successfully moved fleets to the Eastern Mediterranean and Ionian Sea, while I positioned my fleets in the Aegean and Albania. 

Our deception of Turkey worked perfectly. Blind to our trap, Turkey wasted their phase attacking Romania, which Russia easily defended with heavy support. Meanwhile, my move from Serbia to Bulgaria successfully bounced Turkey's army from Constantinople, completely jamming their logistics and leaving their units disorganized. 

Russia and Germany continue to be reliable neighbors, respecting our agreed DMZs in Galicia, Bohemia, and Tyrolia. My defensive holds in Vienna and Budapest secured the north while we focus south. 

My strategic position is incredibly strong. For the Fall, I must coordinate with Italy to convoy their Tunis army into Turkish territory (Syria or Smyrna) while I leverage my Aegean fleet and Serbian army to crack Bulgaria or Constantinople. Turkey is surrounded and doomed.

[F1902M] Coordinated a massive strike against Turkey. Italy will convoy A TUN to SYR via F ION and F EAS. Russia agreed to order F RUM S A SER - BUL. Germany confirmed the continuation of DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia. Successfully deceived Turkey into believing I will hold A SER and F AEG, while Turkey reportedly plans to order A BUL - SER, which will bounce against my supported attack.
Intent: Execute the attack on Turkey. Order A SER - BUL supported by F AEG and Russia's F RUM. Move F ALB - GRE to position for next year. Hold A BUD and A VIE to respect DMZs with Germany and Russia.

[F1902M] Fall 1902 confirmed the absolute reliability of my allies. Italy flawlessly executed the Lepanto, successfully convoying their Tunis army to Syria. Russia also honored our agreement, providing F RUM support for my strike on Bulgaria. 

Unfortunately, my attack on Bulgaria bounced. Turkey anticipated the assault and formed an impenetrable defensive shell, supporting Bulgaria with both Constantinople and the Black Sea to match our combined strength of three. While I failed to secure a build this year, the strategic victory is immense. Turkey is now completely flanked by Italy in Syria and faces a united Austro-Russian-Italian front. They cannot defend against all of us simultaneously next year.

Germany and Russia continue to respect our northern DMZs, allowing me to keep Vienna and Budapest in defensive holds. For 1903, I must coordinate closely with Italy and Russia to exploit Turkey's stretched defenses and finally crack Bulgaria or Constantinople.

[S1903M] Coordinated a massive 4-unit attack on Turkish-held Bulgaria with Russia and Italy. Russia will order F RUM S A SER - BUL and A SEV - ARM. Italy will order A SYR - SMY supported by F EAS, and F ION - TYS. Deceived Turkey into believing I will hold A SER and F AEG, prompting them to focus defenses against Italy. Confirmed DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia with Germany, and Galicia with Russia.
Intent: Execute the coordinated strike on Bulgaria. Order A SER - BUL supported by F AEG and F GRE (expecting Russian F RUM support for a total strength of 4). Order A VIE and A BUD to hold, maintaining the northern DMZs with Germany and Russia.

[S1903M] The Austro-Italian-Russian alliance executed our coordinated strike flawlessly. With Russian support from Romania, my armies successfully dislodged the Turkish defenders and captured Bulgaria. Simultaneously, Italy successfully invaded Smyrna. Turkey is now critically crippled, reduced to just Constantinople and the Black Sea fleet. 

Our diplomatic efforts and tactical planning have paid off immensely. Russia and Italy have proven to be highly trustworthy allies, honoring all commitments and executing their parts of the offensive perfectly. Furthermore, Germany and Russia continued to respect our northern DMZs, keeping Vienna and Budapest secure.

My strategic position is incredibly strong. For the upcoming Fall phase, the objective is to secure my hold on Bulgaria and coordinate with Italy and Russia to eliminate the final Turkish strongholds in Constantinople and Ankara. Once Turkey is fully eradicated, I will need to evaluate the board to decide my next direction for expansion, but maintaining these reliable alliances remains my top priority.

[F1903M] Italy and I agreed to secure our Spring gains; Italy will hold SMY with EAS support, and I will hold BUL with AEG and GRE support. Russia shared crucial intel that Turkey plans to attack BUL with CON supported by BLA, while Russia plans to attack BLA (from RUM supported by SEV) and ANK (from ARM). I deceived Turkey into believing I won't attack CON so they focus on Russia, though I know their true intent is to attack BUL. Germany and I reaffirmed our DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia.
Intent: Order A BUL to Hold, supported by F AEG and F GRE to defend against the anticipated Turkish attack from CON and BLA. Order A VIE and A BUD to Hold, maintaining the northern DMZs with Germany and Russia.

[F1903M] The Fall 1903 phase unfolded perfectly according to plan. My defensive shell around Bulgaria held firm, while Russia successfully captured Ankara from Turkey. Turkey is now reduced to a single supply center (Constantinople) and will be forced to disband a unit, effectively neutralizing them as a threat. 

Crucially, Italy has begun moving west against France, ordering units to Piedmont and the Gulf of Lyon. This confirms Italy's complete commitment to our alliance and secures my western flank. Germany and Russia also continued to respect our northern DMZs, keeping Vienna and Budapest safe.

I will gain a build this winter, bringing me to 6 units. With Turkey nearly eradicated and Italy distracted in the west, my strategic position is incredibly dominant. However, Russia's rapid growth to 7 SCs warrants caution. My next major decision will be whether to turn my forces against a bloated Russia or expand further into the Mediterranean.

[S1904M] Agreed with Russia to take CON (A BUL - CON supported by F AEG and Russian A ANK). Reaffirmed DMZs with Germany. Deceived Turkey by promising to support A CON to hold. Deceived Italy by claiming A TRI will move to SER, while secretly coordinating with France to stab Italy by ordering A TRI - VEN since Italy's home centers are completely undefended.
Intent: Order A BUL - CON supported by F AEG to eliminate Turkey. Order A TRI - VEN to stab Italy and capture an undefended home center. Order F GRE - ION to prepare for further naval action against Italy. Order A VIE and A BUD to Hold, maintaining northern DMZs.

[S1904M] The Spring 1904 phase was a massive success. My coordinated attack with Russia finally eliminated Turkey as I captured Constantinople. More importantly, my surprise stab against Italy worked flawlessly; my army walked right into an undefended Venice while Italy was busy attacking France in Marseille. Moving my fleet to the Ionian Sea further cements my naval advantage against them and positions me perfectly for the Fall.

While my tactical execution was perfect, the strategic landscape is shifting. Russia honored our agreement but continues to expand, taking Norway and moving a fleet into the Black Sea. With Turkey gone, Russia's massive size and new presence in the Black Sea make them a looming threat. 

My immediate goals for the Fall are to secure my holds on Venice and Constantinople to guarantee my builds, prepare defenses against the inevitable Italian retaliation, and carefully monitor Russia's next moves in the east.

[F1904M] France and England both provided urgent warnings of an imminent, massive Russian stab against me. Russia claims they will support A CON and hold BLA/RUM, but this is almost certainly a deception. Italy is furious about my stab in VEN/ION and demanded I vacate; I falsely agreed to move A VEN - TYR and F ION - AEG to placate them, but I fully intend to hold my ground. Germany confirmed our DMZs in BOH/TYR remain solid. England is attacking NWY to distract Russia in the north.
Intent: Order A CON Hold and F AEG S A CON to defend against the expected Russian attack (BLA + ANK) and potential Italian interference. Order A VEN Hold to secure the center for a build. Order F ION - TYS to pressure Italy and bounce their incoming fleets. Order A BUD and A VIE to Hold to maintain home defense and honor German DMZs.

[F1904M] The warnings from England and France were entirely accurate, but the reality was even worse: Russia and Italy have formed a coordinated alliance against me. The Russian stab was devastating. Italy's A SMY supported Russia's A ANK into Constantinople, destroying my army, while Russia simultaneously moved F RUM to capture Bulgaria. 

Furthermore, Italy forced the Ionian Sea, using F EAS to support F TYS and dislodge my fleet. My eastern and naval fronts are collapsing under this combined Russo-Italian assault. 

Fortunately, I successfully held Venice, and England managed to dislodge Russia from Norway, providing some crucial distraction in the north. My immediate priority is to retreat F ION to a defensible position (likely the Adriatic or Albania) to protect my core centers. Moving forward, my survival depends entirely on rallying Germany and France to attack Italy's exposed western flank, while forming an impenetrable defensive shell around Vienna, Budapest, Serbia, and Greece.

[S1905M] Agreed to a fake truce with Russia, but Russia explicitly stated they are moving to GAL, requiring immediate defense of VIE/BUD. Deceived Italy into moving their fleets away (ION-EAS, TYS-LYO) by falsely promising to vacate VEN to TYR and NAP to APU. Reaffirmed strict DMZs in BOH and TYR with Germany. England and Germany are finishing off France before turning East.
Intent: Defend against Russia's stated move to GAL by ordering A VIE - GAL supported by A BUD. Betray Italy by holding VEN and NAP (moving to TYR would break the German DMZ anyway). Capitalize on Italy's expected naval retreat by moving F TRI - ADR and F AEG - ION to dominate the seas around Italy.

[S1905M] [S1905M] My defensive maneuvers against Russia succeeded brilliantly; A VIE - GAL succeeded with Budapest's support, bouncing Russia's move from Warsaw and securing my northern flank. However, my deception against Italy failed. Instead of vacating the Mediterranean as I had hoped, Italy launched a supported attack on Naples (ION-NAP), dislodging my fleet. Fortunately, my naval repositioning (AEG-ION, TRI-ADR) succeeded, giving me a strong presence in the Adriatic and Ionian seas to counter Italy's fleets and defend my core.

Meanwhile, Germany and England successfully coordinated to take Paris, signaling the imminent collapse of France. With the western front wrapping up, it is absolutely critical that I convince Germany and England to pivot east and attack Russia. My immediate priorities are to hold Galicia, establish a defensive line against Russia's Balkan juggernaut, and use my new naval position in ION/ADR to punish Italy and reclaim Naples.
private_diary:
[CONSOLIDATED HISTORY] After successfully allying with Italy and Russia to eliminate Turkey, I stabbed Italy in Spring 1904 to capture Venice. This triggered a devastating, coordinated Russo-Italian counter-alliance in Fall 1904. Russia betrayed me, capturing Bulgaria and Constantinople with Italian support, destroying my army in Constantinople. Italy simultaneously forced my fleet out of the Ionian Sea. I successfully held Venice, but my eastern and naval fronts are collapsing.

Diplomatically, Russia and Italy are active, coordinated enemies. England and France are highly valuable potential allies; they accurately warned me of the Russian stab. England is actively fighting Russia in the north, having just dislodged them from Norway, while France is engaged with Italy in the west. Germany remains a reliable neutral neighbor, consistently honoring our long-standing DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia.

My immediate strategic priority is survival. I must form an impenetrable defensive shell around my remaining core centers: Vienna, Budapest, Serbia, Greece, and Venice. My dislodged Ionian fleet must retreat to a defensible position like the Adriatic or Albania. Moving forward, I must urgently coordinate with France to attack Italy's exposed western flank, and work with England and Germany to pressure Russia in the north, forcing my attackers to divert units away from the Balkans and the Mediterranean.

[S1905M] Agreed to a fake truce with Russia, but Russia explicitly stated they are moving to GAL, requiring immediate defense of VIE/BUD. Deceived Italy into moving their fleets away (ION-EAS, TYS-LYO) by falsely promising to vacate VEN to TYR and NAP to APU. Reaffirmed strict DMZs in BOH and TYR with Germany. England and Germany are finishing off France before turning East.
Intent: Defend against Russia's stated move to GAL by ordering A VIE - GAL supported by A BUD. Betray Italy by holding VEN and NAP (moving to TYR would break the German DMZ anyway). Capitalize on Italy's expected naval retreat by moving F TRI - ADR and F AEG - ION to dominate the seas around Italy.

[S1905M] [S1905M] My defensive maneuvers against Russia succeeded brilliantly; A VIE - GAL succeeded with Budapest's support, bouncing Russia's move from Warsaw and securing my northern flank. However, my deception against Italy failed. Instead of vacating the Mediterranean as I had hoped, Italy launched a supported attack on Naples (ION-NAP), dislodging my fleet. Fortunately, my naval repositioning (AEG-ION, TRI-ADR) succeeded, giving me a strong presence in the Adriatic and Ionian seas to counter Italy's fleets and defend my core.

Meanwhile, Germany and England successfully coordinated to take Paris, signaling the imminent collapse of France. With the western front wrapping up, it is absolutely critical that I convince Germany and England to pivot east and attack Russia. My immediate priorities are to hold Galicia, establish a defensive line against Russia's Balkan juggernaut, and use my new naval position in ION/ADR to punish Italy and reclaim Naples.

goals: Eliminate France completely in coordination with Germany.
Maintain the Scandinavian NAP with Russia until France is defeated.
Maintain the strong offensive alliance with Germany.
Prepare to pivot east to confront the Russian juggernaut once the West is secure.
full_private_diary:
[S1901M] France: Agreed to DMZ English Channel; France is moving F BRE to MAO. Germany: Agreed to split Low Countries (England gets Belgium, Germany gets Holland) and respect claims to Norway/Denmark; Germany shared opening moves (F KIE-DEN, A BER-KIE, A MUN-RUH). Russia: Agreed to a northern non-aggression pact (England takes Norway, Russia takes Sweden); Russia moving F STP/SC to BOT. Italy, Austria, Turkey: Established friendly communications, with Turkey and Austria agreeing to keep Russia busy in the south.
Intent: Execute the agreed-upon northern opening: F EDI - NWG, F LON - NTH, A LVP - YOR. This honors the ENG DMZ with France, sets up for Norway and Belgium as discussed with Germany, and respects the Scandinavian split with Russia.

[S1901M] Spring 1901 went perfectly according to plan, with all neighbors honoring our agreements. The English Channel remains a DMZ, as France moved to MAO and PIC. Germany executed their exact shared moves (DEN, KIE, RUH), setting up our agreed split of the Low Countries where I will take Belgium and they take Holland. Russia moved to the Gulf of Bothnia, respecting our Scandinavian arrangement and leaving Norway uncontested for my fleet in the Norwegian Sea.

My strategic position is incredibly strong. I am perfectly positioned to secure both Norway (via F NWG) and Belgium (convoying A YOR via F NTH) this Fall. Trust with France, Germany, and Russia is currently high. My immediate goal is to secure these two builds and observe the Fall moves to decide whether to ally with Germany against France, France against Germany, or push against Russia in Scandinavia.

[F1901M] France agreed to support my convoy to Belgium (A PIC S A YOR - BEL) and confirmed their orders. Germany confirmed they will take Holland (A KIE - HOL, A RUH S A KIE - HOL) and leave Belgium to me. Russia confirmed they will take Sweden and leave Norway to me. Turkey is eager to coordinate a crossfire on Russia in 1902, which I agreed to consider. Italy was a friendly check-in.
Intent: Execute the agreed-upon moves to secure two builds: F NWG - NWY, F NTH C A YOR - BEL, and A YOR - BEL. Rely on French support (A PIC S A YOR - BEL) to guarantee Belgium.

[F1901M] Fall 1901 went flawlessly. France, Germany, and Russia all honored our agreements to the letter. France provided the promised support for my convoy into Belgium, Germany took Holland while respecting my claim to Belgium, and Russia took Sweden while leaving Norway to me. I successfully secured both target supply centers and will have two builds this winter.

My strategic position is exceptional, and trust with my immediate neighbors is currently very high. The English Channel remains clear. In the east, Turkey and Russia are already clashing over Romania, which keeps Russia distracted and fulfills Turkey's promise to apply pressure.

With two builds incoming, I must now decide my mid-term direction. I can ally with Germany against France, ally with France against Germany, or launch a northern campaign against Russia while they are occupied in the south. I will use the Winter build phase to position my new units and solidify my next alliance.

[S1902M] Successfully orchestrated a clash between France and Germany over Burgundy (France ordered A PAR - BUR; Germany ordered A MUN - BUR supported by A RUH). Reaffirmed the English Channel DMZ with France (F BRE moving to MAO). Convinced Russia of peaceful intentions in Scandinavia while secretly coordinating with Turkey to launch a massive northern offensive against St. Petersburg and Sweden, capitalizing on Russia's southern distraction.
Intent: Execute the northern fleet maneuver to surround Russia: F NWY - BAR, F EDI - NWG, F NTH - SKA, and F LON - NTH. Hold A BEL to maintain a secure border and anchor the line while France and Germany clash in Burgundy.

[S1902M] France has completely betrayed our trust, breaking the English Channel DMZ with F BRE - ENG and launching an unprovoked attack on Belgium (A PIC - BEL). Fortunately, my hold in Belgium bounced their attack, but the western front is now highly volatile and my home centers are threatened. 

In the north, my fleet maneuvers executed flawlessly, positioning me in BAR, NWG, SKA, and NTH. However, Russia anticipated the aggression, reinforcing St. Petersburg (A MOS - STP) and Livonia. 

With France turning hostile, my strategic priorities must shift immediately. I must ally closely with Germany, who successfully forced Burgundy and is now in a prime position to pressure France from the east. I need to secure my home centers against the French fleet in the Channel while deciding whether to press the attack on Russia's St. Petersburg/Sweden or redirect northern fleets to crush France. Trust in France is permanently shattered.

[F1902M] Germany is fully committed to an alliance against France; they agreed to support A BEL to hold with A HOL, attack PAR with A BUR (supported by RUH), and hold F HEL and F DEN to keep NTH clear for me. France apologized for moving to ENG, blaming false intel, and promised to move F ENG to MAO to defend against Germany. I agreed to a fake truce with Russia in Scandinavia to lower their guard, while secretly confirming with Turkey that I will attack St. Petersburg this phase.
Intent: Order F NWG - STP supported by F BAR to capitalize on the northern position and capture St. Petersburg. Order F NTH - ENG to either kick France out or take the Channel if they actually retreat to MAO as promised. Order F SKA - NTH to backfill and secure the North Sea. Order A BEL to hold, relying on Germany's promised support from HOL.

[F1902M] France's deception was absolute. Instead of retreating from the Channel as promised, they slipped F ENG into London and moved F MAO to the Irish Sea. Losing my capital is a devastating blow, leaving my remaining home centers critically vulnerable. I should have covered London directly instead of gambling on their retreat. 

On the continent, Germany proved their loyalty by supporting Belgium against another French attack, cementing our alliance. In the north, my assault on St. Petersburg failed as Russia heavily reinforced it with Livonia. 

With the loss of London, I am forced into a deficit and must disband a unit. My entire strategic focus must now shift to survival. I must abandon the Russian campaign, pull my northern fleets back to defend Edinburgh and Liverpool, and work closely with Germany to pressure France and reclaim my homeland. France is now an existential threat that must be eliminated.

[S1903M] Solidified a strong offensive alliance with Germany against France. Germany agreed to support A BEL to hold from HOL, and attack PAR with BUR (supported by RUH). Faked a truce with France, promising to attack Germany (A BEL-HOL, F NTH-HEL, F ENG-NTH) in exchange for France moving F LON-WAL and F IRI-MAO; this is a deception to trick France into vacating London. Agreed to a strict non-aggression pact with Russia in Scandinavia (holding NWY). Encouraged Italy (via Turkey and direct messages) to attack France's exposed southern flank.
Intent: Execute the coordinated attack on France with Germany while ignoring the fake truce with France. Order F ENG - LON supported by F NTH to retake the capital. Order A BEL to hold (relying on German support from HOL). Order F NWY to hold to honor the NAP with Russia.

[S1903M] [S1903M] A crucial victory! I successfully retook London by dislodging the French fleet with F ENG - LON, supported by NTH. The fake truce with France worked well enough to prevent them from heavily defending my capital. Germany proved their steadfast loyalty once again by supporting my army in Belgium to hold, completely ignoring France's attempt to support a German backstab (PIC S HOL-BEL). 

However, the French threat remains severe. As I vacated the English Channel to take London, France immediately moved F BRE - ENG, keeping my home centers under direct threat. Furthermore, France successfully pushed Germany out of Burgundy, complicating our western offensive. 

Moving forward, my primary objective is to clear the English Channel and secure my homeland. I must continue coordinating closely with Germany to counter France's momentum in Burgundy and protect Belgium. The non-aggression pact with Russia in Scandinavia is holding, allowing me to focus entirely on the French menace.

[F1903M] Solidified defensive plans with Germany: Germany will order A HOL S A BEL, while attacking BUR with MUN and RUH. Confirmed with Italy that they are moving F TYS - LYO and A VEN - PIE to attack France's southern flank. Maintained the NAP with Russia in Scandinavia (F NWY will hold). Negotiated a fake truce with France where they promised to move F WAL - IRI and F ENG - MAO in exchange for me holding LON, NTH, and BEL. I will honor the holds to secure my centers, but I do not trust France.
Intent: Order F LON to hold, supported by F NTH to ensure I keep my capital and secure a build. Order A BEL to hold, relying on Germany's promised support from HOL. Order F NWY to hold to maintain the NAP with Russia. Ignore Turkey's pleas to attack St. Petersburg.

[F1903M] France's treachery continues, as they completely ignored our fake truce and attacked London with Wales and the English Channel. Fortunately, my supported hold with the North Sea successfully defended the capital. Germany remains my most steadfast ally, honoring their promise to support Belgium while continuing their assault on Burgundy. 

Crucially, Italy followed through on their commitment to attack France's southern flank, successfully moving into Piedmont and the Gulf of Lyon. This multi-front pressure is breaking France. I now hold 5 centers with only 4 units, securing a vital build, while France is overextended with 6 units and only 5 centers, forcing them to disband. 

My strategy is working. I will build a new fleet in Edinburgh or Liverpool to help eradicate the French infestation (Wales, English Channel, Irish Sea) from my home waters. I must maintain the Scandinavian NAP with Russia and continue coordinating the squeeze on France with Germany and Italy.

[S1904M] Germany and I agreed to a coordinated attack on France: Germany will order MUN-BUR supported by RUH, while I order A BEL-PIC to cut support. Italy is attacking MAR with PIE supported by LYO. I agreed with Italy and Germany to attack ENG and IRI to clear my home waters. I faked a truce with France, promising to hold my fleets and leave Picardy/Brest alone in exchange for them moving F ENG-MAO and F IRI-NAO. I reaffirmed the Scandinavian NAP with Russia (F NWY holds). Turkey warned about Russia's growth, but I deferred action until France is defeated.
Intent: Execute the coordinated attack on France while ignoring the fake truce. Order F LON - ENG supported by F NTH, and F LVP - IRI to clear home waters. Order A BEL - PIC to cut French support and assist Germany's attack on Burgundy. Order F NWY to hold, honoring the NAP with Russia.

[S1904M] The western alliance triumphed this season, but at a terrible cost in the north. Germany successfully took Burgundy and Italy captured Marseilles, effectively crippling France's defensive lines. Surprisingly, France honored our fake truce by moving their fleets to MAO and NAO, allowing me to easily secure the English Channel and Irish Sea. My home waters are finally clear of the French infestation.

However, Russia completely betrayed our Non-Aggression Pact, launching a coordinated attack with Sweden and St. Petersburg to dislodge my fleet in Norway. This is a massive betrayal and shifts the strategic landscape entirely. Russia is no longer neutral; they are an active, dangerous enemy. 

With France collapsing, I must rapidly finish them off while pivoting my northern forces to counter Russian aggression. I will need to lean heavily on Germany to help contain Russia while I attempt to retake Scandinavia. The Russian threat can no longer be ignored.

[F1904M] Germany and I have a locked-in coordinated strike against France: Germany will order A BUR - PAR supported by A RUH, while I order A BEL - PIC supported by F ENG. Germany reports France is fooled and ordering A PIC S A BUR - BEL, leaving Paris and Picardy vulnerable. I have faked truces with both France (claiming I will retreat fleets to LON/LVP) and Russia (claiming I accept their control of Norway). In reality, I will attack Norway while finishing off France. Austria and Italy are distracted by their own war, but Austria is preparing to fight Russia in the south.
Intent: Execute the coordinated attack on France: A BEL - PIC supported by F ENG. Ignore the fake truces with France and Russia. Attempt to retake Norway by ordering F NTH - NWY supported by F NWG. F IRI will hold or move to MAO to maintain pressure.

[F1904M] [F1904M] A phenomenally successful season! My coordinated strikes landed perfectly, allowing me to capture Picardy from France and retake Norway from Russia. The dual-front offensive is working exactly as planned. 

However, Germany made a frustrating tactical error. Instead of supporting their attack on Paris as agreed, they attempted to backfill Burgundy (A RUH-BUR), causing their assault on Paris to bounce. While annoying, France is still crumbling under our combined weight, and my capture of Picardy puts immense pressure on Brest and Paris.

Russia's fleet in Norway was successfully dislodged, punishing their earlier betrayal. Unfortunately, Russia continues to grow in the south, capturing Constantinople from Austria. I must capitalize on my upcoming builds to solidify my hold on Scandinavia and finish off the remnants of the French navy in the Atlantic. The alliance with Germany remains strong, but I must ensure our tactical coordination is tighter moving forward.

[S1905M] Germany and I have finalized a coordinated strike to take Paris: Germany will order A BUR - PAR supported by A RUH, while I order A PIC S A BUR - PAR, F ENG - BRE, and F IRI - MAO. To ensure my support isn't cut, I faked a truce with France, convincing them to purely defend Paris and Brest rather than attacking Picardy. I also reinstated a strict Non-Aggression Pact with Russia in Scandinavia (I hold NWY/NWG, they hold SWE/STP) to buy time to finish France. Austria and Italy are fighting each other, but Austria is aware of the massive Russian threat.
Intent: Execute the coordinated attack on France: order A PIC S German A BUR - PAR, F ENG - BRE, and F IRI - MAO. Ignore the fake truce with France. Honor the NAP with Russia by ordering F NWY and F NWG to hold, securing Scandinavia defensively while the western front is resolved.

[S1905M] The coordinated strike with Germany was a resounding success! My army in Picardy successfully supported the German army in Burgundy into Paris, dislodging the French. Although my fleet attacks on Brest and the Mid-Atlantic Ocean bounced, they perfectly cut French support, ensuring Paris fell. France is now on the brink of collapse. 

In the north, Russia honored our Non-Aggression Pact, holding in St. Petersburg and Sweden. This buys me crucial time to finish off the western front. However, Russia continues to grow in the east, now holding 9 centers. Alarmingly, Austria and Italy are still fighting each other—Italy just took Naples from Austria—ignoring the massive Russian juggernaut. 

My immediate priority is to capture Brest and clear the Mid-Atlantic Ocean to finally eliminate France. I must maintain my strong alliance with Germany while urgently pushing Italy and Austria to unite against Russia before it becomes unstoppable.

Defend Paris and Brest against German attacks by using mutually supporting hold orders
