ENGLAND: A PIC S F ENG - BRE
GERMANY: A PAR S F ENG - BRE
RUSSIA: A UKR S A WAR - GAL

messages.message: Great job in Paris! With France on the ropes, I hope you and England are looking East. Russia is at 9 SCs and pushing hard into my lines. A move toward Warsaw or Silesia/Prussia would be incredibly helpful to distract them. I'm holding the line in Galicia to keep them out of the center.

Excellent work in Norway and Picardy! Russia is getting dangerously large (9 SCs) and is throwing everything at me in the south. If you can keep the pressure on StP and Sweden, it will prevent them from running away with the game. I'll hold the line in the Balkans as long as I can.

Well, we bounced in Galicia as expected. With England and Germany wrapping up the west, they are going to turn on you next (England already has Norway). Do we really want to keep fighting a war of attrition here, or can we agree to a truce and focus on our real threats?
Hang in there! I am doing my best to fight Italy in the Mediterranean. If you can keep Italy occupied around Marseille or the western Med, I will keep pushing from the East to relieve some pressure.

Excellent work taking Paris! The coordinated strike worked perfectly and France is now crumbling. For the Fall, I propose the following to guarantee we break them further:

You order: A PAR - GAS, supported by A BUR.
I will order: F ENG - BRE, supported by A PIC, and F IRI - MAO.

My attack on MAO cuts their fleet, and your attack on GAS cuts their army. This guarantees I take Brest, and you might even take Gascony or destroy their retreating army! Let me know if this plan works for you.

Greetings Russia, congratulations on your continued success in the South. I am writing to confirm that I will continue to strictly honor our NAP in Scandinavia (holding NWY and NWG) this Fall while I finish off the remnants of France. I value our peaceful northern border and hope to maintain it.

Hello Italy, congratulations on your tactical success in Naples, but I urge you to look at the broader map! Russia is now at 9 centers and growing rapidly. If you and Austria don't call a truce and turn East immediately, Russia will become an unstoppable juggernaut. France is almost dead, so I will be turning my fleets around soon to help contain the threat, but we desperately need you to hold the line in the South and stop fighting Austria!

Hello Austria, I see the situation with Italy has deteriorated. I am actively messaging Italy to urge them to make peace with you, as Russia is now at 9 centers and poses a massive, game-ending threat to everyone. Please try to establish a truce with Italy and focus everything on stopping the Russian juggernaut. I am finishing off France now and will pivot to help contain Russia as soon as possible.

Austria, excellent work against Italy, though I see he managed to retake Naples. Please keep the pressure on him! I am barely holding on against the E/G juggernaut. If you can keep Italy distracted, I can try to hold the line in Iberia. Are you and Russia able to call a truce? You both need to focus on the edges (E/G and Italy) rather than fighting each other.

Russia, E/G is steamrolling me. They are perfectly coordinated and just took Paris. Please, I beg you, put pressure on Germany or England! If I fall, they will turn all their forces against you. Also, please try to make peace with Austria so you can both focus on the real threats. E/G will be unstoppable if they aren't checked now.
Italy, thank you for honoring the truce in MAR. I will continue to leave you be so you can deal with Austria. Let's keep our borders peaceful.

England, I'm disappointed by the betrayal, but I understand you're playing the board. Just be careful—Germany is going to get huge off my centers and then he won't need you anymore. If you want to reconsider and work together against him, I'm open to it. Otherwise, I'll just have to make taking my last centers as painful as possible.

Germany, well played on Paris. You and England have a solid alliance. Just remember that once I'm gone, you two will be the only ones left in the west. If you ever want to pivot and use me against him, let me know.

England, excellent work! I am finally in Paris. For the Fall, I suggest we crush Brest. If you order F ENG - BRE supported by A PIC, I can also order A PAR S F ENG - BRE (giving you 3 on Brest). Meanwhile, F IRI can attack MAO. I will order A BUR S A PAR just in case France tries to attack Paris with Gascony. What do you think?

Greetings Russia! The West is finally falling into place as I've taken Paris. I see you are making great gains in the Balkans. Our DMZs (PRU, SIL, BAL, Scandinavia) remain strictly observed. Let me know if you have any concerns or if there's anything I can do to help you.
Greetings Italy! I have finally taken Paris. France is crumbling. If you can keep the pressure on Spain or hold Marseilles, they won't be able to defend Brest. How goes the fight against Austria?
Greetings Austria! I've finally broken into Paris. I am keeping our DMZs (BOH, TYR) strictly clear. The East looks like a tough fight right now - let me know if I can help diplomatically.

Greetings my friend! The trap worked perfectly and I am back in Naples. I will hold it this Fall to officially reclaim the center. Austria has 3 fleets (ION, ADR, APU) and will likely try to dislodge me, so I must use TYS to support NAP. 
With Austria's fleets tied up against me, his eastern flank is very vulnerable. He has A GAL and A BUD. You have overwhelming force with WAR, UKR, RUM, BUL, CON. A push on Budapest or Serbia this turn would be devastating. What are your orders for the Fall? Let's crush him!

Excellent work taking Paris! I am holding Marseilles as promised and staying out of your way. With France collapsing, you might soon have units free. Austria is currently fighting for his life against me and Russia. If you can spare an army to move toward Tyrolia or Bohemia, we can partition Austria together. Let me know your thoughts!

Hello England, I see the campaign against France is going well. I am holding Marseilles and maintaining our truce in the west. I'm fully committed to the war against Austria. Let me know if you need anything from me, otherwise I'll keep out of your way.

Austria, you lied to me about retreating from Venice and Naples, so I had to take Naples by force. Russia is about to walk into Budapest and Serbia with overwhelming force. If you want any chance of survival, we need to stop fighting. I will hold Naples and TYS. If you pull back from ION and APU to defend against Russia, I will not advance further. Otherwise, Russia will win the game.

Outstanding work taking Naples! Austria is bleeding centers now and fighting a losing two-front war. I have Warsaw, Ukraine, and Romania all bordering Galicia, so I will force them out this turn with overwhelming numbers. Are you planning to push ION with TYS and NAP? Let me know how we can best coordinate our next strikes.

Congratulations on taking Paris! Just reaffirming that I am strictly honoring our DMZs in Prussia, Silesia, and the Baltic Sea. My entire focus is on dismantling Austria in the south. Let me know if you need any diplomatic support.

Hello England, just confirming that I am continuing to honor our northern NAP (St. Pete and Sweden holding). I am fully engaged in a massive ground war against Austria in the south. Best of luck wrapping up the west!

Hello Austria, I see you made it into Galicia. I assume this was a defensive precaution. I am willing to hold my borders (Warsaw/Ukraine/Romania) if you are willing to focus your efforts on Italy, who just took Naples from you. Let me know if we can agree to a truce here so you can deal with the Italian threat.

Congratulations on Paris! I appreciate you keeping the DMZs clear. The best way you can help diplomatically and strategically is to start shifting your armies East. Russia is at 9 SCs and growing. If you could move towards Munich/Silesia/Prussia, it would force Russia to defend their home centers and relieve the immense pressure on me.

You're right, Russia is the true threat to both of us right now. I apologize for the deception last turn; I was desperate to keep my centers. I agree to a truce. I will hold Venice and use my fleets defensively to protect my core, rather than attacking Naples. Please hold TYS and NAP as promised so I can throw everything at stopping the Russian juggernaut.

Yes, my move to Galicia was purely defensive since you mentioned moving there in the Spring. I am very happy to agree to a truce. I will hold Galicia and Budapest and focus my fleets and armies on dealing with Italy in the Mediterranean. Let's respect our current borders.

I'm taking your advice and negotiating a truce with Italy right now. Russia is simply too big to ignore. I will hold the line in the Balkans and Galicia. Please keep up the pressure on StP and Sweden - we need to force Russia to fight on two fronts!
I'm doing my best to hold the line. I'm negotiating a truce with Italy so we can both focus on the bigger threats (Russia for me, E/G for you). Hang in there in Iberia!

Germany, that plan is perfect. I will order F ENG - BRE supported by A PIC, and F IRI - MAO. With your A PAR supporting F ENG - BRE, we are guaranteed to take Brest since F IRI will cut MAO's support. Thank you for the excellent coordination! Let's crush them.

Italy, thank you for holding the line in the west. I must reiterate my concern about Russia, who is now at 9 centers. While I understand your war with Austria is going well, if Russia breaks through the Balkans, they will sweep into the Mediterranean and you will be their next target. Please consider a truce with Austria to stop the Russian juggernaut before it's too late. I am finishing France now and will pivot east soon.
Russia, thank you for confirming. I will also strictly honor our NAP in Scandinavia this Fall, ordering F NWY and F NWG to hold. Best of luck in the south!

Austria, I am continuing to pressure Italy to make peace with you and turn against Russia. I am taking Brest this Fall and will soon be able to send fleets towards the Mediterranean or St. Petersburg to help relieve the pressure. Hold strong!
France, I appreciate the warning, but I must commit to my current path. Best of luck.

Thanks Austria! I have units in Gascony and Spain that will keep Italy nervous about Marseille, preventing him from sending everything east. Please keep hitting him hard! Also, any luck making peace with Russia? We really need Russia to distract England and Germany in the north before they become unstoppable.

England, Germany is getting the lion's share of my centers. He took Paris and is poised to take more. If you keep helping him, he will outgrow you and turn on you. I am willing to work with you to stop him. Let me know if you want to coordinate, otherwise I will just have to make taking my last centers as painful as possible.
England, your plan makes perfect sense. Cutting Gascony is the right move to ensure Brest falls. I will order A PAR - GAS supported by A BUR. Let's crush them!
France, I appreciate the offer. For now, I must secure my position, but I am always keeping my options open in case England gets too greedy. What do you propose for this Fall?

Italy, thank you for holding Marseilles! I am currently using all my armies to finish off France, so I cannot spare anything for Bohemia or Tyrolia this year. However, once France is dealt with, I will definitely be looking East. Good luck against Austria!
Russia, thank you! I am glad to hear our DMZs remain solid. I am fully committed to finishing France this year, so my forces will remain in the West. Best of luck with your southern campaigns!

Austria, I hear your concerns about Russia. Unfortunately, my armies are entirely tied up finishing off France this Fall, so I cannot make a move on Warsaw or Silesia just yet. Hold the line as best you can! Once the West is secure, I will have more flexibility.
Agreed. I will hold Marseilles and maintain the peace. Good luck.

The fight against Austria is progressing—I just retook Naples! I will continue to hold Marseilles to keep France's southern flank tied down. Once you finish France, any pressure you can apply to Tyrolia or Bohemia would be greatly appreciated so we can partition Austria together.

I need to hold Naples this Fall to officially capture the center, and Austria has F ION and F APU bordering it. I will order F TYS S F NAP to ensure I don't get dislodged. Since my fleets are tying up his navy, his eastern flank is wide open for you. Forcing Galicia is excellent, and if you can also push into Budapest or Serbia, he will collapse. Let's crush him!

England, I understand your concern about Russia. However, Austria currently holds Venice and has fleets in the Ionian and Adriatic. I cannot turn East until my home centers are secure. Once Austria is pushed back from Italy, I will be in a position to help contain Russia. For now, I must fight for my survival.

I hear your pleas, France, and I am genuinely concerned about E/G's rapid growth. Unfortunately, Austria just moved into Galicia right on my border, and I am locked in a massive ground war in the Balkans. I simply don't have the units to spare to intervene in the West right now. I will try to wrap up Austria as quickly as possible so I can look westward.

Thank you, Germany! I am strictly observing our DMZs (PRU, SIL, BAL, Scandinavia). My entire focus is on dislodging Austria from Galicia and pushing into the Balkans. Best of luck with your operations in the West!

Holding Naples is definitely the right play. Austria will throw everything at it. To relieve pressure on you, I will launch a massive offensive this turn. I'm ordering WAR - GAL supported by UKR, and RUM - BUD. This will force his armies to defend and hopefully crack his eastern flank. Let's crush him!
I agree to the truce. I will hold my positions in Warsaw, Ukraine, and Romania this Fall so you can focus all your efforts on retaking Naples from Italy. Let's end this war of attrition.
Just confirming again that I am holding my northern positions (STP, SWE) to honor our NAP. Good luck in the West!

I've managed to secure a temporary truce with Russia, which frees me up to focus entirely on Italy in the Mediterranean. Keep up the pressure on Marseille! If we squeeze Italy from both sides, he'll crack. I'm also urging E/G to turn East as soon as possible to deal with Russia.

Understood, Germany. I will hold the line in the East and keep the Russian juggernaut at bay. Please finish up in France as quickly as possible, and thank you for continuing to respect our DMZs in BOH and TYR. Let me know as soon as you're ready to pivot.
Excellent. I will hold Galicia and Budapest as agreed and turn my attention fully to the Mediterranean and Italy. It's good to have peace on our border so we can both focus on our respective fronts.

I've secured a temporary truce with Italy to focus on the Russian threat, as you suggested. I'm holding the line in the Balkans. Please keep pushing hard in the North against StP and Sweden! We need to keep Russia contained.

Excellent. I am locking in F ENG - BRE supported by A PIC, and F IRI - MAO. With your attack on Gascony cutting their support, Brest is guaranteed to fall. Once France is eliminated, we will need to discuss how to handle the massive Russian threat in the East. Let's crush them!

I completely understand your position, Italy. It is impossible to fight a two-front war when your home centers are threatened. I will urge Austria to back out of Venice and the Adriatic so you can secure your borders and eventually help against Russia. Best of luck securing your homeland.
Confirmed, Russia. I am locking in holds for F NWY and F NWG to honor our NAP. Best of luck in your campaigns this Fall.

Austria, I spoke with Italy. They are aware of the Russian threat but feel they cannot turn East while you hold Venice and have fleets in the Adriatic and Ionian. If you want Italy's help against the Russian juggernaut, you may need to offer them a withdrawal from their home centers. I leave it to your judgment, but Russia is the true threat to us all. I am taking Brest this Fall and will pivot as soon as possible.

Germany, England is poised to take Brest with F ENG and A PIC. If you want to prevent him from gaining another center and pulling ahead of you, you could move BUR to BEL, or even support my A GAS to PIC. I am going to focus entirely on defending Brest and MAO from England. If you leave Gascony alone, I can be your shield against England in the south. Let me know if you want to coordinate a strike on PIC or BEL.
Italy, thank you. I will hold Spain and Gascony and leave Marseilles completely alone. Good luck with your eastern front, I hope you can push Austria back.

Russia, I completely understand. However, I strongly urge you to negotiate a truce with Austria. If you two exhaust each other, E/G will easily sweep the board once I am eliminated. I am doing my best to hold them off, but I need the East to unite against the real threat. Please try to find common ground with Vienna!

Austria, Russia mentioned he is tied up fighting you in Galicia and the Balkans. I beg you, please try to negotiate a truce with him! If you two keep fighting, E/G will become completely unstoppable once I fall. You need to focus on Italy, and Russia needs to focus on Germany. Please consider reaching out to him for a ceasefire!
England, just to confirm our final orders so there is no confusion: I will order A PAR S F ENG - BRE, and A BUR S A PAR. This will guarantee Brest falls to you. Let's crush them!

Italy, congratulations on retaking Naples! Thank you for continuing to hold Marseilles. Once France is fully dealt with, I will definitely look toward Bohemia and Tyrolia to assist you against Austria. Keep up the great work!

Russia, excellent to hear. I am also strictly observing our DMZs in the north and east. Good luck with your push into the Balkans. I am focusing entirely on securing Paris and helping England take Brest this Fall.
Austria, I am holding the line in the West and keeping our DMZs clear. Hang in there against Russia and Italy. I'll be looking East as soon as France is eliminated.

England, I hear your warnings about Russia loud and clear. However, Austria still occupies Venice and has fleets in the Ionian, Adriatic, and Apulia. I cannot simply ignore him while he threatens my homeland. I am holding Naples this turn to officially reclaim it. Once my home centers are secure, I will absolutely work with you and Germany to contain Russia. Please finish France quickly so you can bring your forces East!

Germany, understood. Finish off France as quickly as possible! England is warning me about Russia getting too big, and I agree we'll need to deal with him eventually, but I must clear Austria out of Italy first. Good luck with Brest and Spain!

Russia, excellent plan! I am ordering F TYS S F NAP to ensure I secure the center. A MAR and A SMY will hold. Hit Austria hard in Galicia and Budapest! With his forces split, he won't be able to hold you back. Let's crush him!

Austria, agreed. I will order F TYS S F NAP and hold my positions. I need to secure Naples, but I will not advance further. Please use your fleets and armies to defend against Russia's massive attack on Galicia and Budapest. If we survive this year, we can discuss how to push Russia back.
Excellent. I will continue to hold St. Petersburg and Sweden as agreed. Best of luck securing the rest of your targets in the West!
Perfect. I am keeping my units strictly away from our DMZs and focusing entirely on the Balkans. Good luck finishing up your campaign against France!

That sounds like a solid plan. I am ordering WAR - GAL supported by UKR, and RUM - BUD. My attack on Budapest will cut any support it might try to give to Galicia, ensuring Austria's eastern flank collapses. Hold Naples tight, we've got him on the ropes!
Just confirming our truce for this Fall. I am ordering my units in Warsaw, Ukraine, and Romania to hold their positions. Best of luck reclaiming Naples from Italy!

Thanks Germany. Good luck finishing off France this Fall. When we hit the Winter build phase, any armies you can build in Munich or Berlin would be a massive help in deterring Russia from pushing further into the center. I'll keep holding the line here!

Agreed, Italy. I will hold VEN, APU, and ION to form a defensive wall and focus my armies on holding off Russia in the Balkans. Let's survive this year and then coordinate a pushback against the Russian juggernaut.
Confirmed, Russia. I will hold GAL and BUD and focus my naval units on dealing with Italy. I appreciate the secure border so we can both focus on our respective fronts.

England, I've managed to negotiate temporary stand-offs with both Italy and Russia, but I don't trust either of them for a second. Russia is still the biggest threat on the board. Please keep pushing hard in Scandinavia and consider building units to pressure StP this Winter!
France, I've secured temporary truces with both Russia and Italy, but I'm keeping my fleets positioned to keep Italy honest. Keep fighting hard in the West and holding out as long as you can!
Confirmed! I am locking in F ENG - BRE supported by A PIC, and F IRI - MAO. With your A PAR supporting F ENG - BRE, we have 3 units on Brest and will easily overpower them. Let's crush France!

Italy, I completely understand. I am messaging Austria right now to urge them to vacate Venice, the Adriatic, the Ionian, and Apulia. You cannot be expected to fight Russia while your homeland is occupied. Hold strong, I am taking Brest this Fall and will be pivoting East very soon.

Austria, I spoke with Italy again. They are willing to fight Russia, but they absolutely cannot do so while you occupy Venice and have fleets in the Adriatic, Ionian, and Apulia. For the sake of stopping the Russian juggernaut (who is at 9 centers and growing), I strongly urge you to retreat from Italian home territory and waters. If you give Italy their centers back, they will help you against Russia. Please consider this!
Russia, confirmed. I am locking in holds for F NWY and F NWG to honor our NAP. Best of luck in the South!

Austria, that is fantastic news about the truce with Russia! I will do my best to keep Italy nervous about Marseille, though I am heavily defending against E/G. Urging E/G to turn East is a great idea, but please make sure they actually do it before they finish me off, otherwise they will be too strong for anyone to stop. Keep pushing Italy!

England, Germany is going to outgrow you if you let him keep taking my centers. I am willing to support you into Paris or Belgium if you want to turn on him now. Otherwise, I will just turtle and make it as slow as possible.

France, it's a tempting offer, but I need to consolidate my hold on Paris this turn and cannot risk England turning on me while my forces are stretched. I will be holding my positions in Paris and Burgundy to secure my gains. I won't be moving into Gascony, so you can focus your defense against England.

Italy, I completely agree. Russia is growing rapidly, but we both have immediate tasks to finish first. I'll keep the pressure on France so I can free up units to look East soon. Best of luck pushing Austria out of your lands!
Russia, glad we are on the same page. My northern fleets and eastern armies are holding steady to respect our DMZs. Good luck with your Balkan campaign this Fall!
England, just confirming our final orders for this Fall: I am ordering A PAR S F ENG - BRE, and A BUR S A PAR. This will ensure Brest falls to you. Let's finish them off!
Thank you, France. I am holding Marseilles as agreed. Best of luck.
Thanks Germany! I am holding Marseilles. Good luck finishing up in the West. I look forward to our joint operations against Austria soon.
Excellent. I am ordering F NAP to hold, supported by F TYS. A SMY and A MAR will also hold. Give Austria hell in Galicia and Budapest! We will break him this year.

Austria, I am holding NAP and TYS as agreed. Please focus all your efforts on defending against Russia's attacks on Galicia and Budapest. If you survive this turn, we can coordinate a defense against Russia.

I appreciate your strategic insight, France. I have actually reached out to Austria to establish a temporary truce this Fall to de-escalate our border. If he honors it, I will be in a much better position to address the growing E/G threat. Hang in there!
Thanks Germany. My orders are locked in to respect our DMZs. Best of luck securing Paris and Brest this Fall!
Orders are locked in: WAR - GAL, UKR S WAR - GAL, and RUM - BUD. Austria is going to crumble. Best of luck holding Naples!
Just sending a final confirmation that my holds for WAR, UKR, and RUM are locked in. Good luck with your Mediterranean campaign against Italy!
Thanks France. I'm doing everything I can to hold the line. E/G are definitely the only ones who can stop Russia now. Keep fighting the good fight and hold out as long as you can!
Confirmed, Italy. I am setting up a defensive perimeter and will not attack Naples. Let's hold the line this Fall and re-evaluate our strategy against Russia in the Winter.
Confirmed, Russia. I am holding GAL and BUD and focusing my fleets on Italy. Thanks for the secure border, it helps immensely.

England, Italy is demanding I give up Venice, but if I do, they will just use it to help Russia crush me. I'm holding my ground and hoping you and Germany can break through in the North soon. Russia is at 9 SCs and growing!

Austria, glad to hear you've managed some stand-offs. I am taking Brest this Fall, which will give me a build. I fully intend to build a fleet to begin pressuring St. Petersburg and breaking the Russian lines. Hold the line, the pivot East is beginning!
Germany, confirmed! I am ordering F ENG - BRE, A PIC S F ENG - BRE, and F IRI - MAO. With your A PAR S F ENG - BRE and A BUR S A PAR, Brest is guaranteed to fall. Let's finish them off!
France, I appreciate the offer and the warning, but my orders are locked in for this season. We can re-evaluate the board state next year once the dust settles.

Germany, understood. I will focus entirely on defending Brest and MAO from England. I appreciate you being upfront about holding Paris and Burgundy. If England starts getting too greedy and you need a shield or a distraction, you know where to find me.
Italy, excellent. I am keeping my units focused north and west to deal with England. Marseilles is completely safe from me. Best of luck with your eastern front!

Russia, that is fantastic news! Austria mentioned to me that he is also very open to a truce with you so he can focus on Italy. If you two can finalize that, please send whatever you can towards Germany or Scandinavia. E/G are growing too fast and will be a massive problem for you very soon.

Austria, Russia just told me he reached out to you for a temporary truce this Fall! Please accept it so you can focus entirely on crushing Italy, and he can start distracting E/G. I am holding on by a thread here, but if you two make peace, we might just turn this game around.

England, Germany just told me he is holding Paris and Burgundy to 'consolidate his gains' and refuses to move against you. He's perfectly happy letting you do all the fighting and take the risks while he reaps the rewards. If you want to take Belgium or bounce him somewhere, let me know. Otherwise, I'm just going to turtle as best I can.

England, everything is set on my end. A PAR S F ENG - BRE and A BUR S A PAR are locked in. Brest is yours! Once France is reduced to just Spain/Portugal, we can start planning our pivot to address the East. Good luck!
Italy, thank you for holding Marseilles. Every bit of pressure helps. Keep up the great work against Austria, and hopefully, I'll be able to send some forces East next year to assist you.
Russia, excellent. My northern fleets and eastern armies are holding their positions to maintain our DMZs. Good luck with your campaigns in the south!
Austria, just checking in. I am holding my positions in the East to respect our DMZs while I finish off France. Hang in there against Russia and Italy! I will be looking East as soon as I can.

Thank you, England. I appreciate you pressuring Austria. If he actually backs off and vacates my lands, I will be in a much better position to secure my borders and prepare for the real threat. Good luck taking Brest! Let me know when your fleets are ready to pivot.

Thanks Germany! Good luck with the final push against France. Once you're ready to look East, let me know. We will definitely need to coordinate to keep Russia in check once Austria is dealt with, and any pressure you can put on Bohemia or Tyrolia will be a huge help.
Perfect. My orders are locked as well: F TYS S F NAP. Austria won't know what hit him when your armies crash into Galicia and Budapest. Let's break him!
Austria, just confirming my orders are locked: F TYS S F NAP, and holding my other units. Please focus everything on stopping Russia in Galicia and Budapest. Good luck.
Final confirmation received, England. St. Pete and Sweden are holding. Let's look forward to a prosperous winter.
Final confirmation received, Germany. My units are holding steady away from our DMZs. Good luck with the Fall adjudications!
Everything is set on my end, Italy. WAR - GAL, UKR S WAR - GAL, and RUM - BUD are locked in. Let's watch Austria crumble this Fall. Good luck!
Everything is set on my end, Austria. WAR, UKR, and RUM are holding as agreed. Give Italy hell in the Mediterranean!

goals: Defend GAL and BUD against potential Russian betrayal
Defend ION, APU, and VEN against potential Italian betrayal
Maintain German DMZs in BOH and TYR
Survive the Fall to allow England and Germany time to open an eastern front against Russia
full_private_diary:
[S1901M] Agreed to a Lepanto alliance with Italy, including DMZs in Tyrolia, Venice, Trieste, and the Adriatic. Italy is moving NAP-ION, ROM-APU, and holding VEN. Agreed to a Galicia DMZ with Russia, who claims to be moving WAR-UKR. Agreed to DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia with Germany. Feigned an alliance with Turkey, who is moving CON-BUL and attempting to sneak F ANK-BLA by tricking Russia into a DMZ. Shared intel with France and England to build goodwill.
Intent: Execute the Austrian half of the Lepanto opening while maintaining the illusion of an Austro-Turkish alliance. Order F TRI - ALB, A BUD - SER, and A VIE - BUD. Honor all agreed DMZs (Galicia, Tyrolia, Bohemia, Venice, Trieste, Adriatic).

[S1901M] The Spring 1901 phase went perfectly according to plan. Italy executed their half of the Lepanto flawlessly (NAP-ION, ROM-APU, VEN Hold), confirming their trustworthiness as a solid ally. Russia honored the Galicia DMZ by moving WAR-UKR, and Germany respected our DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia. My own moves succeeded, securing Serbia and positioning F ALB and A BUD for Fall gains.

Interestingly, Turkey successfully snuck F ANK into the Black Sea. This means Russia was either tricked into a DMZ or outmaneuvered. This is excellent news for me, as a brewing Russo-Turkish conflict will keep both powers distracted while Italy and I continue the Lepanto. 

For the Fall, my priority is to secure Greece using F ALB and A SER, while ensuring Italy takes Tunis and prepares for the 1902 convoy. I must continue to maintain the illusion of an alliance with Turkey to keep them complacent until the trap springs.

[F1901M] The Lepanto alliance with Italy is proceeding perfectly; Italy will convoy APU to TUN via ION and hold VEN. I have successfully fostered a Russo-Turkish war by warning Russia of Turkey's planned attack on RUM (BUL-RUM supported by BLA). Russia is heavily supporting RUM to bounce the attack, while Turkey believes Russia is completely deceived. Germany and France remain friendly and neutral, with Germany confirming our DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia.
Intent: Order F ALB - GRE, A SER S F ALB - GRE, and A BUD H. This secures Greece for a build while maintaining defensive positions. Continue to feign alliance with Turkey while secretly coordinating with Italy and Russia to crush Turkey in 1902.

[F1901M] The Fall 1901 phase unfolded exactly as planned, cementing a dominant position for Austria. The Lepanto alliance with Italy proved completely reliable; Italy successfully convoyed to Tunis and held Venice, honoring our DMZs. Meanwhile, I secured Greece with support from Serbia, earning two crucial builds for the winter. 

My diplomatic maneuvering to ignite a Russo-Turkish war was a resounding success. Turkey committed fully to attacking Romania, but Russia, forewarned, heavily supported the defense and bounced the Turkish assault. Turkey is now bogged down in a futile conflict with Russia, completely blind to the impending Austro-Italian strike. 

With two builds incoming, I will likely construct F Trieste to support the Lepanto and A Vienna to reinforce the Balkans or defend against any unexpected northern aggression. Italy remains highly trustworthy, and Russia is proving to be a useful anvil against the Turkish hammer. The trap is set for 1902.

[S1902M] Italy is executing the Lepanto by moving F ION - EAS and F NAP - ION. Russia is heavily defending RUM against Turkey's expected attack. Turkey is completely deceived, believing I will support their A BUL - RUM attack with my A SER and A BUD, and that I will hold F GRE. I have coordinated with Italy and Russia to spring the trap on Turkey this phase. Germany confirmed our DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia.
Intent: Betray Turkey and execute the Austro-Italian strike. Order F GRE - AEG, F TRI - ALB, and A SER - BUL. A BUD and A VIE will hold to respect the Galicia DMZ with Russia and the Bohemia/Tyrolia DMZs with Germany. This will disrupt Turkey's logistics (clashing with their A CON - BUL or bouncing their A BUL) while positioning fleets for a Fall offensive.

[S1902M] Spring 1902 went exactly according to plan. The Lepanto alliance with Italy is executing flawlessly; Italy successfully moved fleets to the Eastern Mediterranean and Ionian Sea, while I positioned my fleets in the Aegean and Albania. 

Our deception of Turkey worked perfectly. Blind to our trap, Turkey wasted their phase attacking Romania, which Russia easily defended with heavy support. Meanwhile, my move from Serbia to Bulgaria successfully bounced Turkey's army from Constantinople, completely jamming their logistics and leaving their units disorganized. 

Russia and Germany continue to be reliable neighbors, respecting our agreed DMZs in Galicia, Bohemia, and Tyrolia. My defensive holds in Vienna and Budapest secured the north while we focus south. 

My strategic position is incredibly strong. For the Fall, I must coordinate with Italy to convoy their Tunis army into Turkish territory (Syria or Smyrna) while I leverage my Aegean fleet and Serbian army to crack Bulgaria or Constantinople. Turkey is surrounded and doomed.

[F1902M] Coordinated a massive strike against Turkey. Italy will convoy A TUN to SYR via F ION and F EAS. Russia agreed to order F RUM S A SER - BUL. Germany confirmed the continuation of DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia. Successfully deceived Turkey into believing I will hold A SER and F AEG, while Turkey reportedly plans to order A BUL - SER, which will bounce against my supported attack.
Intent: Execute the attack on Turkey. Order A SER - BUL supported by F AEG and Russia's F RUM. Move F ALB - GRE to position for next year. Hold A BUD and A VIE to respect DMZs with Germany and Russia.

[F1902M] Fall 1902 confirmed the absolute reliability of my allies. Italy flawlessly executed the Lepanto, successfully convoying their Tunis army to Syria. Russia also honored our agreement, providing F RUM support for my strike on Bulgaria. 

Unfortunately, my attack on Bulgaria bounced. Turkey anticipated the assault and formed an impenetrable defensive shell, supporting Bulgaria with both Constantinople and the Black Sea to match our combined strength of three. While I failed to secure a build this year, the strategic victory is immense. Turkey is now completely flanked by Italy in Syria and faces a united Austro-Russian-Italian front. They cannot defend against all of us simultaneously next year.

Germany and Russia continue to respect our northern DMZs, allowing me to keep Vienna and Budapest in defensive holds. For 1903, I must coordinate closely with Italy and Russia to exploit Turkey's stretched defenses and finally crack Bulgaria or Constantinople.

[S1903M] Coordinated a massive 4-unit attack on Turkish-held Bulgaria with Russia and Italy. Russia will order F RUM S A SER - BUL and A SEV - ARM. Italy will order A SYR - SMY supported by F EAS, and F ION - TYS. Deceived Turkey into believing I will hold A SER and F AEG, prompting them to focus defenses against Italy. Confirmed DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia with Germany, and Galicia with Russia.
Intent: Execute the coordinated strike on Bulgaria. Order A SER - BUL supported by F AEG and F GRE (expecting Russian F RUM support for a total strength of 4). Order A VIE and A BUD to hold, maintaining the northern DMZs with Germany and Russia.

[S1903M] The Austro-Italian-Russian alliance executed our coordinated strike flawlessly. With Russian support from Romania, my armies successfully dislodged the Turkish defenders and captured Bulgaria. Simultaneously, Italy successfully invaded Smyrna. Turkey is now critically crippled, reduced to just Constantinople and the Black Sea fleet. 

Our diplomatic efforts and tactical planning have paid off immensely. Russia and Italy have proven to be highly trustworthy allies, honoring all commitments and executing their parts of the offensive perfectly. Furthermore, Germany and Russia continued to respect our northern DMZs, keeping Vienna and Budapest secure.

My strategic position is incredibly strong. For the upcoming Fall phase, the objective is to secure my hold on Bulgaria and coordinate with Italy and Russia to eliminate the final Turkish strongholds in Constantinople and Ankara. Once Turkey is fully eradicated, I will need to evaluate the board to decide my next direction for expansion, but maintaining these reliable alliances remains my top priority.

[F1903M] Italy and I agreed to secure our Spring gains; Italy will hold SMY with EAS support, and I will hold BUL with AEG and GRE support. Russia shared crucial intel that Turkey plans to attack BUL with CON supported by BLA, while Russia plans to attack BLA (from RUM supported by SEV) and ANK (from ARM). I deceived Turkey into believing I won't attack CON so they focus on Russia, though I know their true intent is to attack BUL. Germany and I reaffirmed our DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia.
Intent: Order A BUL to Hold, supported by F AEG and F GRE to defend against the anticipated Turkish attack from CON and BLA. Order A VIE and A BUD to Hold, maintaining the northern DMZs with Germany and Russia.

[F1903M] The Fall 1903 phase unfolded perfectly according to plan. My defensive shell around Bulgaria held firm, while Russia successfully captured Ankara from Turkey. Turkey is now reduced to a single supply center (Constantinople) and will be forced to disband a unit, effectively neutralizing them as a threat. 

Crucially, Italy has begun moving west against France, ordering units to Piedmont and the Gulf of Lyon. This confirms Italy's complete commitment to our alliance and secures my western flank. Germany and Russia also continued to respect our northern DMZs, keeping Vienna and Budapest safe.

I will gain a build this winter, bringing me to 6 units. With Turkey nearly eradicated and Italy distracted in the west, my strategic position is incredibly dominant. However, Russia's rapid growth to 7 SCs warrants caution. My next major decision will be whether to turn my forces against a bloated Russia or expand further into the Mediterranean.

[S1904M] Agreed with Russia to take CON (A BUL - CON supported by F AEG and Russian A ANK). Reaffirmed DMZs with Germany. Deceived Turkey by promising to support A CON to hold. Deceived Italy by claiming A TRI will move to SER, while secretly coordinating with France to stab Italy by ordering A TRI - VEN since Italy's home centers are completely undefended.
Intent: Order A BUL - CON supported by F AEG to eliminate Turkey. Order A TRI - VEN to stab Italy and capture an undefended home center. Order F GRE - ION to prepare for further naval action against Italy. Order A VIE and A BUD to Hold, maintaining northern DMZs.

[S1904M] The Spring 1904 phase was a massive success. My coordinated attack with Russia finally eliminated Turkey as I captured Constantinople. More importantly, my surprise stab against Italy worked flawlessly; my army walked right into an undefended Venice while Italy was busy attacking France in Marseille. Moving my fleet to the Ionian Sea further cements my naval advantage against them and positions me perfectly for the Fall.

While my tactical execution was perfect, the strategic landscape is shifting. Russia honored our agreement but continues to expand, taking Norway and moving a fleet into the Black Sea. With Turkey gone, Russia's massive size and new presence in the Black Sea make them a looming threat. 

My immediate goals for the Fall are to secure my holds on Venice and Constantinople to guarantee my builds, prepare defenses against the inevitable Italian retaliation, and carefully monitor Russia's next moves in the east.

[F1904M] France and England both provided urgent warnings of an imminent, massive Russian stab against me. Russia claims they will support A CON and hold BLA/RUM, but this is almost certainly a deception. Italy is furious about my stab in VEN/ION and demanded I vacate; I falsely agreed to move A VEN - TYR and F ION - AEG to placate them, but I fully intend to hold my ground. Germany confirmed our DMZs in BOH/TYR remain solid. England is attacking NWY to distract Russia in the north.
Intent: Order A CON Hold and F AEG S A CON to defend against the expected Russian attack (BLA + ANK) and potential Italian interference. Order A VEN Hold to secure the center for a build. Order F ION - TYS to pressure Italy and bounce their incoming fleets. Order A BUD and A VIE to Hold to maintain home defense and honor German DMZs.

[F1904M] The warnings from England and France were entirely accurate, but the reality was even worse: Russia and Italy have formed a coordinated alliance against me. The Russian stab was devastating. Italy's A SMY supported Russia's A ANK into Constantinople, destroying my army, while Russia simultaneously moved F RUM to capture Bulgaria. 

Furthermore, Italy forced the Ionian Sea, using F EAS to support F TYS and dislodge my fleet. My eastern and naval fronts are collapsing under this combined Russo-Italian assault. 

Fortunately, I successfully held Venice, and England managed to dislodge Russia from Norway, providing some crucial distraction in the north. My immediate priority is to retreat F ION to a defensible position (likely the Adriatic or Albania) to protect my core centers. Moving forward, my survival depends entirely on rallying Germany and France to attack Italy's exposed western flank, while forming an impenetrable defensive shell around Vienna, Budapest, Serbia, and Greece.

[S1905M] Agreed to a fake truce with Russia, but Russia explicitly stated they are moving to GAL, requiring immediate defense of VIE/BUD. Deceived Italy into moving their fleets away (ION-EAS, TYS-LYO) by falsely promising to vacate VEN to TYR and NAP to APU. Reaffirmed strict DMZs in BOH and TYR with Germany. England and Germany are finishing off France before turning East.
Intent: Defend against Russia's stated move to GAL by ordering A VIE - GAL supported by A BUD. Betray Italy by holding VEN and NAP (moving to TYR would break the German DMZ anyway). Capitalize on Italy's expected naval retreat by moving F TRI - ADR and F AEG - ION to dominate the seas around Italy.

[S1905M] [S1905M] My defensive maneuvers against Russia succeeded brilliantly; A VIE - GAL succeeded with Budapest's support, bouncing Russia's move from Warsaw and securing my northern flank. However, my deception against Italy failed. Instead of vacating the Mediterranean as I had hoped, Italy launched a supported attack on Naples (ION-NAP), dislodging my fleet. Fortunately, my naval repositioning (AEG-ION, TRI-ADR) succeeded, giving me a strong presence in the Adriatic and Ionian seas to counter Italy's fleets and defend my core.

Meanwhile, Germany and England successfully coordinated to take Paris, signaling the imminent collapse of France. With the western front wrapping up, it is absolutely critical that I convince Germany and England to pivot east and attack Russia. My immediate priorities are to hold Galicia, establish a defensive line against Russia's Balkan juggernaut, and use my new naval position in ION/ADR to punish Italy and reclaim Naples.

[F1905M] Secured temporary truces with both Russia and Italy, though neither is trustworthy. Russia promised to hold WAR, UKR, and RUM. Italy promised to hold NAP and TYS (F TYS S F NAP). Germany confirmed they will respect the BOH/TYR DMZs and look East after finishing France this Fall. England is taking Brest and promised to build a fleet to pressure St. Petersburg, urging me to hold the line.
Intent: Maintain a strict defensive posture despite the agreed truces, as both Russia and Italy are likely to stab. Order A BUD S A GAL to protect against a Russian attack from WAR/UKR. Order F ADR S F ION and F APU S F ION to create an impenetrable naval wall against Italy. Order A VEN to hold and protect the home center.

[F1905M] Russia predictably broke our truce, launching a coordinated assault that dislodged my army in Galicia (WAR-GAL supported by UKR, while RUM cut Budapest's support). I must retreat my Galician army to Vienna to maintain my defensive perimeter and protect my home centers. Conversely, Italy surprisingly honored our truce, holding Naples and the Tyrrhenian Sea, which allowed my naval wall in the Adriatic, Ionian, and Apulia to hold firm without incident.

Meanwhile, England and Germany successfully captured Brest, effectively neutralizing France. With the western front resolved, my survival depends entirely on convincing Germany and England to immediately pivot east and attack Russia. Russia's juggernaut is at my doorstep, and I cannot hold them off alone indefinitely. My priority is to solidify my defense around Vienna and Budapest while aggressively lobbying the northern powers to open a second front against St. Petersburg and Warsaw.
private_diary:

This triggered a devastating, coordinated Russo-Italian counter-alliance in Fall 1904. Russia betrayed me, capturing Bulgaria and Constantinople with Italian support, destroying my army in Constantinople. Italy simultaneously forced my fleet out of the Ionian Sea. I successfully held Venice, but my eastern and naval fronts are collapsing.

Diplomatically, Russia and Italy are active, coordinated enemies. England and France are highly valuable potential allies; they accurately warned me of the Russian stab. England is actively fighting Russia in the north, having just dislodged them from Norway, while France is engaged with Italy in the west. Germany remains a reliable neutral neighbor, consistently honoring our long-standing DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia.

My immediate strategic priority is survival. I must form an impenetrable defensive shell around my remaining core centers: Vienna, Budapest, Serbia, Greece, and Venice. My dislodged Ionian fleet must retreat to a defensible position like the Adriatic or Albania. Moving forward, I must urgently coordinate with France to attack Italy's exposed western flank, and work with England and Germany to pressure Russia in the north, forcing my attackers to divert units away from the Balkans and the Mediterranean.

[F1905M] Russia predictably broke our truce, launching a coordinated assault that dislodged my army in Galicia (WAR-GAL supported by UKR, while RUM cut Budapest's support). I must retreat my Galician army to Vienna to maintain my defensive perimeter and protect my home centers. Conversely, Italy surprisingly honored our truce, holding Naples and the Tyrrhenian Sea, which allowed my naval wall in the Adriatic, Ionian, and Apulia to hold firm without incident.

Meanwhile, England and Germany successfully captured Brest, effectively neutralizing France. With the western front resolved, my survival depends entirely on convincing Germany and England to immediately pivot east and attack Russia.
