full_private_diary:
[S1901M] Agreed to a Lepanto alliance with Italy, including DMZs in Tyrolia, Venice, Trieste, and the Adriatic. Italy is moving NAP-ION, ROM-APU, and holding VEN. Agreed to a Galicia DMZ with Russia, who claims to be moving WAR-UKR. Agreed to DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia with Germany. Feigned an alliance with Turkey, who is moving CON-BUL and attempting to sneak F ANK-BLA by tricking Russia into a DMZ. Shared intel with France and England to build goodwill.
Intent: Execute the Austrian half of the Lepanto opening while maintaining the illusion of an Austro-Turkish alliance. Order F TRI - ALB, A BUD - SER, and A VIE - BUD. Honor all agreed DMZs (Galicia, Tyrolia, Bohemia, Venice, Trieste, Adriatic).

[S1901M] The Spring 1901 phase went perfectly according to plan. Italy executed their half of the Lepanto flawlessly (NAP-ION, ROM-APU, VEN Hold), confirming their trustworthiness as a solid ally. Russia honored the Galicia DMZ by moving WAR-UKR, and Germany respected our DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia. My own moves succeeded, securing Serbia and positioning F ALB and A BUD for Fall gains.

Interestingly, Turkey successfully snuck F ANK into the Black Sea. This means Russia was either tricked into a DMZ or outmaneuvered. This is excellent news for me, as a brewing Russo-Turkish conflict will keep both powers distracted while Italy and I continue the Lepanto. 

For the Fall, my priority is to secure Greece using F ALB and A SER, while ensuring Italy takes Tunis and prepares for the 1902 convoy. I must continue to maintain the illusion of an alliance with Turkey to keep them complacent until the trap springs.

[F1901M] The Lepanto alliance with Italy is proceeding perfectly; Italy will convoy APU to TUN via ION and hold VEN. I have successfully fostered a Russo-Turkish war by warning Russia of Turkey's planned attack on RUM (BUL-RUM supported by BLA). Russia is heavily supporting RUM to bounce the attack, while Turkey believes Russia is completely deceived. Germany and France remain friendly and neutral, with Germany confirming our DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia.
Intent: Order F ALB - GRE, A SER S F ALB - GRE, and A BUD H. This secures Greece for a build while maintaining defensive positions. Continue to feign alliance with Turkey while secretly coordinating with Italy and Russia to crush Turkey in 1902.

[F1901M] The Fall 1901 phase unfolded exactly as planned, cementing a dominant position for Austria. The Lepanto alliance with Italy proved completely reliable; Italy successfully convoyed to Tunis and held Venice, honoring our DMZs. Meanwhile, I secured Greece with support from Serbia, earning two crucial builds for the winter. 

My diplomatic maneuvering to ignite a Russo-Turkish war was a resounding success. Turkey committed fully to attacking Romania, but Russia, forewarned, heavily supported the defense and bounced the Turkish assault. Turkey is now bogged down in a futile conflict with Russia, completely blind to the impending Austro-Italian strike. 

With two builds incoming, I will likely construct F Trieste to support the Lepanto and A Vienna to reinforce the Balkans or defend against any unexpected northern aggression. Italy remains highly trustworthy, and Russia is proving to be a useful anvil against the Turkish hammer. The trap is set for 1902.

[S1902M] Italy is executing the Lepanto by moving F ION - EAS and F NAP - ION. Russia is heavily defending RUM against Turkey's expected attack. Turkey is completely deceived, believing I will support their A BUL - RUM attack with my A SER and A BUD, and that I will hold F GRE. I have coordinated with Italy and Russia to spring the trap on Turkey this phase. Germany confirmed our DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia.
Intent: Betray Turkey and execute the Austro-Italian strike. Order F GRE - AEG, F TRI - ALB, and A SER - BUL. A BUD and A VIE will hold to respect the Galicia DMZ with Russia and the Bohemia/Tyrolia DMZs with Germany. This will disrupt Turkey's logistics (clashing with their A CON - BUL or bouncing their A BUL) while positioning fleets for a Fall offensive.

[S1902M] Spring 1902 went exactly according to plan. The Lepanto alliance with Italy is executing flawlessly; Italy successfully moved fleets to the Eastern Mediterranean and Ionian Sea, while I positioned my fleets in the Aegean and Albania. 

Our deception of Turkey worked perfectly. Blind to our trap, Turkey wasted their phase attacking Romania, which Russia easily defended with heavy support. Meanwhile, my move from Serbia to Bulgaria successfully bounced Turkey's army from Constantinople, completely jamming their logistics and leaving their units disorganized. 

Russia and Germany continue to be reliable neighbors, respecting our agreed DMZs in Galicia, Bohemia, and Tyrolia. My defensive holds in Vienna and Budapest secured the north while we focus south. 

My strategic position is incredibly strong. For the Fall, I must coordinate with Italy to convoy their Tunis army into Turkish territory (Syria or Smyrna) while I leverage my Aegean fleet and Serbian army to crack Bulgaria or Constantinople. Turkey is surrounded and doomed.

[F1902M] Coordinated a massive strike against Turkey. Italy will convoy A TUN to SYR via F ION and F EAS. Russia agreed to order F RUM S A SER - BUL. Germany confirmed the continuation of DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia. Successfully deceived Turkey into believing I will hold A SER and F AEG, while Turkey reportedly plans to order A BUL - SER, which will bounce against my supported attack.
Intent: Execute the attack on Turkey. Order A SER - BUL supported by F AEG and Russia's F RUM. Move F ALB - GRE to position for next year. Hold A BUD and A VIE to respect DMZs with Germany and Russia.

[F1902M] Fall 1902 confirmed the absolute reliability of my allies. Italy flawlessly executed the Lepanto, successfully convoying their Tunis army to Syria. Russia also honored our agreement, providing F RUM support for my strike on Bulgaria. 

Unfortunately, my attack on Bulgaria bounced. Turkey anticipated the assault and formed an impenetrable defensive shell, supporting Bulgaria with both Constantinople and the Black Sea to match our combined strength of three. While I failed to secure a build this year, the strategic victory is immense. Turkey is now completely flanked by Italy in Syria and faces a united Austro-Russian-Italian front. They cannot defend against all of us simultaneously next year.

Germany and Russia continue to respect our northern DMZs, allowing me to keep Vienna and Budapest in defensive holds. For 1903, I must coordinate closely with Italy and Russia to exploit Turkey's stretched defenses and finally crack Bulgaria or Constantinople.

[S1903M] Coordinated a massive 4-unit attack on Turkish-held Bulgaria with Russia and Italy. Russia will order F RUM S A SER - BUL and A SEV - ARM. Italy will order A SYR - SMY supported by F EAS, and F ION - TYS. Deceived Turkey into believing I will hold A SER and F AEG, prompting them to focus defenses against Italy. Confirmed DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia with Germany, and Galicia with Russia.
Intent: Execute the coordinated strike on Bulgaria. Order A SER - BUL supported by F AEG and F GRE (expecting Russian F RUM support for a total strength of 4). Order A VIE and A BUD to hold, maintaining the northern DMZs with Germany and Russia.

[S1903M] The Austro-Italian-Russian alliance executed our coordinated strike flawlessly. With Russian support from Romania, my armies successfully dislodged the Turkish defenders and captured Bulgaria. Simultaneously, Italy successfully invaded Smyrna. Turkey is now critically crippled, reduced to just Constantinople and the Black Sea fleet. 

Our diplomatic efforts and tactical planning have paid off immensely. Russia and Italy have proven to be highly trustworthy allies, honoring all commitments and executing their parts of the offensive perfectly. Furthermore, Germany and Russia continued to respect our northern DMZs, keeping Vienna and Budapest secure.

My strategic position is incredibly strong. For the upcoming Fall phase, the objective is to secure my hold on Bulgaria and coordinate with Italy and Russia to eliminate the final Turkish strongholds in Constantinople and Ankara. Once Turkey is fully eradicated, I will need to evaluate the board to decide my next direction for expansion, but maintaining these reliable alliances remains my top priority.

[F1903M] Italy and I agreed to secure our Spring gains; Italy will hold SMY with EAS support, and I will hold BUL with AEG and GRE support. Russia shared crucial intel that Turkey plans to attack BUL with CON supported by BLA, while Russia plans to attack BLA (from RUM supported by SEV) and ANK (from ARM). I deceived Turkey into believing I won't attack CON so they focus on Russia, though I know their true intent is to attack BUL. Germany and I reaffirmed our DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia.
Intent: Order A BUL to Hold, supported by F AEG and F GRE to defend against the anticipated Turkish attack from CON and BLA. Order A VIE and A BUD to Hold, maintaining the northern DMZs with Germany and Russia.

[F1903M] The Fall 1903 phase unfolded perfectly according to plan. My defensive shell around Bulgaria held firm, while Russia successfully captured Ankara from Turkey. Turkey is now reduced to a single supply center (Constantinople) and will be forced to disband a unit, effectively neutralizing them as a threat. 

Crucially, Italy has begun moving west against France, ordering units to Piedmont and the Gulf of Lyon. This confirms Italy's complete commitment to our alliance and secures my western flank. Germany and Russia also continued to respect our northern DMZs, keeping Vienna and Budapest safe.

I will gain a build this winter, bringing me to 6 units. With Turkey nearly eradicated and Italy distracted in the west, my strategic position is incredibly dominant. However, Russia's rapid growth to 7 SCs warrants caution. My next major decision will be whether to turn my forces against a bloated Russia or expand further into the Mediterranean.

[S1904M] Agreed with Russia to take CON (A BUL - CON supported by F AEG and Russian A ANK). Reaffirmed DMZs with Germany. Deceived Turkey by promising to support A CON to hold. Deceived Italy by claiming A TRI will move to SER, while secretly coordinating with France to stab Italy by ordering A TRI - VEN since Italy's home centers are completely undefended.
Intent: Order A BUL - CON supported by F AEG to eliminate Turkey. Order A TRI - VEN to stab Italy and capture an undefended home center. Order F GRE - ION to prepare for further naval action against Italy. Order A VIE and A BUD to Hold, maintaining northern DMZs.

[S1904M] The Spring 1904 phase was a massive success. My coordinated attack with Russia finally eliminated Turkey as I captured Constantinople. More importantly, my surprise stab against Italy worked flawlessly; my army walked right into an undefended Venice while Italy was busy attacking France in Marseille. Moving my fleet to the Ionian Sea further cements my naval advantage against them and positions me perfectly for the Fall.

While my tactical execution was perfect, the strategic landscape is shifting. Russia honored our agreement but continues to expand, taking Norway and moving a fleet into the Black Sea. With Turkey gone, Russia's massive size and new presence in the Black Sea make them a looming threat. 

My immediate goals for the Fall are to secure my holds on Venice and Constantinople to guarantee my builds, prepare defenses against the inevitable Italian retaliation, and carefully monitor Russia's next moves in the east.

[F1904M] France and England both provided urgent warnings of an imminent, massive Russian stab against me. Russia claims they will support A CON and hold BLA/RUM, but this is almost certainly a deception. Italy is furious about my stab in VEN/ION and demanded I vacate; I falsely agreed to move A VEN - TYR and F ION - AEG to placate them, but I fully intend to hold my ground. Germany confirmed our DMZs in BOH/TYR remain solid. England is attacking NWY to distract Russia in the north.
Intent: Order A CON Hold and F AEG S A CON to defend against the expected Russian attack (BLA + ANK) and potential Italian interference. Order A VEN Hold to secure the center for a build. Order F ION - TYS to pressure Italy and bounce their incoming fleets. Order A BUD and A VIE to Hold to maintain home defense and honor German DMZs.

[F1904M] The warnings from England and France were entirely accurate, but the reality was even worse: Russia and Italy have formed a coordinated alliance against me. The Russian stab was devastating. Italy's A SMY supported Russia's A ANK into Constantinople, destroying my army, while Russia simultaneously moved F RUM to capture Bulgaria. 

Furthermore, Italy forced the Ionian Sea, using F EAS to support F TYS and dislodge my fleet. My eastern and naval fronts are collapsing under this combined Russo-Italian assault. 

Fortunately, I successfully held Venice, and England managed to dislodge Russia from Norway, providing some crucial distraction in the north. My immediate priority is to retreat F ION to a defensible position (likely the Adriatic or Albania) to protect my core centers. Moving forward, my survival depends entirely on rallying Germany and France to attack Italy's exposed western flank, while forming an impenetrable defensive shell around Vienna, Budapest, Serbia, and Greece.

[S1905M] Agreed to a fake truce with Russia, but Russia explicitly stated they are moving to GAL, requiring immediate defense of VIE/BUD. Deceived Italy into moving their fleets away (ION-EAS, TYS-LYO) by falsely promising to vacate VEN to TYR and NAP to APU. Reaffirmed strict DMZs in BOH and TYR with Germany. England and Germany are finishing off France before turning East.
Intent: Defend against Russia's stated move to GAL by ordering A VIE - GAL supported by A BUD. Betray Italy by holding VEN and NAP (moving to TYR would break the German DMZ anyway). Capitalize on Italy's expected naval retreat by moving F TRI - ADR and F AEG - ION to dominate the seas around Italy.

[S1905M] [S1905M] My defensive maneuvers against Russia succeeded brilliantly; A VIE - GAL succeeded with Budapest's support, bouncing Russia's move from Warsaw and securing my northern flank. However, my deception against Italy failed. Instead of vacating the Mediterranean as I had hoped, Italy launched a supported attack on Naples (ION-NAP), dislodging my fleet. Fortunately, my naval repositioning (AEG-ION, TRI-ADR) succeeded, giving me a strong presence in the Adriatic and Ionian seas to counter Italy's fleets and defend my core.

Meanwhile, Germany and England successfully coordinated to take Paris, signaling the imminent collapse of France. With the western front wrapping up, it is absolutely critical that I convince Germany and England to pivot east and attack Russia. My immediate priorities are to hold Galicia, establish a defensive line against Russia's Balkan juggernaut, and use my new naval position in ION/ADR to punish Italy and reclaim Naples.

[F1905M] Secured temporary truces with both Russia and Italy, though neither is trustworthy. Russia promised to hold WAR, UKR, and RUM. Italy promised to hold NAP and TYS (F TYS S F NAP). Germany confirmed they will respect the BOH/TYR DMZs and look East after finishing France this Fall. England is taking Brest and promised to build a fleet to pressure St. Petersburg, urging me to hold the line.
Intent: Maintain a strict defensive posture despite the agreed truces, as both Russia and Italy are likely to stab. Order A BUD S A GAL to protect against a Russian attack from WAR/UKR. Order F ADR S F ION and F APU S F ION to create an impenetrable naval wall against Italy. Order A VEN to hold and protect the home center.

[F1905M] Russia predictably broke our truce, launching a coordinated assault that dislodged my army in Galicia (WAR-GAL supported by UKR, while RUM cut Budapest's support). I must retreat my Galician army to Vienna to maintain my defensive perimeter and protect my home centers. Conversely, Italy surprisingly honored our truce, holding Naples and the Tyrrhenian Sea, which allowed my naval wall in the Adriatic, Ionian, and Apulia to hold firm without incident.

Meanwhile, England and Germany successfully captured Brest, effectively neutralizing France. With the western front resolved, my survival depends entirely on convincing Germany and England to immediately pivot east and attack Russia. Russia's juggernaut is at my doorstep, and I cannot hold them off alone indefinitely. My priority is to solidify my defense around Vienna and Budapest while aggressively lobbying the northern powers to open a second front against St. Petersburg and Warsaw.

goals: Eliminate France completely in coordination with Germany.
Maintain the Scandinavian NAP with Russia until France is defeated.
Maintain the strong offensive alliance with Germany.
Prepare to pivot east to confront the Russian juggernaut once the West is secure.
full_private_diary:
[S1901M] France: Agreed to DMZ English Channel; France is moving F BRE to MAO. Germany: Agreed to split Low Countries (England gets Belgium, Germany gets Holland) and respect claims to Norway/Denmark; Germany shared opening moves (F KIE-DEN, A BER-KIE, A MUN-RUH). Russia: Agreed to a northern non-aggression pact (England takes Norway, Russia takes Sweden); Russia moving F STP/SC to BOT. Italy, Austria, Turkey: Established friendly communications, with Turkey and Austria agreeing to keep Russia busy in the south.
Intent: Execute the agreed-upon northern opening: F EDI - NWG, F LON - NTH, A LVP - YOR. This honors the ENG DMZ with France, sets up for Norway and Belgium as discussed with Germany, and respects the Scandinavian split with Russia.

[S1901M] Spring 1901 went perfectly according to plan, with all neighbors honoring our agreements. The English Channel remains a DMZ, as France moved to MAO and PIC. Germany executed their exact shared moves (DEN, KIE, RUH), setting up our agreed split of the Low Countries where I will take Belgium and they take Holland. Russia moved to the Gulf of Bothnia, respecting our Scandinavian arrangement and leaving Norway uncontested for my fleet in the Norwegian Sea.

My strategic position is incredibly strong. I am perfectly positioned to secure both Norway (via F NWG) and Belgium (convoying A YOR via F NTH) this Fall. Trust with France, Germany, and Russia is currently high. My immediate goal is to secure these two builds and observe the Fall moves to decide whether to ally with Germany against France, France against Germany, or push against Russia in Scandinavia.

[F1901M] France agreed to support my convoy to Belgium (A PIC S A YOR - BEL) and confirmed their orders. Germany confirmed they will take Holland (A KIE - HOL, A RUH S A KIE - HOL) and leave Belgium to me. Russia confirmed they will take Sweden and leave Norway to me. Turkey is eager to coordinate a crossfire on Russia in 1902, which I agreed to consider. Italy was a friendly check-in.
Intent: Execute the agreed-upon moves to secure two builds: F NWG - NWY, F NTH C A YOR - BEL, and A YOR - BEL. Rely on French support (A PIC S A YOR - BEL) to guarantee Belgium.

[F1901M] Fall 1901 went flawlessly. France, Germany, and Russia all honored our agreements to the letter. France provided the promised support for my convoy into Belgium, Germany took Holland while respecting my claim to Belgium, and Russia took Sweden while leaving Norway to me. I successfully secured both target supply centers and will have two builds this winter.

My strategic position is exceptional, and trust with my immediate neighbors is currently very high. The English Channel remains clear. In the east, Turkey and Russia are already clashing over Romania, which keeps Russia distracted and fulfills Turkey's promise to apply pressure.

With two builds incoming, I must now decide my mid-term direction. I can ally with Germany against France, ally with France against Germany, or launch a northern campaign against Russia while they are occupied in the south. I will use the Winter build phase to position my new units and solidify my next alliance.

[S1902M] Successfully orchestrated a clash between France and Germany over Burgundy (France ordered A PAR - BUR; Germany ordered A MUN - BUR supported by A RUH). Reaffirmed the English Channel DMZ with France (F BRE moving to MAO). Convinced Russia of peaceful intentions in Scandinavia while secretly coordinating with Turkey to launch a massive northern offensive against St. Petersburg and Sweden, capitalizing on Russia's southern distraction.
Intent: Execute the northern fleet maneuver to surround Russia: F NWY - BAR, F EDI - NWG, F NTH - SKA, and F LON - NTH. Hold A BEL to maintain a secure border and anchor the line while France and Germany clash in Burgundy.

[S1902M] France has completely betrayed our trust, breaking the English Channel DMZ with F BRE - ENG and launching an unprovoked attack on Belgium (A PIC - BEL). Fortunately, my hold in Belgium bounced their attack, but the western front is now highly volatile and my home centers are threatened. 

In the north, my fleet maneuvers executed flawlessly, positioning me in BAR, NWG, SKA, and NTH. However, Russia anticipated the aggression, reinforcing St. Petersburg (A MOS - STP) and Livonia. 

With France turning hostile, my strategic priorities must shift immediately. I must ally closely with Germany, who successfully forced Burgundy and is now in a prime position to pressure France from the east. I need to secure my home centers against the French fleet in the Channel while deciding whether to press the attack on Russia's St. Petersburg/Sweden or redirect northern fleets to crush France. Trust in France is permanently shattered.

[F1902M] Germany is fully committed to an alliance against France; they agreed to support A BEL to hold with A HOL, attack PAR with A BUR (supported by RUH), and hold F HEL and F DEN to keep NTH clear for me. France apologized for moving to ENG, blaming false intel, and promised to move F ENG to MAO to defend against Germany. I agreed to a fake truce with Russia in Scandinavia to lower their guard, while secretly confirming with Turkey that I will attack St. Petersburg this phase.
Intent: Order F NWG - STP supported by F BAR to capitalize on the northern position and capture St. Petersburg. Order F NTH - ENG to either kick France out or take the Channel if they actually retreat to MAO as promised. Order F SKA - NTH to backfill and secure the North Sea. Order A BEL to hold, relying on Germany's promised support from HOL.

[F1902M] France's deception was absolute. Instead of retreating from the Channel as promised, they slipped F ENG into London and moved F MAO to the Irish Sea. Losing my capital is a devastating blow, leaving my remaining home centers critically vulnerable. I should have covered London directly instead of gambling on their retreat. 

On the continent, Germany proved their loyalty by supporting Belgium against another French attack, cementing our alliance. In the north, my assault on St. Petersburg failed as Russia heavily reinforced it with Livonia. 

With the loss of London, I am forced into a deficit and must disband a unit. My entire strategic focus must now shift to survival. I must abandon the Russian campaign, pull my northern fleets back to defend Edinburgh and Liverpool, and work closely with Germany to pressure France and reclaim my homeland. France is now an existential threat that must be eliminated.

[S1903M] Solidified a strong offensive alliance with Germany against France. Germany agreed to support A BEL to hold from HOL, and attack PAR with BUR (supported by RUH). Faked a truce with France, promising to attack Germany (A BEL-HOL, F NTH-HEL, F ENG-NTH) in exchange for France moving F LON-WAL and F IRI-MAO; this is a deception to trick France into vacating London. Agreed to a strict non-aggression pact with Russia in Scandinavia (holding NWY). Encouraged Italy (via Turkey and direct messages) to attack France's exposed southern flank.
Intent: Execute the coordinated attack on France with Germany while ignoring the fake truce with France. Order F ENG - LON supported by F NTH to retake the capital. Order A BEL to hold (relying on German support from HOL). Order F NWY to hold to honor the NAP with Russia.

[S1903M] [S1903M] A crucial victory! I successfully retook London by dislodging the French fleet with F ENG - LON, supported by NTH. The fake truce with France worked well enough to prevent them from heavily defending my capital. Germany proved their steadfast loyalty once again by supporting my army in Belgium to hold, completely ignoring France's attempt to support a German backstab (PIC S HOL-BEL). 

However, the French threat remains severe. As I vacated the English Channel to take London, France immediately moved F BRE - ENG, keeping my home centers under direct threat. Furthermore, France successfully pushed Germany out of Burgundy, complicating our western offensive. 

Moving forward, my primary objective is to clear the English Channel and secure my homeland. I must continue coordinating closely with Germany to counter France's momentum in Burgundy and protect Belgium. The non-aggression pact with Russia in Scandinavia is holding, allowing me to focus entirely on the French menace.

[F1903M] Solidified defensive plans with Germany: Germany will order A HOL S A BEL, while attacking BUR with MUN and RUH. Confirmed with Italy that they are moving F TYS - LYO and A VEN - PIE to attack France's southern flank. Maintained the NAP with Russia in Scandinavia (F NWY will hold). Negotiated a fake truce with France where they promised to move F WAL - IRI and F ENG - MAO in exchange for me holding LON, NTH, and BEL. I will honor the holds to secure my centers, but I do not trust France.
Intent: Order F LON to hold, supported by F NTH to ensure I keep my capital and secure a build. Order A BEL to hold, relying on Germany's promised support from HOL. Order F NWY to hold to maintain the NAP with Russia. Ignore Turkey's pleas to attack St. Petersburg.

[F1903M] France's treachery continues, as they completely ignored our fake truce and attacked London with Wales and the English Channel. Fortunately, my supported hold with the North Sea successfully defended the capital. Germany remains my most steadfast ally, honoring their promise to support Belgium while continuing their assault on Burgundy. 

Crucially, Italy followed through on their commitment to attack France's southern flank, successfully moving into Piedmont and the Gulf of Lyon. This multi-front pressure is breaking France. I now hold 5 centers with only 4 units, securing a vital build, while France is overextended with 6 units and only 5 centers, forcing them to disband. 

My strategy is working. I will build a new fleet in Edinburgh or Liverpool to help eradicate the French infestation (Wales, English Channel, Irish Sea) from my home waters. I must maintain the Scandinavian NAP with Russia and continue coordinating the squeeze on France with Germany and Italy.

[S1904M] Germany and I agreed to a coordinated attack on France: Germany will order MUN-BUR supported by RUH, while I order A BEL-PIC to cut support. Italy is attacking MAR with PIE supported by LYO. I agreed with Italy and Germany to attack ENG and IRI to clear my home waters. I faked a truce with France, promising to hold my fleets and leave Picardy/Brest alone in exchange for them moving F ENG-MAO and F IRI-NAO. I reaffirmed the Scandinavian NAP with Russia (F NWY holds). Turkey warned about Russia's growth, but I deferred action until France is defeated.
Intent: Execute the coordinated attack on France while ignoring the fake truce. Order F LON - ENG supported by F NTH, and F LVP - IRI to clear home waters. Order A BEL - PIC to cut French support and assist Germany's attack on Burgundy. Order F NWY to hold, honoring the NAP with Russia.

[S1904M] The western alliance triumphed this season, but at a terrible cost in the north. Germany successfully took Burgundy and Italy captured Marseilles, effectively crippling France's defensive lines. Surprisingly, France honored our fake truce by moving their fleets to MAO and NAO, allowing me to easily secure the English Channel and Irish Sea. My home waters are finally clear of the French infestation.

However, Russia completely betrayed our Non-Aggression Pact, launching a coordinated attack with Sweden and St. Petersburg to dislodge my fleet in Norway. This is a massive betrayal and shifts the strategic landscape entirely. Russia is no longer neutral; they are an active, dangerous enemy. 

With France collapsing, I must rapidly finish them off while pivoting my northern forces to counter Russian aggression. I will need to lean heavily on Germany to help contain Russia while I attempt to retake Scandinavia. The Russian threat can no longer be ignored.

[F1904M] Germany and I have a locked-in coordinated strike against France: Germany will order A BUR - PAR supported by A RUH, while I order A BEL - PIC supported by F ENG. Germany reports France is fooled and ordering A PIC S A BUR - BEL, leaving Paris and Picardy vulnerable. I have faked truces with both France (claiming I will retreat fleets to LON/LVP) and Russia (claiming I accept their control of Norway). In reality, I will attack Norway while finishing off France. Austria and Italy are distracted by their own war, but Austria is preparing to fight Russia in the south.
Intent: Execute the coordinated attack on France: A BEL - PIC supported by F ENG. Ignore the fake truces with France and Russia. Attempt to retake Norway by ordering F NTH - NWY supported by F NWG. F IRI will hold or move to MAO to maintain pressure.

[F1904M] [F1904M] A phenomenally successful season! My coordinated strikes landed perfectly, allowing me to capture Picardy from France and retake Norway from Russia. The dual-front offensive is working exactly as planned. 

However, Germany made a frustrating tactical error. Instead of supporting their attack on Paris as agreed, they attempted to backfill Burgundy (A RUH-BUR), causing their assault on Paris to bounce. While annoying, France is still crumbling under our combined weight, and my capture of Picardy puts immense pressure on Brest and Paris.

Russia's fleet in Norway was successfully dislodged, punishing their earlier betrayal. Unfortunately, Russia continues to grow in the south, capturing Constantinople from Austria. I must capitalize on my upcoming builds to solidify my hold on Scandinavia and finish off the remnants of the French navy in the Atlantic. The alliance with Germany remains strong, but I must ensure our tactical coordination is tighter moving forward.

[S1905M] Germany and I have finalized a coordinated strike to take Paris: Germany will order A BUR - PAR supported by A RUH, while I order A PIC S A BUR - PAR, F ENG - BRE, and F IRI - MAO. To ensure my support isn't cut, I faked a truce with France, convincing them to purely defend Paris and Brest rather than attacking Picardy. I also reinstated a strict Non-Aggression Pact with Russia in Scandinavia (I hold NWY/NWG, they hold SWE/STP) to buy time to finish France. Austria and Italy are fighting each other, but Austria is aware of the massive Russian threat.
Intent: Execute the coordinated attack on France: order A PIC S German A BUR - PAR, F ENG - BRE, and F IRI - MAO. Ignore the fake truce with France. Honor the NAP with Russia by ordering F NWY and F NWG to hold, securing Scandinavia defensively while the western front is resolved.

[S1905M] The coordinated strike with Germany was a resounding success! My army in Picardy successfully supported the German army in Burgundy into Paris, dislodging the French. Although my fleet attacks on Brest and the Mid-Atlantic Ocean bounced, they perfectly cut French support, ensuring Paris fell. France is now on the brink of collapse. 

In the north, Russia honored our Non-Aggression Pact, holding in St. Petersburg and Sweden. This buys me crucial time to finish off the western front. However, Russia continues to grow in the east, now holding 9 centers. Alarmingly, Austria and Italy are still fighting each other—Italy just took Naples from Austria—ignoring the massive Russian juggernaut. 

My immediate priority is to capture Brest and clear the Mid-Atlantic Ocean to finally eliminate France. I must maintain my strong alliance with Germany while urgently pushing Italy and Austria to unite against Russia before it becomes unstoppable.

[F1905M] Germany and I have finalized our coordinated attack to capture Brest: Germany will order A PAR S F ENG - BRE and A BUR S A PAR, while I order F ENG - BRE, A PIC S F ENG - BRE, and F IRI - MAO. Russia and I have mutually confirmed we will continue to honor our Non-Aggression Pact in Scandinavia (holding NWY, NWG, STP, SWE). I have been mediating between Austria and Italy, urging Austria to vacate Italian home centers so Italy can join the fight against the massive Russian juggernaut, though both remain deeply suspicious of each other. France attempted to sow discord between Germany and me, which I rejected.
Intent: Execute the coordinated attack on Brest: order F ENG - BRE, A PIC S F ENG - BRE, and F IRI - MAO. Honor the NAP with Russia by ordering F NWY and F NWG to hold. Continue to prepare for a pivot East once France is eliminated.

[F1905M] The coordinated strike with Germany was executed flawlessly! With German support from Paris, my fleet successfully captured Brest, while my fleet in the Irish Sea cut French support from the Mid-Atlantic Ocean. France is now effectively neutralized, reduced to a mere remnant in Iberia. 

In the north, Russia honored our Non-Aggression Pact, holding in Sweden and St. Petersburg. This vital truce allowed me to focus entirely on dismantling France. However, Russia's relentless expansion in the east continues; they successfully dislodged Austria from Galicia this phase. The Russian juggernaut is becoming an existential threat to the entire board, especially while Austria and Italy remain deadlocked in the Mediterranean.

My strategic position is vastly improved with the acquisition of Brest. My immediate priorities are to clear the Mid-Atlantic Ocean, coordinate builds with Germany, and urgently pivot our combined forces eastward to halt Russia before they achieve unstoppable momentum.

goals: Survive the coordinated Anglo-German assaults and defend remaining centers (Brest, Spain, Portugal)
Defend Brest and MAO against English attacks by using mutually supporting hold orders from Gascony and Spain
Maintain the tactical truce with Italy to keep Iberia secure from the east
Encourage Austria and Russia to finalize their truce and redirect their forces against E/G and Italy
full_private_diary:
[S1901M] Successfully negotiated DMZs on all key borders: English Channel with England, Burgundy with Germany, and Piedmont/Gulf of Lyon/Tyrrhenian Sea with Italy. England confirmed F LON to NTH and F EDI to NWG. Austria confirmed Italy is focusing East. Russia expressed interest in an alliance against England/Germany. Turkey warned about Italy, but Austria's intel contradicts this.
Intent: Execute a standard peaceful opening to secure Iberia while respecting all agreed DMZs. F BRE to MAO, A MAR to SPA, and A PAR to PIC or GAS.

[S1901M] Spring 1901 went perfectly according to plan. All negotiated DMZs were strictly respected: England stayed out of the English Channel, Germany avoided Burgundy, and Italy kept clear of Piedmont, the Gulf of Lyon, and the Tyrrhenian Sea. Italy's moves (F NAP-ION, A ROM-APU, A VEN Hold) confirm their eastern focus, validating Austria's earlier intel and completely securing my southern flank. 

My opening (F MAO, A SPA, A PIC) positions me ideally for the Fall. I am guaranteed to secure both Spain and Portugal for two builds. Meanwhile, A PIC gives me a strong voice in the fate of Belgium. Germany's move to Ruhr and England's fleet in the North Sea mean Belgium will be heavily contested. My next step is to negotiate with England and Germany to either secure Belgium for myself or use my influence to cement a strong western alliance. Trust with my neighbors is currently high.

[F1901M] Successfully negotiated a cooperative Fall phase. Agreed to support England's convoy into Belgium (A PIC S A YOR - BEL) to cement a long-term alliance. Germany is taking Holland and respects the Belgium arrangement. Italy confirmed they are taking Tunis and holding Venice, maintaining our DMZs in PIE, GOL, and TYS. Austria and Russia confirmed Turkey stabbed Russia in the Black Sea; Austria is focusing on the Balkans.
Intent: Execute agreed-upon moves: F MAO - POR and A SPA Hold to secure two builds from Iberia. Order A PIC S A YOR - BEL to fulfill my promise to England and solidify our alliance.

[F1901M] [F1901M] The Fall phase unfolded exactly as planned, marking a resounding success for French diplomacy. I secured both Portugal and Spain, guaranteeing two builds. Crucially, my support for England's convoy into Belgium succeeded, cementing our alliance and building immense trust. Germany respected this arrangement by taking Holland, and Italy kept their word by taking Tunis while holding Venice, leaving our DMZs in Piedmont, the Gulf of Lyon, and the Tyrrhenian Sea completely intact. 

With the West entirely peaceful and my borders secure, my strategic position is incredibly strong. The successful collaboration with England opens the door for a joint campaign, potentially against Germany or Italy, depending on the upcoming builds. My immediate focus is to build a fleet in Brest and an army in Paris or Marseilles to capitalize on this momentum while maintaining the trust of my neighbors. The East remains embroiled in conflict, giving the Western powers a distinct advantage.

[S1902M] England believes we are allied and coordinating against Germany; they plan to move their fleets North (EDI-NWG, LON-NTH, NTH-SKA) and hold A BEL, expecting me to move A PAR-BUR and F BRE-MAO. However, I have agreed with Germany to keep Burgundy empty and move F BRE-ENG to counter England's 4 fleets. I also informed Russia of England's exact northern fleet movements and my intent to move to the Channel to relieve pressure on them. Italy and I reaffirmed our DMZs in PIE, GOL, and TYS.
Intent: Stab England. Order F BRE - ENG to take control of the Channel while England moves North. Keep Burgundy empty to maintain the alliance with Germany (order A PAR - PIC or GAS). Order A PIC - BEL to attempt to dislodge England's army, or hold to support a future attack. Move F POR - MAO and A SPA - GAS to bring Iberian forces north for the campaign against England.

[S1902M] The Spring 1902 phase brought both triumph and disaster. My stab against England was perfectly executed: they moved their fleets north as promised, allowing me to slip into the English Channel unopposed. However, this naval victory was immediately overshadowed by a blatant German betrayal. Despite our explicit agreement to keep Burgundy demilitarized, Germany forced their way into BUR with support from Ruhr. 

My strategic position is now highly precarious. By stabbing England and being stabbed by Germany simultaneously, I face a dangerous two-front war in the West. My attack on Belgium bounced, and my armies are now scrambling to adjust. 

Moving forward, I must prioritize defending Paris and Marseilles from the German army in Burgundy. I need to urgently open diplomatic channels to see if I can salvage a truce with either England or Germany, as fighting both will be disastrous. Fortunately, my Iberian forces (now in MAO and GAS) have successfully moved north and are well-positioned to assist in the defense.

[F1902M] Successfully deceived England into believing a truce is in place, promising to retreat F ENG to MAO and leave BEL alone. Meanwhile, negotiated a truce and alliance with Germany against England; Germany promised to order A BUR S A PIC - BEL and A RUH - MUN. Informed Russia of the impending attack on London to coordinate pressure on England. Italy reaffirmed southern DMZs but cannot assist against Germany.
Intent: Stab England by ordering F ENG - LON and A PIC - BEL, capitalizing on England's false sense of security and Germany's promised support. Defend home centers against a potential German double-cross by keeping A PAR holding and moving A GAS to MAR or holding. F MAO will move to IRI or hold to maintain naval presence.

[F1902M] The Fall 1902 phase brought a major victory but confirmed my worst fears about Germany. My stab against England succeeded brilliantly, with my fleet capturing London! However, Germany blatantly lied once again. Instead of supporting my attack on Belgium as promised, they used Holland to support the English army in BEL and launched another unprovoked attack on Paris from Burgundy. Germany is entirely untrustworthy and is clearly coordinating with England against me. 

While taking London secures a crucial build and cripples England's home centers, England managed to slip into the English Channel behind me. I now face a solidified Anglo-German alliance. My immediate priority is to leverage my incoming build to defend Brest and Picardy from the Channel and Burgundy, while using F LON and F IRI to continue dismantling England. I must urgently reach out to Russia to increase pressure on both England and Germany from the East.

[S1903M] England agreed to a truce, promising to order F ENG-NTH, A BEL-HOL, and F NTH-HEL if I move F LON-WAL and F IRI-MAO. Germany proposed an alliance against England, promising to order A HOL-BEL, A RUH S A HOL-BEL, and A BUR-MUN if I order A PIC S A HOL-BEL and attack the Channel. Russia and Austria are focused on Turkey. Italy reaffirmed our southern DMZs.
Intent: Side with Germany to eliminate England. Order A PIC S A HOL - BEL. Order F BRE - ENG to seize the Channel (capitalizing on England's promised move to NTH). Order F LON to hold to maintain control of the center. Order F IRI to hold or move to MAO. Order A PAR and A MAR to hold or defend against BUR in case Germany lies again about vacating it.

[S1903M] Spring 1903 confirmed my worst fears: the Anglo-German alliance is absolute, and neither power can be trusted. Both blatantly lied during negotiations. England broke our truce to retake London with North Sea support, while Germany broke their promise to attack Belgium, instead supporting the English army there and attempting to march on Paris again. 

Fortunately, I anticipated Germany's treachery. By ordering A PAR to Burgundy with support from Marseilles, I successfully dislodged the German army, securing my eastern flank. Furthermore, my fleet in Brest successfully seized the English Channel. 

While losing London is a setback, gaining Burgundy and the Channel provides me with immense tactical leverage. I must now retreat my dislodged London fleet carefully. Moving forward, I will not entertain any further E/G deception. I must rely on my superior positioning to crack their lines while urgently pressing Russia to open a second front against Germany.

[F1903M] England proposed a mutual de-escalation where I vacate WAL and ENG (moving to IRI and MAO) while they hold LON, NTH, and BEL. I agreed to this in messages to lull them into a false sense of security. Meanwhile, I agreed to a tactical alliance with Germany: I will order A PIC S A HOL - BEL, while Germany orders A HOL - BEL, A RUH - KIE, and A MUN H. Italy reaffirmed our southern DMZs, confirming F TYS - TUN and A VEN Hold. Russia is friendly but focused on finishing Turkey before turning north.
Intent: Betray the truce with England by maintaining my fleets in WAL and ENG (likely attacking LON or holding to keep pressure). Fulfill the agreement with Germany by ordering A PIC S A HOL - BEL to strip Belgium from England. Hold A BUR to protect my eastern flank against potential German treachery, and hold A MAR to maintain the southern defense.

[F1903M] Fall 1903 was an absolute disaster. The Anglo-German alliance remains unbreakable; Germany lied once again, supporting the English army in Belgium instead of attacking it, while simultaneously assaulting Burgundy. My attack on London bounced against English North Sea support. 

Worse still, Italy has completely betrayed our long-standing southern DMZ, moving into both Piedmont and the Gulf of Lyon. I am now facing a coordinated three-front war against England, Germany, and Italy. 

Because I failed to secure a center, I must disband a unit. My strategic position is dire. I must transition to a pure turtle defense, protecting my home centers and Iberia at all costs. My only hope for survival is to urgently plead with Russia and Austria to attack Germany and Italy from the east to relieve this immense pressure. I can trust no one on my borders; survival is now my sole objective.

[S1904M] Austria agreed to attack Italy's exposed home centers (A TRI - VEN) to relieve pressure on my southern flank. Russia promised to shift northern forces to pressure England and Germany. England agreed to a truce, promising to leave Brest and Picardy alone if I move F ENG to MAO and F IRI to NAO. Germany offered to support A PIC - BEL with A HOL, promising to hold MUN and RUH. Italy refused to retreat from PIE/LYO and demanded Marseilles.
Intent: Shift fleets south to defend against Italy and comply with England's truce (F ENG - MAO, F IRI - NAO/MAO), hoping England honors the DMZ. Attempt to take Belgium with A PIC (supported by A BUR or relying on Germany's promised A HOL S A PIC - BEL), but remain highly suspicious of German treachery. Defend Marseilles fiercely against Italy with A MAR.

[S1904M] England and Germany orchestrated yet another masterclass in deception. I foolishly trusted England's "truce," vacating the English Channel and Irish Sea. England immediately flooded those zones and attacked Picardy. Germany lied about supporting me into Belgium, instead forcing Burgundy with overwhelming support. Italy took Marseilles as expected. I have lost MAR and BUR, and my defensive lines are completely shattered. 

However, there is a massive silver lining: Austria and Russia kept their words! Austria successfully took Venice from Italy, and Russia seized Norway from England. 

Strategic lesson: Never vacate defensive choke points based on promises from proven enemies. My compliance gave England the keys to my western seaboard. I must never trust E/G/I again. My sole focus now is a desperate tactical defense of Paris, Brest, and Iberia, praying the new Austro-Russian offensives force my attackers to retreat before I am eliminated.

[F1904M] Austria is aggressively pushing into Italy, forcing Italy to agree to a truce with me (holding MAR, moving F LYO - TYS). England, panicked by Russia taking NWY, agreed to a truce and is retreating F ENG and F IRI to defend his home centers. Germany proposed an alliance against England, asking for A PIC S A BUR - BEL while promising to leave PAR alone. Russia revealed a planned surprise attack on Austria; I warned Austria and begged Russia to focus on England/Germany instead so Italy remains pressured.
Intent: Order A PIC S German A BUR - BEL to help dislodge England and encourage Germany to vacate Burgundy. Order A PAR to hold/defend Paris in case Germany lies and attacks PAR. Order A SPA to hold, relying on Italy's promise to move F LYO east. Order F MAO and F NAO to hold or defend Brest, cautiously trusting England's retreat.

[F1904M] England and Germany orchestrated yet another masterclass in deception. England lied about retreating from the Channel and Irish Sea, instead attacking MAO and dislodging my army in Picardy. Germany lied about accepting my support into Belgium, using the opportunity to attack Paris. My attempt to cooperate with Germany was a complete trap. E/G remain an unbreakable, perfectly coordinated juggernaut, and I must assume every word they say is a lie designed to lower my defenses.

The only silver lining is that Italy actually kept their word, moving F LYO away to TYS and holding Marseilles, giving my southern flank a slight breather. 

My position is critical. I am down to four centers (Paris, Brest, Spain, Portugal). With Russia losing Norway to England and fighting Austria over Constantinople, eastern relief is fading. My sole focus is a desperate, purely tactical defense of my remaining centers. E/G cannot be trusted under any circumstances.

[S1905M] Austria is successfully dismantling Italy (took VEN and NAP) and encourages me to hold the line. Italy agreed to a strict truce (holding MAR) to focus entirely on surviving Austria. England agreed to a tactical truce, promising to hold PIC and ENG if I focus my units purely on defending PAR and BRE against Germany. Germany attempted to trick me into ordering A PAR - PIC to 'help' him take BEL, which would leave Paris wide open; I agreed in chat but explicitly told England I am ignoring Germany's trap. Russia is too busy with Austria and England to open a front against Germany.
Intent: Execute a pure turtle defense. Ignore Germany's trap to vacate Paris. Order A BRE to support A PAR (or vice versa) to bounce any German attack from BUR. Order A SPA to hold, relying on the truce with Italy. Order F MAO to hold or support SPA/BRE. Maintain the tactical truce with England.

[S1905M] [S1905M] England's "tactical truce" was a complete lie. They used it to coordinate a devastating joint strike with Germany, using A PIC to support A BUR into Paris, successfully dislodging my army. England simultaneously attacked Brest and the Mid-Atlantic Ocean. The Anglo-German alliance remains unbreakable and entirely focused on my elimination. I must never trust a single word from London or Berlin again; their diplomacy is nothing but a tool to lower my defenses.

On the southern front, Italy honored our truce by holding Marseilles, but they successfully retook Naples from Austria. This is highly dangerous—if Austria's assault on Italy falters, Italy may turn their sights back to Iberia. 

My position is critical. Reduced to Brest, Spain, and Portugal, my sole objective is to form an impenetrable defensive shell around these remaining centers. I must beg Russia to attack E/G to draw their units away, and urge Austria to resume their offensive against Italy.

[F1905M] Austria and Russia both claim to have agreed to a temporary truce this Fall, which should allow Austria to focus entirely on Italy and Russia to begin addressing the E/G threat. Italy agreed to maintain our truce and hold Marseilles. England explicitly refused to turn on Germany. Germany claims he will hold Paris and Burgundy to consolidate his gains and promised not to attack Gascony, though his word is entirely untrustworthy.
Intent: Execute a pure turtle defense against the Anglo-German alliance. Order A BRE to hold and A GAS to support A BRE to defend against a likely supported English attack from PIC and ENG. Order F MAO to hold and A SPA to support F MAO to defend against English pressure from IRI. Rely on the truce with Italy for Spain's safety, and hope Germany actually holds PAR/BUR as he claimed so GAS's support is not cut.

[F1905M] [F1905M] The Anglo-German alliance remains absolute and perfectly coordinated. Germany used A PAR to support England's F ENG into Brest, successfully dislodging my army despite my defensive supports. I have now lost Brest and am reduced to just Spain and Portugal. F MAO successfully bounced England's attack from IRI, but the pressure on my remaining territories is overwhelming. 

Worse, the promised Austro-Russian truce was a complete fabrication. Russia attacked and took Galicia from Austria, meaning neither power will be sending units west to relieve the pressure on me. Italy honored our truce by holding Marseilles, but they are entirely focused on surviving Austria's naval assault.

My position is on the brink of collapse. I must form a final defensive line around Iberia using F MAO, A SPA, and A GAS. I must continue begging Russia and Austria to stop fighting, though my diplomatic leverage is practically zero. E/G cannot be trusted under any circumstances.

goals: Help England capture Brest to accelerate France's elimination
Maintain the Anglo-German alliance to secure the West
Preserve eastern DMZs with Austria and Russia
Monitor Russian explosive growth in the East
Prepare to pivot forces East/South once France is eliminated
full_private_diary:
[S1901M] Successfully negotiated DMZs across the board: Bohemia/Tyrolia with Austria, Burgundy with France, Prussia/Silesia with Russia, and Tyrolia with Italy. Reached an agreement with England to split the Low Countries (England gets Belgium, Germany gets Holland) and with Russia to allow them Sweden. Shared intelligence with Turkey regarding Austrian and Russian moves.
Intent: Execute the agreed-upon opening: F KIE - DEN, A BER - KIE, A MUN - RUH. This respects all DMZs (Burgundy, Bohemia, Tyrolia, Prussia, Silesia) while setting up to secure Denmark and Holland in the Fall.

[S1901M] Spring 1901 went exactly as planned. All negotiated DMZs—Burgundy with France, Bohemia/Tyrolia with Austria, and Prussia/Silesia with Russia—were completely respected, establishing a strong foundation of trust across the board. My opening moves (F KIE-DEN, A BER-KIE, A MUN-RUH) succeeded without a hitch. 

England and France both executed standard openings and are now positioned to contest Belgium. I will proceed with our agreement to take Holland while allowing England to take Belgium, though I must watch France's army in Picardy carefully. Russia moved to the Gulf of Bothnia, and I will honor our agreement to let them take Sweden. 

Overall, my strategic position is excellent. I am guaranteed two builds (Denmark and Holland) and have maintained friendly relations with all neighbors. The key for the Fall will be securing my centers while observing how the Anglo-French dynamic over Belgium unfolds.

[F1901M] Successfully confirmed all Spring agreements for the Fall. England will convoy to Belgium while I take Holland. France is allowing England to take Belgium and focusing on Iberia, keeping Picardy out of the way and maintaining the Burgundy DMZ. Russia is taking Sweden uncontested while I secure Denmark, and plans a southern build. Austria and Italy confirmed the continuation of our DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia. Turkey is working with Austria against Russia and we agreed to share intelligence.
Intent: Execute the agreed-upon moves to secure my two builds: A KIE - HOL, A RUH S A KIE - HOL, and F DEN holds. This guarantees Holland and Denmark while honoring my agreements to let England take Belgium and Russia take Sweden, and maintaining all established DMZs.

[F1901M] Fall 1901 went exactly as planned for my own centers: I secured Holland and Denmark, guaranteeing two builds. All established DMZs with France, Austria, and Russia held firm, maintaining a peaceful perimeter. 

However, a major strategic threat has emerged: France actively supported England's convoy into Belgium. This strongly suggests an Anglo-French alliance, which is traditionally very dangerous for Germany. England and France both secured two builds, matching my growth, and their cooperation in the Low Countries is a red flag. 

Russia also secured two builds (Sweden and Romania) and successfully defended against a Turkish attack, making them the board leader at six centers. 

My immediate priority is to address the potential Anglo-French threat. I must use my two builds to prepare defenses in the west while actively negotiating to break up their alliance. I will reach out to Russia and Italy to form a counter-coalition, while probing England and France to see who might be willing to turn on the other.

[S1902M] Agreed with England to launch a surprise attack on France by moving into Burgundy, while England holds Belgium and sends fleets north against Russia. Deceived France into believing Burgundy will remain a DMZ and that my armies will hold defensively, while encouraging them to move F BRE to ENG. Confirmed DMZs with Austria (Bohemia/Tyrolia) and Italy (Tyrolia). Agreed with Russia to maintain a peaceful north (F DEN holds, F SWE holds). Turkey confirmed England's fleets are heading north to attack Russia.
Intent: Execute the surprise attack on France: A MUN - BUR supported by A RUH. Move F KIE - HEL to establish a naval presence and defend the coast. Hold F DEN as agreed with Russia. Hold A HOL to secure the border with Belgium.

[S1902M] The surprise attack on France was a resounding success! I successfully occupied Burgundy, catching France completely off guard. Even better, France attempted to attack Belgium, confirming the end of the Anglo-French alliance. England kept their word, holding Belgium and committing a massive fleet presence (NTH, NWG, BAR, SKA) to a northern campaign against Russia. 

My strategic position is now excellent. With armies in Burgundy, Ruhr, and Holland, I am perfectly positioned to dismantle France alongside England. However, I must remain vigilant: England's overwhelming naval presence in the north could easily pivot toward Denmark or Helgoland if our alliance sours. 

Moving into the Fall, my priority is to coordinate with England to secure French centers (Paris or Picardy) while ensuring my northern flank remains secure. I will maintain my friendly relations with Austria, Italy, and Russia to keep the east quiet while I focus on the western offensive.

[F1902M] Agreed with England to attack France: A BUR - PAR supported by A RUH, while A HOL supports English A BEL to hold. England will move F NTH - ENG and F SKA - NTH. Deceived France into believing I will support A PIC - BEL with A BUR and retreat A RUH - MUN. France revealed plans to move F ENG - LON and A PIC - BEL. Maintained DMZs with Austria (Bohemia/Tyrolia) and Russia (Prussia/Silesia/Baltic). Warned Russia and Italy about Austria's rapid growth to help Turkey and sow discord in the East.
Intent: Execute the attack on France in coordination with England. Order A BUR - PAR supported by A RUH. Order A HOL to support English A BEL to hold, defending against France's planned A PIC - BEL. Hold F HEL and F DEN to maintain the northern DMZ with Russia and avoid bouncing England's F SKA - NTH.

[F1902M] The Fall 1902 phase brought a shocking development in the West: France successfully slipped into London! While England and I coordinated our moves—with my A HOL successfully supporting English A BEL against the French attack from Picardy—France's bold F ENG - LON maneuver caught England off guard. 

My own offensive stalled. My attack on Paris failed due to a lack of support, as A RUH attempted to move into Burgundy instead of supporting the assault. I must be far more meticulous with my order writing to avoid such costly tactical errors. 

Despite England losing their home center, our alliance remains intact and vital. France is now dangerously strong at six centers. I must work closely with England to help them reclaim London while renewing our coordinated assault on Paris and Picardy. Meanwhile, in the East, Austria, Russia, and Italy are rapidly dismantling Turkey. I must monitor their growth carefully, as an Eastern juggernaut could soon threaten my borders.

[S1903M] Successfully deceived France into believing I will attack Belgium (A HOL - BEL) and vacate Burgundy (A BUR - MUN), prompting them to order A PIC S A HOL - BEL and focus their fleets on the Channel. In reality, I have coordinated with England to attack Paris (A BUR - PAR supported by A RUH) while securing Belgium (A HOL S English A BEL). England will attempt to retake London. Confirmed DMZs with Austria (holding VIE/BUD) and Russia (holding SWE/STP). Successfully encouraged Italy to begin shifting fleets westward (F ION - TYS) to pressure France's southern flank.
Intent: Execute the coordinated attack on France with England while maintaining the deception. Order A BUR - PAR supported by A RUH. Order A HOL to support English A BEL to hold. Hold F DEN and F HEL to maintain the northern DMZs with Russia.

[S1903M] My deception regarding Belgium worked partially—France ordered Picardy to support Holland to Belgium—but they saw through my Burgundy ruse. France attacked Burgundy with Paris supported by Marseilles, dislodging my army. This is a major tactical setback, forcing a retreat to Munich and putting me on the defensive. 

Fortunately, our Anglo-German coordination succeeded elsewhere: England retook London and dislodged the French fleet, though France managed to slip into the English Channel. The alliance remains solid, and we must now coordinate to reclaim Burgundy and push back. 

Encouragingly, Italy followed through on moving F ION - TYS, which should soon pressure France's southern flank and relieve the western front. In the East, Turkey is collapsing rapidly to the Austro-Russian-Italian coalition. I must maintain my eastern DMZs and monitor their growth, but my absolute priority is surviving the French assault and organizing a counter-offensive with England.

[F1903M] Successfully coordinated with England to secure Belgium (A HOL S A BEL) and attack Burgundy (A MUN - BUR S by A RUH). England will hold London and Belgium. Deceived France into believing I will attack Belgium (A HOL - BEL) and vacate Ruhr (A RUH - KIE), prompting them to order A PIC S A HOL - BEL and hold Burgundy. Italy confirmed they are moving F TYS - LYO and A VEN - PIE to attack France's southern flank. Reaffirmed DMZs with Austria (Bohemia/Tyrolia) and Russia (Prussia/Silesia/Baltic/Scandinavia).
Intent: Execute the coordinated attack on France with England while maintaining the deception against France. Order A MUN - BUR supported by A RUH. Order A HOL to support English A BEL to hold. Hold F DEN and F HEL to maintain the northern defensive screen and DMZs with Russia.

[F1903M] My attack on Burgundy bounced once again, as France wisely supported it with Marseilles. However, my deception regarding Holland kept Picardy occupied, and our Anglo-German defensive coordination successfully held both Belgium and London against French assaults. 

The most significant development this phase is Italy's successful push into Piedmont and the Gulf of Lyon! France's southern flank is now completely breached. Even better, France ends the year with six units but only five supply centers, forcing them to disband a unit. The tide of the western war has officially turned. 

Next year, I must coordinate closely with England and Italy to capitalize on France's shrinking military and finally crack Burgundy and Paris. In the East, Turkey is down to a single center as Russia and Austria continue their expansion. I must maintain my eastern DMZs and keep a watchful eye on the growing Austro-Russian powers while I finish off France.

[S1904M] Coordinated a massive joint strike on France with England and Italy. England will order A BEL - PIC, F LON - ENG, and F LVP - IRI. Italy will order A PIE - MAR S by F LYO. I have successfully deceived France into believing I will hold MUN/RUH and order A HOL S A PIC - BEL, prompting France to order A PIC - BEL S by A BUR and move F ENG away. Reaffirmed all eastern and northern DMZs with Austria and Russia.
Intent: Execute the trap against France: Order A MUN - BUR supported by A RUH to dislodge the French army in Burgundy (which will be busy trying to support Picardy). Order A HOL to hold. Order F DEN and F HEL to hold to maintain the northern defensive screen and DMZs with Russia.

[S1904M] The coordinated strike against France was a resounding success. I successfully dislodged the French army in Burgundy, while Italy breached the southern flank and captured Marseilles. France is now crumbling under our combined pressure and will be forced into devastating retreats. 

However, the broader geopolitical landscape has shifted dramatically. Russia has betrayed England, successfully taking Norway with support from St. Petersburg. Simultaneously, Austria has turned on Italy, capturing Venice. 

These betrayals in the East and North present both opportunities and threats. The Austro-Italian conflict may slow the eastern juggernaut's advance, buying me time. But Russia's aggressive push into Scandinavia means my northern flank is no longer entirely secure. My immediate priority is to help England finish off France quickly by capturing Paris and Picardy, freeing up our forces to establish a strong defensive line against the looming Russian threat in the north.

[F1904M] Successfully deceived France into believing I will attack English-held Belgium (A BUR - BEL S by A RUH) and convinced France to order A PIC S A BUR - BEL. In reality, I am coordinating with England to crush France: England will order A BEL - PIC S by F ENG, while I order A BUR - PAR S by A RUH. Italy is holding MAR to distract France while pivoting east against Austria. Russia claims he will attack Austria in the Balkans this Fall and agreed to maintain our northern DMZs. Austria reaffirmed our BOH/TYR DMZs.
Intent: Execute the trap against France: Order A BUR - PAR supported by A RUH to capture Paris, exploiting France's wasted support order in Picardy. Order A HOL to hold. Order F DEN and F HEL to hold to maintain the northern defensive screen and respect DMZs with Russia.

[F1904M] The deception against France worked flawlessly: France wasted Picardy's order supporting a phantom German attack on Belgium. England capitalized on this perfectly, successfully capturing Picardy and simultaneously retaking Norway from Russia. 

Unfortunately, I made a critical tactical error: I ordered A RUH - BUR instead of supporting A BUR - PAR. This caused my attack on Paris to bounce against a single French defender. I must ensure I properly order supports for crucial attacks in the future rather than chaining moves. 

Despite my blunder, the Anglo-German alliance remains highly effective, and France is crumbling. In the East, Russia and Italy cooperated to dislodge Austria from Constantinople, indicating a potential shift against Austrian dominance. Moving forward, I must coordinate with England to finally capture Paris and eliminate France, while keeping a close eye on the East and maintaining my northern defensive screen.

[S1905M] England and I have finalized a coordinated strike to capture Paris: England will order A PIC S A BUR - PAR, F ENG - BRE, and F IRI - MAO. I have successfully deceived France into believing I am attacking Belgium and requested they order A PAR - PIC, which they agreed to (though England reports France may just defend). Either way, our combined 3-unit attack on Paris will succeed. I have reaffirmed strict DMZs with Russia (PRU, SIL, BAL) and Austria (BOH, TYR), declining their requests to attack each other so I can focus entirely on finishing France. Italy has agreed to hold MAR to keep France pinned.
Intent: Execute the final strike on France by ordering A BUR - PAR supported by A RUH. Order A HOL, F DEN, and F HEL to hold to maintain my northern defensive screen and strictly respect all eastern DMZs with Russia and Austria.

[S1905M] [S1905M] Success at last! The Anglo-German alliance executed flawlessly. With England's support from Picardy, I have finally captured Paris. France's defensive lines are crumbling, though they managed to bounce England's attacks on Brest and the Mid-Atlantic. My northern defensive screen (Holland, Denmark, Helgoland) remains intact, and I successfully respected all eastern DMZs.

In the East, Russia continues to grow alarmingly, now holding 9 centers after consolidating in Romania. Austria and Italy are still clashing, with Italy successfully retaking Naples. This ongoing eastern chaos remains beneficial, but Russia's explosive growth is a looming threat that I must monitor closely.

My immediate priority for the Fall is to secure Paris, assist England in capturing Brest to accelerate France's elimination, and begin preparing for a potential pivot. England has proven to be a highly reliable ally, and our continued cooperation is vital for securing the West.

[F1905M] England and I have finalized a coordinated strike to guarantee the fall of Brest. England will order F ENG - BRE supported by A PIC, and F IRI - MAO. I have agreed to order A PAR S F ENG - BRE and A BUR S A PAR. I told France I am holding Paris and Burgundy to keep them focused on defending against England. I reaffirmed strict DMZs with Russia (PRU, SIL, BAL, Scandinavia) and Austria (BOH, TYR), declining requests from Austria and Italy to move East this year so I can focus entirely on finishing France. Italy confirmed they are holding Marseilles.
Intent: Execute the agreed-upon support for England to capture Brest by ordering A PAR S F ENG - BRE and A BUR S A PAR. Order F DEN, A HOL, and F HEL to hold, maintaining the northern defensive screen and strictly respecting all eastern DMZs with Russia and Austria.

[F1905M] [F1905M] The Anglo-German alliance continues to yield excellent results! Our coordinated strike executed flawlessly, allowing England to capture Brest and reducing France to a crumbling remnant in Iberia. I successfully supported the attack from Paris while repositioning A HOL to RUH to prepare for future deployments. My northern defensive screen remains intact.

In the East, Russia's relentless expansion continues. They successfully forced their way into Galicia, putting immense pressure on Austria. With 9 centers and a dominant position, Russia is rapidly becoming the primary threat to the entire board. 

With France effectively neutralized, my strategic priority must shift. I will use my upcoming build to strengthen my position and begin pivoting my forces eastward to contain the Russian juggernaut before they overwhelm Austria and turn their sights on me. Maintaining the Anglo-German alliance remains crucial to keeping my western flank secure during this transition.
private_diary:

goals: Secure Naples and defend the homeland against Austria
Coordinate with Russia to crush Austria's eastern and northern flanks
Hold Marseilles to secure the western center while England and Germany finish France
